name: Bill Spadea
subject: [LIVE NOW] New Common Ground Podcast
body:
Peter, Bill is LIVE NOW on a new episode of the Common Ground Podcast, streaming from the magnificent Crystal Springs Resort
|
---
| Peter, Bill is **LIVE NOW from The Ocean View Restaurant on Seaside Heights Boardwalk for a very special broadcast of the Common Ground Podcast.** This morning, we're dedicating our time to the brave men and women who've served our nation, as we host multiple veterans from New Jersey.
---
| | [CLICK HERE TO TUNE IN NOW](https://xtz223.keap-link012.com/v2/click/14d45b81efb96e91cf6dbdee98a4915e/eJyNkMFqwkAQht9lzqkh0UoMlGKtaEiUIlXpqazJlC4mm2Eza7pK3r2rFU8t9DKX-f7vZ-YEjEooTgqI4YuPYdgHDzTmkiQqntSKRX7ZhveDoB94UEq1n-naEMSnX8M34JIKo8gDtoQOeV2NJ2mynL1nyTJ1JAntOv7pGQ5unulinGTQdX-KsZI8PTh3AzFrg-eLCumu4rUuHf_JTE3s-23b9mxt2Oywl9eVT6WwpWz48TweXrKn-REPb2pnKk7vFOn5_nn0sYrsNths82AtXJUgQlVc_5Si_SnsvgGdgnHb)
---
|
---
Today’s Highlights:
* **Veteran Voices:** Hear directly from New Jersey veterans sharing their powerful stories and experiences.
* **Advocacy in Action:** Learn about the crucial work being done to support our veterans' rights and needs.
* **Community Engagement:** Discover how you can actively support and make a difference in the lives of our veterans.

---
| Join us for a tribute to our heroes, and gain insight into the lives of those who've sacrificed so much for our freedoms. [**WATCH AND PARTICIPATE LIVE NOW**](https://xtz223.keap-link012.com/v2/click/a2c873233b6d6bee850e9680078ff4b1/eJyNkMFqwkAQht9lzqkh0YoGSrFWNCRKkVrxVNZkSheTzbCZNV0l797VFk8KXuYy3__9zByBUQnFcQ4R_PAhDLvggcZMkkTF40qxyM7b8LEXdAMPCql2U10Zguh4NXwBzqlw0PeALaFD3pejcRIvpp9pvEgcSUK7jjs9_d7FM5mP4hTa9qYYS8mTvXPXELE2eLool-4qXunC8d_MVEe-3zRNx1aGzRY7WVX6VAhbyJqfT-PpLX2ZHXC_UVtTcvKgSM92r8Ov5cCug491FqyEqxJEqPL_PyVo_wrbX5uYcdk=) **Your presence adds significant value to our discussion and supports our community of veterans. Tune in now to honor and celebrate the courageous spirits of our New Jersey veterans.** Until next time, Common Sense Action Team

body:

# Big news, folks!
---
[](https://pattiforgeorgia.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8b4d0ba6402550309dbd7c06a&id=e5dd612754&e=0f456155ff)
| _*Image courtesy of WABE_
My opponent just revealed he’s thinking about running for Jon Ossoff’s U.S. Senate seat in 2026. **Can you believe it?** This guy is more interested in climbing the political ladder than serving the people!

He says [Georgia shouldn't have two Democratic senators](https://pattiforgeorgia.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8b4d0ba6402550309dbd7c06a&id=dd8948debf&e=0f456155ff). He's dreaming big, but we've got to wake him up! We need to expose his self-serving agenda and make sure he faces a crushing defeat.
We’re gearing up for a massive media blitz and we need **YOUR** help to make it happen. Your donation will go directly to supporting our campaign, ensuring we have the resources to defeat Buddy and keep him out of the House **AND** the Senate.
Let’s send a loud and clear message: **Georgia deserves better!**
[**Donate today and join us in this crucial fight.**](https://pattiforgeorgia.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8b4d0ba6402550309dbd7c06a&id=8d1f4a7c54&e=0f456155ff)
Thank you for your tremendous support!

name: SAVE AMERICA
subject: We need Kari Lake in the U.S. Senate!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tuberville Victory Fund
body:
I’m out here in The Grand Canyon State to help. Read more >>>
| | | **Stand with Kari Lake to** **TAKE BACK THE SENATE!**

**[RUSH EMERGENCY SUPPORT >>>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/6b264baf026ae4e03947229f28c3afba/ab4c45aeddafb0dfc3d6b838967d376c/33013)**
---
| | Peter,

I’m out here in The Grand Canyon State this weekend to help – it's all on the line in Arizona.

Kari Lake is an unwavering **AMERICA FIRST CONSERVATIVE** ready to fight alongside me and President Trump to save our country from the radical left, _and control of the U.S. Senate could all come down to the outcome in this race on November 5th_!

Right now, the polls show this is a tight race. Some show Democrat Ruben Gallego up by as much as 13 points.

Every day matters and we need to rush all the support we can to Kari to **DEFEAT THE LEFT**!

**[**Make a secure contribution RIGHT NOW to help Kari Lake win >>>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/6b264baf026ae4e03947229f28c3afba/0dc699475f75bbb5c3d6b838967d376c/33013)**
---
| | **🚨 AMERICA’S FUTURE IS ON THE LINE 🚨**
---
[**TAKE A STAND**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/6b264baf026ae4e03947229f28c3afba/b3d17355bbd3b642c3d6b838967d376c/33013)
---
| | President Trump endorsed Kari Lake early in this race because he knows her well and knows she is all in to Make America Great Again. **I’ve gotten to know her well too and know she will NEVER back down in our fight to defeat these woke-left lunatics.**

Kari Lake is pro-Trump, pro-America, and **FIRED UP TO WIN**!

The Democrat campaign machine is bound and determined to come out on top in Arizona. In the first quarter, Ruben Gallego outraised Kari by a 2-to-1 margin and closed out on March 31st with $9.6 MILLION in the bank.

We can’t afford to let the Democrats buy this seat...
**This is a top 2024 Senate race and Kari Lake needs EVERY America First conservative across the country on board to help her come out on top!**
**[P](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/6b264baf026ae4e03947229f28c3afba/c60527781469cdf7c3d6b838967d376c/33013)[lease pitch in whatever you can today.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/6b264baf026ae4e03947229f28c3afba/4b28672c32a6d908c3d6b838967d376c/33013)[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/6b264baf026ae4e03947229f28c3afba/a5f6205f19cf60e0c3d6b838967d376c/33013)** You’ll know on Election Day that you did your part to help **TAKE BACK THE SENATE** and **SAVE OUR GREAT NATION**.

\- Coach

[Other](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=8236040e4c62449b88aba548e6e53072&_e=t3ju2iNL5DaqW-OqZiz9k-6YS2LY5Gm5O7ZW98T_EdKOYfnxB8MgaeXdWKPIXIhIbUjs9SsWQaPJndMcJKqYaJKDyHtppU2OIoAzPgsYV6zCDRi3LALPWQ__yJ0myLgNjZ0SNDqEHh-yMkn8I1kWFLIzxs_G9ulfg3yKziA2jiMIn598XJLxvV66lB_UlmNLq8fW5yVkZKZX5iZ9VZ4x4kqeSAkQ_kXvQ7NT7QcDPHz2ScHJf6pWvwqNoLXduZov-6cERQWTphJzh5xq44dUWQ%3D%3D)

My goal is to raise $50,000 this month to fund ballot-chasing operations in key electoral states to win back the White House--and take back our country.

To be frank, I don't trust the DC Establishment and Uniparty to do this important GOTV work. It's going to require organizations like Turning Point PAC to do the hard work. And I am up for the challenge if you can join me today in supporting our movement.

[Please rush your support today by donating $20.24 or more and help us win back the White House >>](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=8236040e4c62449b88aba548e6e53072&_e=t3ju2iNL5DaqW-OqZiz9k-6YS2LY5Gm5O7ZW98T_EdKOYfnxB8MgaeXdWKPIXIhIbUjs9SsWQaPJndMcJKqYaJKDyHtppU2OIoAzPgsYV6zCDRi3LALPWQ__yJ0myLgNdnyaBM-ApGqpJN32SS1oixJIn7Pt2FHT-6tOKQRtgvsp0XtFDEK5JfaG6lvsnm_Q8ekFUVqjjlQMjJ3Z8J07GYqBjWHjb2BtM45A1s0aj7Uw7WD7pKybrAe0k0T6x2r8fRduqbDz2d8G7704mU9qOA%3D%3D)

We need to win in November. This isn't a football game. This is for our civilization.

Thank you,

Charlie Kirk
Turning Point PAC

Non-Contribution Account (For TTPAC, Inc.'s Expenditures Other Than Direct Contributions to Federal Committees)

As permitted by law, TTPAC, Inc. maintains a non-contribution account for the purpose of influencing federal, state, and local elections. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, address, occupation, and employer of individuals whose contribution exceeds $200 in an election cycle. For contributions from federal committees, corporations, and labor unions - regardless of contribution amount - federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the committee's name and address. State and local law may require us to collect and report additional information.

Contributions to this account may be used to influence federal elections by making independent expenditures in support of or in opposition to federal candidates. Additionally, in state and local jurisdictions that permit non-individual type (e.g. corporate) contributions directly to candidates and/or committees, contributions to this account may be used for both independent expenditures and direct contributions to candidate and/or committees, as permitted by state and local law.

Individuals, federal committees, corporations, and labor unions may contribute to TTPAC, Inc.'s non-contribution account without limit. Contributions by national banks, foreign nationals (without lawful permanent resident status), and other foreign entities (e.g. foreign corporations) are prohibited. Contributions to TTPAC, Inc.'s non-contribution account are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Paid for by Turning Point PAC, Inc. (www.tppac.com) and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

| Reclaiming American Freedom

name: Gary Sinise
subject: These heroes are counting on you
body:
The National Memorial Day Parade is an event like no other ...

| | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b73c6ba910c84eea8a178d906d6599c8&_e=WTmfgHVEIpkyAujzuzVx04lMMLyDFk_etX15gZKPAn13zflzP5bb8EcsKyPMBPUIzrgFjRkbpzzluOYuzUyYgC4PJeJGr03NN5fDzs3NVTRz7kpVT-0Go66ckxkrRfs2fMffflB4MB97JUv_DMV-FuBeRpana3F0kbYzumVhfH8FVIgrnRXQif0ZL5JFcq-SWGarIS13p2SZJLY9c7gjUpH6NPrfGNCAqlMj1woI-LTeZ3_IHglXq4E2ppQnoVjt1il_1Uz74uknItePgRSBlNp-6g2evFAIl-FM4AKmAbJphjLjO-48Ow7tl536CfB9)
---
Fellow American, It's Gary Sinise here.

You may know me from my roles in movies like Apollo 13 and The Green Mile or the CBS television series CSI NY-- but it was in 1994 and playing the role of Lt. Dan in Forrest Gump that my life changed and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders.

**This year, I 'm honored to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C.**

The National Memorial Day Parade is an event like no other ... and this year, as we mark the 80th anniversary of the D-Day invasion, the American Veterans Center is bringing the Parade BACK in full force, with 5,000+ participants marching down Constitution Avenue before a crowd of 250,000+ in-person, as well as a T.V. broadcast that reaches 100 million households around the country.

**[Fellow American, the National Memorial Day Parade is PRIMARILY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous Americans like you. Will you help chip in today to help support the Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, or more?](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b73c6ba910c84eea8a178d906d6599c8&_e=WTmfgHVEIpkyAujzuzVx04lMMLyDFk_etX15gZKPAn13zflzP5bb8EcsKyPMBPUIzrgFjRkbpzzluOYuzUyYgC4PJeJGr03NN5fDzs3NVTRz7kpVT-0Go66ckxkrRfs2fMffflB4MB97JUv_DMV-FuBeRpana3F0kbYzumVhfH9fGjb_Swv1XW7TlxI1O5tGkipMlO75GbfrzVFvYRJYBdAutQGtdiOxrFl9ez-5__o6UXjLaSeKZXOkDKGEIoBtNTuPvJGCGj2yd3-sOz4D9NBOFADw1TVE-wrwXBvurPtzk0dJMJJcqPoNRrbGXBAM)**
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b73c6ba910c84eea8a178d906d6599c8&_e=WTmfgHVEIpkyAujzuzVx04lMMLyDFk_etX15gZKPAn13zflzP5bb8EcsKyPMBPUIzrgFjRkbpzzluOYuzUyYgC4PJeJGr03NN5fDzs3NVTRz7kpVT-0Go66ckxkrRfs2fMffflB4MB97JUv_DMV-FuBeRpana3F0kbYzumVhfH8A_bzFNMmJYvnXzKK2deL3LdrX0yH0SeqUClIlHBeiEPEXSup1s2el70xgY786uO0Z2ZZreKx66fMB5ybopSChKduHeQtCG3QCC5kc5ZuQGBumI5nvCMiNz4XsC9P86ybTto1zPCNv5GbR9R1RGIZo)
---
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b73c6ba910c84eea8a178d906d6599c8&_e=WTmfgHVEIpkyAujzuzVx04lMMLyDFk_etX15gZKPAn13zflzP5bb8EcsKyPMBPUIzrgFjRkbpzzluOYuzUyYgC4PJeJGr03NN5fDzs3NVTRz7kpVT-0Go66ckxkrRfs2fMffflB4MB97JUv_DMV-FuBeRpana3F0kbYzumVhfH-PoXOJtE07MwMTN1AO-ITbdlQK9IHNfUNdDKvZtDO3miPZIQFEkhr54wBzulSD6BxIXI7fG8uMS2UvCpk7aM8dyPpQjRcohTZ7e91LLsPYFBQW18sddqDnZfyUQIL9tz0KhdZHwVP5qqLYcyea4Hcl)
---

---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b73c6ba910c84eea8a178d906d6599c8&_e=WTmfgHVEIpkyAujzuzVx04lMMLyDFk_etX15gZKPAn13zflzP5bb8EcsKyPMBPUIzrgFjRkbpzzluOYuzUyYgC4PJeJGr03NN5fDzs3NVTRz7kpVT-0Go66ckxkrRfs2fMffflB4MB97JUv_DMV-FuBeRpana3F0kbYzumVhfH8SO5Y6SwWfDdT8UPjl5gh3F_P9erRlXFcOEqIou31qSkn_MtDPiQr9U2bqB3lckekivo_JurtEhUkEMQCvsgsqlG1NFKb-TpOPa17neT-veXSZ3WnPe8OwKj42-Ty5WLgrhrWZyrx0o2xgN9fMVOI0)
---
The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, the entire parade costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! _That means that every dollar that 's contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event._ Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like:
* Recording hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to today before we lose these stories forever.
* Holding our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear firsthand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam.
* Producing veteran-focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans of the price of our freedom.

[**Please join me in support of the National Memorial Day Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, or more right now.**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b73c6ba910c84eea8a178d906d6599c8&_e=WTmfgHVEIpkyAujzuzVx04lMMLyDFk_etX15gZKPAn13zflzP5bb8EcsKyPMBPUIzrgFjRkbpzzluOYuzUyYgC4PJeJGr03NN5fDzs3NVTRz7kpVT-0Go66ckxkrRfs2fMffflB4MB97JUv_DMV-FuBeRpana3F0kbYzumVhfH9oPNtxTdYRNvRAxHRsKLDuuR4vqHqCMqPJsfcXKh6qsNMC9In2-Oys0STN17NHPd60kiCa9jpVDnJjubC4bQPclfXZhLIpJJOB5jez_wOhl7AVt7HKf-kJEenfVLILzcbUrYzyN2x_ItM4P1fz88ym) If you've been looking for an opportunity to give back to those who have given so much for our freedom, this is one of the best ways you could possibly do it.

**And for a special group of veterans, this might be one of the last chances we get.**

You see, with each year that goes by, we lose more and more of our World War II veterans, and for the few we have remaining, traveling to Washington, D.C. for the parade is difficult.

I am honored to say that we will have several World War II veterans with us for this year's parade... but I don't know how many more years we'll have that precious opportunity.

So this year, as we mark the 80th anniversary of the D-Day invasion and what might be the last chance these great men have to gather together, **I encourage you to help us honor them while we still have them with us.**

And no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you. On Memorial Day -- this year and every year -- please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms.

Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in D.C. Visit a local veterans' cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country.
Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country.

_I believe that while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more._

**Fellow American, thank you for your support of America's heroes, and please -- [if you're able, make a gift to help fund the National Memorial Day Parade right now.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b73c6ba910c84eea8a178d906d6599c8&_e=WTmfgHVEIpkyAujzuzVx04lMMLyDFk_etX15gZKPAn13zflzP5bb8EcsKyPMBPUIzrgFjRkbpzzluOYuzUyYgC4PJeJGr03NN5fDzs3NVTRz7kpVT-0Go66ckxkrRfs2fMffflB4MB97JUv_DMV-FuBeRpana3F0kbYzumVhfH9cfqHZ3FAmLkOgdBYymPagj1ljfaHrckhd4otmQWPwS3KUE_KnMG6k5CMrMrJB_d5rb_m3DLS6L5uFYIiobCjsBHNCJdfmvoawYtSKKOcaMFyE9Oel0lBtAFogPgOT5b3APU83Wo1Ur5N0U0KkbJfy)**

Fellow American, It's Gary Sinise here.

You may know me from my roles in movies like Apollo 13 and The Green Mile or the CBS television series CSI NY-- but it was in 1994 and playing the role of Lt. Dan in Forrest Gump that my life changed and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders.

**This year, I 'm honored to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C.**

The National Memorial Day Parade is an event like no other ... and this year, as we mark the 80th anniversary of the D-Day invasion, the American Veterans Center is bringing the Parade BACK in full force, with 5,000+ participants marching down Constitution Avenue before a crowd of 250,000+ in-person, as well as a T.V. broadcast that reaches 100 million households around the country.

**[Fellow American, the National Memorial Day Parade is PRIMARILY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous Americans like you. clean_body: The National Memorial Day Parade is an event like no other ... | | | Fellow American, It's Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like Apollo 13 and The Green Mile or the CBS television series CSI NY-- but it was in 1994 and playing the role of Lt. Dan in Forrest Gump that my life changed and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders. This year, I 'm honored to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. The National Memorial Day Parade is an event like no other ... and this year, as we mark the 80th anniversary of the D-Day invasion, the American Veterans Center is bringing the Parade BACK in full force, with 5,000+ participants marching down Constitution Avenue before a crowd of 250,000+ in-person, as well as a T.V. broadcast that reaches 100 million households around the country. The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, the entire parade costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! That means that every dollar that 's contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event. Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like: Recording hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to today before we lose these stories forever. Holding our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear firsthand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam. Producing veteran-focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans of the price of our freedom. If you've been looking for an opportunity to give back to those who have given so much for our freedom, this is one of the best ways you could possibly do it. And for a special group of veterans, this might be one of the last chances we get. You see, with each year that goes by, we lose more and more of our World War II veterans, and for the few we have remaining, traveling to Washington, D.C. for the parade is difficult. I am honored to say that we will have several World War II veterans with us for this year's parade... but I don't know how many more years we'll have that precious opportunity. So this year, as we mark the 80th anniversary of the D-Day invasion and what might be the last chance these great men have to gather together, I encourage you to help us honor them while we still have them with us. And no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you. On Memorial Day -- this year and every year -- please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in D.C. Visit a local veterans' cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. I believe that while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more. Fellow American, thank you for your support of America's heroes, and please -- ** Sincerely, Gary Sinise Honorary Grand Marshal National Memorial Day Parade The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. (C) American Veterans Center 1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201 Freedom Nation Today PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

# Make the rich pay their fair share!
Join us at the People’s Budget Summit on June 4th.
---
Did you know that working families in Pennsylvania pay among the highest state and local tax rates in the country, while the state’s ultra-rich pay less than half those rates? And greedy multinational corporations pay Pennsylvania no corporate taxes at all!
If the rich and corporations paid their fair share of taxes, we wouldn't have to struggle to fund education, housing, or raise the minimum wage! We could have a budget that benefits all the people of Pennsylvania — not just the wealthy few. **JOIN US Tuesday, June 4th at the state capitol for a day of activism and education to demand tax justice in Pennsylvania at the[People’s Budget Summit!](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.RNKlYhK-gnABEpCnH88uwKoGyBAxVAHrZigX1vSlcJl5QXqKYWtDrOMepzMwWEqBQ95a8wikc0WzUE87vYpHS3lr5qxQVSJWPXkFtWA2fPXH2AgfZdqn7GYoscumMvxwUVJHcUsv3pkPVZGWfNErCmt7smJjzbKV4-xsvscRqQA-S9KNc2iveSj79PiWiYWYPQMAv5cvjx3cDI76W6NqLdGHfgNivQ90F3VRiu6Wb1wUDb7dWcPIbdwzdWfO8OfNvfsjztjmJlqEQJO96GuegPn7OYHMI72n3-okWEj-yeTwpQRuO-tnlWGfetqt85Z9YimSwsGBl0uneKHsl72_6B7S9P48QUWWc8BaK0rSocc/46n/Y6A5YsmySuOEsOHCyGGNdg/h1/h001.kBTviZ6ucRkz-sZZZNL6Q6nLqyw7-5c21ThUWIDMudE)**
---
The event will include a rally, legislator visits, box lunch, and an afternoon of workshops centered around tax justice- followed by a celebratory happy hour. The event begins at 9AM and workshops conclude at 4PM. # Fund Abortion Access on May 29th!
---
**Everyone deserves access to abortion care, full stop.** No matter where we live or what we look like, we all deserve to be able to make the best healthcare choices for ourselves and our families. There are already many barriers to receiving abortion care in Pennsylvania and the Western Pennsylvania Fund For Choice ensures that financial need is not one of those barriers. They provide comprehensive funding for abortion care, from the procedure itself, to transportation and childcare at Allegheny Reproductive Health Clinic — Pittsburgh’s independent abortion provider. Post Dobbs, in addition to Pennsylvanians needing abortions, there has been an enormous uptick in people traveling from West Virginia, Ohio, and as far away as Texas, to receive compassionate abortion care in Pittsburgh. **On Wednesday, May 29th from 5:30 - 7:00 pm,** join Congresswoman Summer Lee, County Executive Sara Innamorato, and Mayor Ed Gainey for a fundraiser at The Ritual House. **For more information and RSVP go to[bit.ly/FundForChoice](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.jTd4CJP2oHMhBHdrjS9uuqyxARSHEOm836R7N6sRFKbFruVY3-UgJXlfx0CEYuO3QIfxXdMRbhgDNV44FaLhvmYcnFmbsYeIQlnqLWwxlF2G4vjALZD6D2mVYNEUk5o_3jIgQ2lVw9q03XoEKDemrod0b8_cL8YYS6poOuq28EuU5GBH_Dl5iLXQUQ3ndYndHPjPnreyOFUNvBYzZqWK4PmSJzIMnkjg0oxzDDKjMP6gOVFIGWbM0OAzcv6ZYjCEcaGTP-ZREDEieatpY2TwCve6jullFf9hF6bZjsvQmQ6s-hcBKeyrVr0IXGewa83xZNQJdBxpFbPKNU8Zz44NGA/46n/Y6A5YsmySuOEsOHCyGGNdg/h4/h001.7tig7ZzEp2PHG2tvtzxmfGVPzCTejirwGLmmyinudzM).**

clean_body: 🗓✓ Mark your calendars — Raising $$$ for abortion access and then make the rich pay their fair share! | | Make the rich pay their fair share! Join us at the People’s Budget Summit on June 4th. Did you know that working families in Pennsylvania pay among the highest state and local tax rates in the country, while the state’s ultra-rich pay less than half those rates? And greedy multinational corporations pay Pennsylvania no corporate taxes at all! If the rich and corporations paid their fair share of taxes, we wouldn't have to struggle to fund education, housing, or raise the minimum wage! We could have a budget that benefits all the people of Pennsylvania — not just the wealthy few. JOIN US Tuesday, June 4th at the state capitol for a day of activism and education to demand tax justice in Pennsylvania at the The event will include a rally, legislator visits, box lunch, and an afternoon of workshops centered around tax justice- followed by a celebratory happy hour. name: Douglas Carswell
subject: What will it take for Mississippi to join the school choice revolution?
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/successsequence-11572550?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
| Dear Friend,

**A school choice revolution is sweeping America.** Mississippi is now sandwiched on either side by school choice states.

**In Arkansas and Alabama, families now get control over their child’s share of state education tax dollars.** From 2025-26, each state government will pay between $7,000 - $9,000 into a dedicated Education Savings Account for each individual child. Mom & dad will be able to allocate that money to a school that best meets the needs of their child.

**What would it take for Mississippi to join the school choice revolution?**

“The Parent Revolution”, just published by Corey DeAngelis, one of the architects of the school choice revolution, shows that Covid lockdowns were an important catalyst for change.

---
|
---
_Corey DeAngelis explains how the Parent Revolution came about ...._
| Pre-Covid, many parents meekly assumed that education meant sending their kids to whichever government school people in their zip code were assigned.

**Covid showed millions of Americans that many government schools are run in the interests of teacher unions and school board bureaucrats, rather than their kids.** Teacher Unions were quick to call for schools to be closed, and fought to keep things that way. They attacked suggestions schools reopen as “rooted in sexism, racism and misogyny”.

**The vice president of the Chicago Teacher Union attacked proposals to return to in-person teaching - while on vacation in Puerto Rico! **

Covid lockdowns meant that moms and dads across the country questioned what it is that their children were actually being taught.

**Many government schools in America have clearly been promoting Critical Race Theory, an off shoot of Marxist academic theory.** Often this has been done innocuously, under the banner of promoting equity, diversity or inclusion.

Sometimes the mask slips. **We know, for example, that here in Republican-run Mississippi, our own Department of Education has recommended that teachers use social studies resources calling for the abolition of Christopher Columbus Day and the payment of racial reparations. **

**Despite having a solid Republican majority for over a decade, Mississippi has made little progress towards school choice.**

Our state has a total of nine Charter Schools in the entire state, less than 0.8 percent of the total, and fewer than are to be found in a single suburb of New Orleans. Our school choice program for Special Needs students has hardly grown at all.

Advocates for school choice often make their case with an appeal to a sense of social justice. School choice, they say, would give every American child opportunities that today only rich families have. That isn’t enough.

Nor is writing white papers nobody reads or draft legislation that is never passed.

__**To win, school choice needs to be seen as the antidote to the ‘woke’ takeover of government-run classrooms by the ideological left.**__
---
|
---
_Corey at MCPP event_
| **In Mississippi, many of our elected officials simply don’t see the need for change.** Perhaps it is uncomfortable to acknowledge the extent to which many government schools underperform.

**Here are some facts about government schools in Mississippi that need to be acknowledged:**

* **2 in 3 fourth graders in Mississippi government schools fail to achieve proficiency in reading**. Data shows that only 31 percent of fourth graders were at or above reading proficiency in 2022. (National Assessment of Educational Progress data. [Here’s the link ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=a9370405ef&e=5703353baa)
* **Almost 4 in 10 fourth graders don't even reach the basic reading standard.**
* **2 in 3 fourth graders in Mississippi government schools fail to achieve proficiency in math.** Data shows that only 32 percent were to or above proficiency in 2022. (National Assessment of Educational Progress data)
* **By eighth grade, 8 in 10 were failing to achieve math proficiency in 2022.** (National Assessment of Educational Progress data)
* **Almost one in four Mississippi students – 108,000 individual children - is chronically absent from school.** Data for 2022-23 shows Mississippi public schools have a 23.8 percent chronic absentee rate, far above the national average. (Mississippi Department of Education data). Almost one in four Mississippi students in 2022-23 missed over 10 percent of their schooling and the absentee rate has skyrocketed! (From 70,275 in 2016 – 17 to 108,310 in 2022-23. (Mississippi Department of Education data)

DeAngelis shows us that there are no shortage of vested interests - teacher unions, education bureaucrats, federal officials - determined to do everything they can to keep your kids captive in government-run classrooms.

__**We could overcome those vested interests if we first addressed the anti-school choice Republicans who indulge them.**__

Here the lesson from Texas, as recounted by DeAngelis, might be instructive. Gov Greg Abbot was a “fully-throated champion of universal education savings accounts”. He threw his weight behind change, only to have a dozen or so “Republican” members of the legislature scupper the plan.

**When Texas voters saw those anti-school choice “Republicans” vote to deny them school choice, they made these “Republican” lawmakers ex-lawmakers.** School choice, I suspect, will sail through the Texas legislature in the next session.

No more playing nice.** Either you are a conservative and support school choice, or you aren’t.** It seems that Donald Trump agrees.
---
|
---
| Have a wonderful Memorial Day weekend!
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=3dce992d47&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Warm regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
---
|
---
| | _ _
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013
[Add us to your address book](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/vcard?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://mcpp-c58f.mailchimpsites.com/manage/preferences?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=a14f2afd89) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&t=b&e=5703353baa&c=a14f2afd89).

name: Tim Ballard
subject: I can’t forget their faces
body:
I have helped rescue thousands of children and women from sex traffickers. My story was told in the film "Sound of Freedom." But now, I am being PERSECUTED for fighting the good fight and I need your help.

| | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=c7786688db914399a124a192099e6763&_e=uzdZ5WwiBPK40mAKzBOC9EqUsAHdnNN9cLl-jUxp9xLicDZMAyqDEkk0QLDjJaj-ou6qbE3Lrzjk51dHaGoRqSn5CPRopGyvK10ol2urXouEZMgc2pBoUZufXibM8T3lThNhql7n91JkkU5neAl6m9TxmwoWdtV-zOIXNcicCo0gBLzXBD9INM1nRa1r7IoSiuml9YZPoFXa4KQ0pIBiAS8Dw_3x298UsR3_M0TT6Abp0i8sG-08NlCNI0p6_nEgPjVV2LB7ZvyhsO7qZcjy61DwdeEVRrzJ1CH4huoAtYp6O9nNFjQUVguRNscwKvEVKwv7tMDRxFW0ztbgLz_I6jsn9sKZ-zOykiZMxHiU2N7fbkfxInafG0Vi_qz2T2x1pwnY4WITktpByiT5svTgyVNzDjpt7eiu3s4bmNR5c8byZIsf6yi2Y2_F0OcvnbeX)
---
I see the victims' faces every time I close my eyes. _" Why, Heavenly Father?"_ I ask God each night. **[I have helped rescue thousands of children and women from sex traffickers. My story was told in the film"Sound of Freedom" and I later went on to serve on President Trump's human trafficking advisory board.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=c7786688db914399a124a192099e6763&_e=uzdZ5WwiBPK40mAKzBOC9EqUsAHdnNN9cLl-jUxp9xLicDZMAyqDEkk0QLDjJaj-ou6qbE3Lrzjk51dHaGoRqSn5CPRopGyvK10ol2urXouEZMgc2pBoUZufXibM8T3lThNhql7n91JkkU5neAl6m9TxmwoWdtV-zOIXNcicCo0gBLzXBD9INM1nRa1r7IoSiuml9YZPoFXa4KQ0pIBiAS8Dw_3x298UsR3_M0TT6Abp0i8sG-08NlCNI0p6_nEgPjVV2LB7ZvyhsO7qZcjy61DwdeEVRrzJ1CH4huoAtYrVagDXBCt4t7OQeMnBADrI7l16Q4NTevjGIMjTpZqy5Vk_trlD9FgYHktT2tSyUFjKplCmRWiITDoXHUdKNFUJt3TJH7TTEXSyxH2aZxnB2y-KuihSXaMOWV9Ila7rkP9oFRwN-q7HPs8uEclDiEMT)** It is hard to describe the full picture on the silver screen or even tell the President of the United States in a humane way. What I have witnessed will scar you for life. Going into the lion's den time and time again as an undercover operator is by far the hardest thing I have ever done. **[**But now, I am being PERSECUTED for fighting the good fight and I need your help.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=c7786688db914399a124a192099e6763&_e=uzdZ5WwiBPK40mAKzBOC9EqUsAHdnNN9cLl-jUxp9xLicDZMAyqDEkk0QLDjJaj-ou6qbE3Lrzjk51dHaGoRqSn5CPRopGyvK10ol2urXouEZMgc2pBoUZufXibM8T3lThNhql7n91JkkU5neAl6m9TxmwoWdtV-zOIXNcicCo0gBLzXBD9INM1nRa1r7IoSiuml9YZPoFXa4KQ0pIBiAS8Dw_3x298UsR3_M0TT6Abp0i8sG-08NlCNI0p6_nEgPjVV2LB7ZvyhsO7qZcjy61DwdeEVRrzJ1CH4huoAtYrm_SnI2Qq4I2HYo2mFa2Y5jWffOu2w4W5wyhSTiS7zVPEldGfiykkgCo9n9TtlhIvAB_mrsOsi8UeLIpGnBgobWaXv1SC-U93goPPA5FVw9jdQ0BD1j_hJ1FHlyH6ovm-10WsZT4APgAJ1ajkLrbDL)**
---
[**STAND WITH ME**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=c7786688db914399a124a192099e6763&_e=uzdZ5WwiBPK40mAKzBOC9EqUsAHdnNN9cLl-jUxp9xLicDZMAyqDEkk0QLDjJaj-ou6qbE3Lrzjk51dHaGoRqSn5CPRopGyvK10ol2urXouEZMgc2pBoUZufXibM8T3lThNhql7n91JkkU5neAl6m9TxmwoWdtV-zOIXNcicCo0gBLzXBD9INM1nRa1r7IoSiuml9YZPoFXa4KQ0pIBiAS8Dw_3x298UsR3_M0TT6Abp0i8sG-08NlCNI0p6_nEgPjVV2LB7ZvyhsO7qZcjy61DwdeEVRrzJ1CH4huoAtYpoMioudq9XrQuVgj9kR5U2Ke4ks3gJGlU4qbH6pNrI6sUTxllMyELppg16RRWNSSgSyqeFrYN246TpqNyDRaohd4tCNYrt7QC9xXRGJOMug3y3QLIu_gG4y41BD95x3cmXAagiPDFq3FpvNq3fUznH)
---
This persecution is already taking a toll. Operations to rescue women and children on three different continents have been destroyed. We can't let this go on any longer. It's time to take a stand and finally direct resources toward their highest value. Though I am persecuted, I know I am not alone. God is with me. The truth is with me. _**[**I hope you are with me, too.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=c7786688db914399a124a192099e6763&_e=uzdZ5WwiBPK40mAKzBOC9EqUsAHdnNN9cLl-jUxp9xLicDZMAyqDEkk0QLDjJaj-ou6qbE3Lrzjk51dHaGoRqSn5CPRopGyvK10ol2urXouEZMgc2pBoUZufXibM8T3lThNhql7n91JkkU5neAl6m9TxmwoWdtV-zOIXNcicCo0gBLzXBD9INM1nRa1r7IoSiuml9YZPoFXa4KQ0pIBiAS8Dw_3x298UsR3_M0TT6Abp0i8sG-08NlCNI0p6_nEgPjVV2LB7ZvyhsO7qZcjy61DwdeEVRrzJ1CH4huoAtYoWMlXwLa0m7-qN3Yp3gtUZu5iz7tS6zaWBM93ggMkic0hSEiqrc7FSIsBD4iRKIxLfcP-_sdA4zTLgWR32RrAbqz01P6Xg-mfGc8DiUlyA_HrnlQenVDfBR0B7LuUExmDixmJBeHIQWYZvxgKdoQFL)**_
---
[**STAND WITH ME**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=c7786688db914399a124a192099e6763&_e=uzdZ5WwiBPK40mAKzBOC9EqUsAHdnNN9cLl-jUxp9xLicDZMAyqDEkk0QLDjJaj-ou6qbE3Lrzjk51dHaGoRqSn5CPRopGyvK10ol2urXouEZMgc2pBoUZufXibM8T3lThNhql7n91JkkU5neAl6m9TxmwoWdtV-zOIXNcicCo0gBLzXBD9INM1nRa1r7IoSiuml9YZPoFXa4KQ0pIBiAS8Dw_3x298UsR3_M0TT6Abp0i8sG-08NlCNI0p6_nEgPjVV2LB7ZvyhsO7qZcjy61DwdeEVRrzJ1CH4huoAtYosiyBAe4zE86YPEq2GmLFDIamI6Rk4rRs8fXXh7N1kkYF5lzEV4-NXr6JX_rTDHCbNKcRs_nH6QIjNPvfwM8_ZGAfKUOdqRJNsNUQ4px2GkULPO7AnOjZr7EIfu_K374zoKQaAOsBAAtW8RTJAxBif)

Thank you,

It's time to take a stand and finally direct resources toward their highest value. Though I am persecuted, I know I am not alone. God is with me. The truth is with me. With your help and God's grace, I know we will be victorious. Thank you, - Tim Ballard | | Reclaiming American Freedom PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522

" | Because this design, commissioned by George Washington during the Revolutionary War, deserves to be spread far and wide. And if it triggers the Radical Left, even better. name: Angela Alsobrooks
subject: the GOP is celebrating
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2080b513-8f00-44b3-b21d-9ecc702e2e00/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| | | Peter, I’ve been so overwhelmed by the groundswell of support since we won our primary. Since becoming the Democratic nominee for Senate here in Maryland, we’ve received thousands of grassroots donations from folks who are ready to do whatever it takes to defeat Larry Hogan and keep this seat blue. _But here’s the thing, Peter: **The GOP is celebrating, too**_**.** Hogan is Mitch McConnell’s handpicked candidate for this race, and it’s going to be incredibly difficult to defeat him and the dark money super PACs behind his campaign. [**Whoever capitalizes on this momentum right now will have a huge advantage in the weeks and months ahead, which is why we set a 10,000 General Election Founding Donor Goal. Will you chip in a split donation of $10 between my campaign and Blue Amp Action to make sure we hit it?**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc9b61f38-af8d-4441-8128-dfbf2fe27e25/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [DONATE $10](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdcbff135-7b01-498c-a21b-6dce918afdaf/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | Hogan’s victory is a win for the MAGA agenda, Peter. Mitch McConnell got his guy, and now he sees an opportunity to flip this seat red, retake the Senate, and pass a national abortion ban. _But if we win in November, we’ve got a shot at defending our narrow Senate majority, which means we could restore and expand abortion rights, lower costs for families, and empower workers and unions._ It’s going to take all of the grassroots supporters who got us here — plus we need to bring even more folks into our nationwide coalition of support — to make sure we put Larry Hogan on blast. [**Hitting our 10,000 General Election Founding Donor Goal will give us the boost we need right out of the gate to spread our campaign message and set the record straight on Hogan. Can I count on you to become a Founding Donor right now by splitting a donation between my campaign and Blue Amp Action?**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tae211442-7908-49cb-aa9a-9cb90a230b83/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | | [DONATE](https://default.salsalabs.org/T09d102c3-ab09-4d4b-8707-1c06f1bd7cda/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | All eyes are on Maryland, and with the Senate majority on the line, they will be right up to Election Day. So let’s get to work, Peter. —Angela Alsobrooks [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T184bc2fb-17e1-4cb6-bb98-2365b603d2b8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1463eb47-405d-4284-b928-b99fb9350f35/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can._ | Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC | | or

name: Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.
subject: Why Secret Service Has Been Denied
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
The reason I was denied protection is because Biden knows I can win.

|
---
| | | | [**The reason I was denied protection is because Biden knows I can win.**](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=protectiondenied_5_25_24_nd1rs&n=1)

[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=protectiondenied_5_25_24_nd1rs&n=4)
---
|
---
Dear Peter,
Despite known and repeated threats to me during this campaign, President Biden has denied five requests for Secret Service protection ... Five!
His decision was and is purely political.
Recently released documents reveal that the President decides who gets Secret Service protection via a Presidential Memorandum, despite claims of a formal process.
**My family has given the ultimate sacrifice for our country.**
After my father and my uncle were assassinated, the Secret Service law was changed to include candidates for President (and their families) starting 120 days before an election.
However, numerous candidates in the past, all with fewer threats, have received protection much earlier.
[The reason I was denied protection is because Biden knows I can win.](https://www.kennedy24.com/security-petition?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=protectiondenied_5_25_24_nd1rs&n=5)
---
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=protectiondenied_5_25_24_nd1rs&n=6)
---
With the lowest poll numbers for an incumbent President in history, he will stop at nothing in his quest to remain in power. He’s afraid to let the people decide who should lead our great country.
I will continue my surging campaign despite Biden’s petty and malicious political decision. The future of our great country is too important for me to not be out there fighting for you and your family.
Our country is on the wrong path. As President, I will rebuild our middle class, usher in a strong economy and make us a respected leader on the world stage!
Help me usher in a new, revived America based on the ideals and principles our country was founded on. Together we can and will win.
[To do this, I need your support to fight the petty politics and get our message out. Anything you can afford will help get us in the White House.](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=protectiondenied_5_25_24_nd1rs&n=7)

clean_body: The reason I was denied protection is because Biden knows I can win. | | | | | | | Dear Peter, Despite known and repeated threats to me during this campaign, President Biden has denied five requests for Secret Service protection ... Five! His decision was and is purely political. Recently released documents reveal that the President decides who gets Secret Service protection via a Presidential Memorandum, despite claims of a formal process. My family has given the ultimate sacrifice for our country. After my father and my uncle were assassinated, the Secret Service law was changed to include candidates for President (and their families) starting 120 days before an election. However, numerous candidates in the past, all with fewer threats, have received protection much earlier. With the lowest poll numbers for an incumbent President in history, he will stop at nothing in his quest to remain in power. He’s afraid to let the people decide who should lead our great country. I will continue my surging campaign despite Biden’s petty and malicious political decision. The future of our great country is too important for me to not be out there fighting for you and your family. Our country is on the wrong path. As President, I will rebuild our middle class, usher in a strong economy and make us a respected leader on the world stage! Help me usher in a new, revived America based on the ideals and principles our country was founded on. Together we can and will win. | Thank you for your commitment to our cause and for believing in a different, better future. | | Sincerely, Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. | | | PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY Would you like help donating? Call: tel:8057289443 and you can get help from a campaign staffer.

name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: Explaining a FEC quirk
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=1465%2E135344%2EtOjtbU)

Hi there.
In just a moment, I am going to ask you to make a contribution to my campaign for U.S. Senate in Michigan. But before you do, you deserve to know why this request is so important.
In 6 days, we are going to close the books on our May fundraising drive.
And because of a quirk in official FEC reporting that has to do with the presidential race, ActBlue (the platform we, and most Democratic campaigns, use for our online contributions) is now required to file a MONTHLY report detailing how many contributions they bring in.
Instead of making our numbers public every three months, everything our campaign raises online in May will be public – both the total amount and number of donations. Republicans are NOT required to report every month because their online fundraising platform -- WinRed -- is legally structured differently, and therefore subject to different reporting requirements.
That is a considerable advantage for our opponents. They can see where we are, but we are flying blind when it comes to their numbers until the official FEC deadline ends in June.
Practically, that means our opponents will get a sense of whether or not we are vulnerable to attack spending. If we are, they will launch attack ads against our campaign. If we show a strong report, maybe they'll decide to spend that money elsewhere.
So we have an ambitious internal goal we’re hoping to hit for May in order to showcase the strength of our campaign when ActBlue files their report. Yes, because of the reasons above, but also because the fundraising goals we have are what we need to win.
[**Can you contribute $3 to my Senate campaign today? Our average online donation is around $30. Some give more. Others give less. All that matters is you're donating to help us show a huge number of donations when our online fundraising numbers become public.**](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-may24.waY6cu&refcode=em240525-1-sa&t=2&akid=1465%2E135344%2EtOjtbU)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/127?c0=ebs-em-may24.Kwvt95&amount=3&refcode=em240525-1-sa&t=21&akid=1465%2E135344%2EtOjtbU)**

Elissa

Friend, I'm running to defeat Rick Scott — and the results of this election could determine which party controls the Senate. Here's what you need to know about my race:
**_First,_** election analysts from _The New York Times , FiveThirtyEight_, and _Roll Call_ ranked Rick Scott as one of the most vulnerable senators on the ballot this fall.
**_Then_****,** a new poll showed that the experts were right — this race is already a statistical tie! Floridians are sick and tired of Rick Scott threatening to take away their rights, raising their costs, and trying to end the Social Security and Medicare benefits they’ve worked hard for.
**_Now,_** with grassroots momentum on our side, experts are calling this race Democrats' best chance to expand the Senate majority and stop Rick Scott, who's officially running for Senate Republican leader, from taking power.
If we fall short here, it'll be a massive setback. **And Rick Scott, Mitch McConnell, and all their megadonors will undoubtedly weaponize that setback against me.**

So this is our last ditch effort to get at least 47 more committed memberships — **I’m extending the deadline to renew to MIDNIGHT TONIGHT.**

name: Angela Alsobrooks
subject: “an emotional issue for women”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alsobrooks for Senate
body:
|
---
[ ](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/2092?t=1&akid=1722%2E52803%2E9htfL2)

| | Republican Larry Hogan wants you to believe he’s changed his tune on issues like abortion access, Peter, but I’m just going to call it like I see it: _Hogan has a dangerous anti-choice record, and now he’s trying to run away from it._ In fact, he’s so upset about being called out that he’s belittled the issue and called it an “ _emotional issue for women_.” That is a dangerous oversimplification, Peter, and one I personally take issue with. **[Unlike Larry Hogan, I’ll always support reproductive freedom, and I’ll fight for safe, legal, and accessible abortion for everyone. Will you join me in rejecting Hogan and the GOP’s anti-choice agenda by making a grassroots donation to my campaign today?](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/25453?t=11&amount=25&akid=1722%2E52803%2E9htfL2)** | | | [Support Abortion Access](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/25453?t=12&amount=25&akid=1722%2E52803%2E9htfL2)
---
Abortion access isn’t an “emotional issue for women” — it’s a matter of bodily autonomy, and our freedom to choose how, when and if we start families.
It impacts everyone, and Marylanders have repeatedly stated that this is a proud, pro-choice state where we trust women to make their own medical decisions.
_But Larry Hogan and the GOP have a proven track record of not trusting women._
If Hogan is tasked with casting the deciding vote in the Senate on passing an abortion ban, just remember what he did as governor:
**He vetoed legislation that would have expanded access to abortion care for thousands of Marylanders.**
**[Larry Hogan cannot be trusted, and we need to defeat him in order to defend our narrow Senate majority and hold the line against a national abortion ban. Can I count on you to chip in $25 right away and have my back in the fight ahead?](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/25453?t=13&amount=25&akid=1722%2E52803%2E9htfL2)**
_If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately._

subject: Obama’s meddling in our election
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hovde for Wisconsin
body:
Barack Obama and DC Democrats know that they HAVE to win Wisconsin in order to keep both the presidency and the Senate | [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=fc9053a2263b4e22b02481f974457ee1&_e=OYlMy7iId4sInuX-CGn4NYc4xWqLt4l6SPrSoZbsdJuTp2Prh6X2cdxYeMpAhUyOq4A0qJWFCSIw7ZVSLwyYKee5cLfKlAdK96v3KWBn6Y_EANInWpvWlMq1tvGDkHnJup0Ri-Es-4B7pjPQuex6yGPftIdSKF4pS83Wa6ajtywnsLYCT75YtL_K7Cs7s0dNbVMhpY_ktU2KSAqGFIyi49D1yH0iNvWfKnVCiFuQVs732li1-eGcccfbnXoLa7LSSFL8EIJ5eozI31JXa6E0a-bZb0VMGDHIlqhlM9QW9gsPHFaqkqrb7BPsmsV6sK6GG1rd0pzCni1Rxni1CMpA_2GHpbos4ROJlsnlBYQD1ZDci1Xv7EXPLdH8E9X6S2jpbr6V5lfCUHUhoUZY-jR2yQ%3D%3D)

---
Peter,

**Barack Obama** is meddling in our election, holding a fundraiser with elite Leftist megadonors targeting the top battleground Senate races in the Country.

body:

| | We're just 10 days away from Primary Day! We've come so far since we launched our campaign, and now our team is fired up and ready to win. We've come so far since we launched our campaign, and now our team is fired up and ready to win. = We're building a campaign that brings in people from across our state. We need to show that we're bringing a different kind of politics to New Jersey, and we can do that now by showing that grassroots power is what drives Democratic politics in our state. I'm running because New Jersey voters deserve better. As a dad, I've fought to lower healthcare costs, stand up to the gun lobby, and deliver resources to combat climate change. As a public servant, I've stood up to corruption and big money in politics, working to put New Jersey's working families before special interests. As the son of immigrants, I've worked to bring a new kind of politics to New Jersey; putting the voices of everyday people first and ensuring that everyone has an opportunity to achieve the American Dream. subject: Can you help my father in Texas?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate\*\*
body:
Ted is a proven America First warrior who FIGHTS for our MAGA values in the U.S. Senate. Read more >>>

Friend,

Donald Trump, Jr. here – As you know, my father is under attack from the Biden White House and numerous absolutely unhinged persons using and abusing the American legal system to try and take him down.

We also have Biden and the Democrats spending millions on ads falsely smearing us all and working to register as many far-left voters as possible before November.

\*\*But\*\*\*\* we have another huge problem \*\*\*\*you haven’t heard about. We have an extremely close Senate race in Texas, and\*\*\*\* Senator Ted Cruz needs urgent help \*\*\*\*. We saw\*\*\*\* Chuck Schumer \*\*\*\*boasting just this week that the Democrats will win Texas and keep the U.S. Senate... \*\*

We can’t let that happen. If the Democrats take Texas, they’ll keep the Senate and use senatorial power to stop the MAGA movement and block everything my father wants to accomplish- _including a full investigation of the Washington Swamp!_

Ted Cruz is a proven America First warrior, and we need him in the Senate fighting for us all.

\*\*I urge you to chip in a donation to help him KEEP TEXAS RED for me and my father! ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=7994119.3476.1.f83f0c19707db8653e5bacb5708baf84 )\*\*

\*\*CHIP IN $10 TO KEEP TEXAS RED\*\* ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=7994119.3477.1.7aa33e52490aa5e3a49cb6e1c68c05dd )

\*\*CHIP IN $100 TO KEEP TEXAS RED\*\* ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=7994119.3480.1.8218491c5a374349e0c5249d1d8dc233 )

As I said, Texas is a TOP TARGET for Democrats in 2024. They know the path to victory runs through the Lone Star State. And they’re pumping an estimated $100 million into Texas to beat Cruz and hold the Senate for the radical left.

I’m calling on MAGA patriots like YOU to FIGHT BACK with a generous contribution today!

\*\*Make no mistake – Ted Cruz will work non-stop alongside the Trump White House to BUILD THE WALL, DRAIN THE SWAMP, and MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN. \*\*

So don’t wait, friend. Rush in your best gift to send Ted Cruz back to the Senate and save Texas from the Democrats!

_Thanks in advance for pitching in your powerful support today! _

-Donald Trump, Jr.

name: Zach  Wome  Womer
subject: An Update from Your Future Congressman
body:
Read my newsletter to find out what’s been going on in Wome’s World. | | | | [](https://engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=6652217e8f55d4294ddd23fb&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.womeforpa.com%2F%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D66520a5a029dbe6f8c619e75%26ss_email_id%3D6652217e8f55d4294ddd23fb%26ss_campaign_name%3DAn%2BUpdate%2Bfrom%2BYour%2BFuture%2BCongressman%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2024-05-25T17%253A36%253A00Z&w=65ad891098dad57e3b02d3b2&c=b_66520a5a029dbe6f8c619e75&l=en-US&s=psATSfviPiVUXSc3h4RJsUH1V6A%3D) | **Campaign Update**
---|---
|
#### **Thank you for your Support!**
---
## **An Update from Wome’s World**
---
We have been hard at work to flip Pennsylvania’s 15th Congressional District.
---
---
---
| | | It’s been a while since my last newsletter because I just completed my spring semester at Penn State Law School. Now that school is out of the way I can commit all my time to work on campaigning for the working families of central Pennsylvania.
---
| | | | | This past Sunday I attended the Lycoming County Democrats Spring Banquet alongside our statewide candidates. |
---|---|---
| | | | Additionally, I spoke at the Centre County Democrat’s Spring Breakfast a few weeks back. |
---|---|---
| | | | | We have also gotten our second shipment of campaign buttons, if you’d like some just shoot me an email at womeforpa@gmail.com |
---|---|---
---
| | Our first round of yard signs will be coming in next Friday, if you would like one please reach out via email.
---
If you haven’t seen my speech from Warren County you can watch it on my youtube channel by clicking [here](https://engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=6652217e8f55d4294ddd23fb&u=https%3A%2F%2Fyoutu.be%2FzDZB5zJkJPI%3Fsi%3DDBcYaOUoA-I_PiKe&w=65ad891098dad57e3b02d3b2&c=b_66520a5a029dbe6f8c619e75&l=en-US&s=5fsWnAcaDQu3zg7AF3vfg2RDBVw%3D).
---
---
| | | Next Friday, May 31st and Saturday June 1st, I will be in Allentown, PA to attend the Pennsylvania Democratic State Committe with the hopes of making more connections that will help the campaign.
---
---
| | | |
---|---|---
| | | |
---|---|---
In addition to the buttons and signs as campaign materials, we will be releasing campaign T-shirts and sweatshirts featuring the above branding in the next few weeks, if you’re interested in campaign apparel, please contact me via email.
---
This past week in response to a Federal Rule effectively ending the use of thermal coal plants, I wrote an article criticizing President Biden for putting coal miners in our community out of work without plans for alternative employment for those miners and their families, which can be read [here](https://engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=6652217e8f55d4294ddd23fb&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.washingtonexaminer.com%2Frestoring-america%2Ffaith-freedom-self-reliance%2F3014800%2Fcoal-country-democrat-running-congress-party-wrongly-abandoned-us%2F&w=65ad891098dad57e3b02d3b2&c=b_66520a5a029dbe6f8c619e75&l=en-US&s=aTDxp0mSczNCHjhzSBYFK2fJAiI%3D). While I’m aware that some may be perturbed by my criticism, I wan’t to explain that my largest commitment in politics is not to the President, nor my political party, but to my community. My family lineage is that of coal miners, and my very first endorsement was from the United Mine Workers of America who back my statement. I feel quite strongly that it is important that we criticize all wrongdoing, not just that of our opposing party. I continue to support President Biden’s re-election, we just disagree on this Federal Rule.
---
If you or anyone you know is interested in helping out the campaign, please email womeforpa@gmail.com. Also, please encourage anyone you know to sign up for this newsletter so they can stay engaged with the campaign!
---
---
### **Donate to my campaign!**
---

clean_body: Read my newsletter to find out what’s been going on in Wome’s World. | | | | | Campaign Update ---|--- | Thank you for your Support! An Update from Wome’s World We have been hard at work to flip Pennsylvania’s 15th Congressional District. | | | It’s been a while since my last newsletter because I just completed my spring semester at Penn State Law School. Now that school is out of the way I can commit all my time to work on campaigning for the working families of central Pennsylvania. | | | | | This past Sunday I attended the Lycoming County Democrats Spring Banquet alongside our statewide candidates. | ---|---|--- | | | | Additionally, I spoke at the Centre County Democrat’s Spring Breakfast a few weeks back. | ---|---|--- | | | | | We have also gotten our second shipment of campaign buttons, if you’d like some just shoot me an email at womeforpa@gmail.com | ---|---|--- | | Our first round of yard signs will be coming in next Friday, if you would like one please reach out via email. If you haven’t seen my speech from Warren County you can watch it on my youtube channel by clicking . | | | Next Friday, May 31st and Saturday June 1st, I will be in Allentown, PA to attend the Pennsylvania Democratic State Committe with the hopes of making more connections that will help the campaign. | | | | ---|---|--- | | | | ---|---|--- In addition to the buttons and signs as campaign materials, we will be releasing campaign T-shirts and sweatshirts featuring the above branding in the next few weeks, if you’re interested in campaign apparel, please contact me via email. This past week in response to a Federal Rule effectively ending the use of thermal coal plants, I wrote an article criticizing President Biden for putting coal miners in our community out of work without plans for alternative employment for those miners and their families, which can be read . While I’m aware that some may be perturbed by my criticism, I wan’t to explain that my largest commitment in politics is not to the President, nor my political party, but to my community. My family lineage is that of coal miners, and my very first endorsement was from the United Mine Workers of America who back my statement. I feel quite strongly that it is important that we criticize all wrongdoing, not just that of our opposing party. I continue to support President Biden’s re-election, we just disagree on this Federal Rule. If you or anyone you know is interested in helping out the campaign, please email womeforpa@gmail.com. Also, please encourage anyone you know to sign up for this newsletter so they can stay engaged with the campaign! Donate to my campaign! | Wome for PA, 421 N 9th St, Philipsburg, PA 16866, United States Powered by

| Youngkin Sets New Virginia Veto Record!
---
|
---
| Virginia made the right call electing Republican Governor Glenn Youngkin. With divided Government you don't get everything you want, but Governor Youngkin and fellow Republicans are working hard to get you the best results. This year we defeated all 2.6 billion dollars in tax and fee increases. Governor Youngkin held the line for us this session by vetoing a record 201 out of the 1,046 bills. History should be taught not erased. Thankfully he vetoed a bill that would have eliminated tax breaks for the United Daughters of the Confederacy, and another bill that would have eliminated state-issued license plates that celebrate Robert E. Lee. Governor Youngkin also vetoed 32 anti-gun bills!
With your your help, I was able to pass several bills that protect life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness. This year I also received a Policy Maker of the Year Award and an Industrial Strength Leader Award. My plan is to continue getting results like this for you and more while helping President Trump pass his America First Agenda in D.C. as your next 5th Congressional District Congressman!

clean_body: | | | | | | == | == | Memorial Day 2024 | | This Memorial Day Weekend we Honor and Remember Our Fallen. I've been to too many funerals for my brothers I served with. But we understand freedom isn't free. We must never forget those who gave their all for us. God bless you and God bless America! | Please Ask Friends to: Vote John McGuire for Congress VA 05 by June 18 | "Yuge" Trump Rally New York Bronx Speech == | | Friends, We are having a lot of fun on the campaign trail shaking hands and listening to your concerns. Keep it positive and keep your foot on the gas. We have just 24 days to go! My opponent and his cronies call people a liar like a machine gun. Despite their many negative attacks, Team McGuire is leading in the polls and our momentum is growing. Just in case you know anyone who might believe Bob Good's desperate attack ads, here are some receipts to prove he is being dishonest. | == == ==. == ==. McGuire Breitbart == Interview Click Here. How Else is Bob Good Deceiving Us? | Thank You to Our WW 2 Veterans | | It is becoming more and more rare to meet a World War II veteran in person. There are many reasons why they call them the Greatest Generation. We would not have a country without our men and women in the military. Thank you! | Youngkin Sets New Virginia Veto Record! | | Virginia made the right call electing Republican Governor Glenn Youngkin. With divided Government you don't get everything you want, but Governor Youngkin and fellow Republicans are working hard to get you the best results. This year we defeated all 2.6 billion dollars in tax and fee increases. Governor Youngkin held the line for us this session by vetoing a record 201 out of the 1,046 bills. History should be taught not erased. Thankfully he vetoed a bill that would have eliminated tax breaks for the United Daughters of the Confederacy, and another bill that would have eliminated state-issued license plates that celebrate Robert E. Lee. Governor Youngkin also vetoed 32 anti-gun bills! With your your help, I was able to pass several bills that protect life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness. This year I also received a Policy Maker of the Year Award and an Industrial Strength Leader Award. My plan is to continue getting results like this for you and more while helping President Trump pass his America First Agenda in D.C. as your next 5th Congressional District Congressman! | Join Team McGuire for Congress! | If you would like to volunteer, make phone calls, and help with the McGuire campaign efforts in Virginia for Congress please contact the McGuire Team Campaign Manager Teemu Garrity at 248 303 9747 or email him at teemu@mcguireforva.com With your help we will win and help Trump pass the America First agenda so we can Save America! McGuire Poll Numbers:== The following is some of what I have been up to around the district! | We The People! | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | RIP my friend Randy Reynolds Sr. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | I flew to New York to support Trump at the trial. Thank you to the Trump Team for the invitation! | This is the same escalator in Trump came down when he announced his bid for President of the United States! | Inside Trump Tower - America! | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Delegate Buddy Fowler and Sheriff John Jones | ULTRA MAGA! | | | | | | | | | | Your copy should address 3 key questions: Who am I writing for? (Audience) Why should they care? (Benefit) What do I want them to do here? (Call-to-Action) Create a great offer by adding words like "free" "personalized" "complimentary" or "customized." A sense of urgency often helps readers take an action, so think about inserting phrases like "for a limited time only" or "only 7 remaining!" | | New Ad | == | == | Vote Jean Gannon June 1 For National Committewoman | | Current leadership has failed us and is working against Trump. It's time for a change and Jean Gannon will take us in the right direction. Vote for Jean as your Republican National Committeewoman on June 1, 2024 at the Hampton Convention Center. Visit www.Jeangannon.com for more info. | == | == | He Lost Our Support | | My opponent told us he supported Trump, but he did not. He lost my support and the support of the district when he betrayed Trump when the chips were down in May 2023, when we found out he disrespects his constituents, and when he worked with the democrat team to embarrass us and take out the republican team. Bob spent months trashing President Trump around the district and got caught lying about it live on CNN. Everyone knows Trump cannot trust Bob and neither can we. I am answering the call. We can do better than Good. | We need leaders who will help Trump Save America instead of stab Trump in the back. == | Please vote John McGuire by June 18. == Washington D.C. did not recruit me for Congress, constituents who voted for me for Senate and others tired of Good's bad behavior recruited me for Congress. We can do better than Good! == ==. == ==. | | | | For God and Country, Senator John McGuire Soli Deo Gloria Republican for Congress Jesus is my Savior Husband Father Navy SEAL == Pro-Life == Pro-Gun (==) Pro-Israel (==) American Legion Member VFW (Life Member) NRA (Life Member) Highest Award for Conservatism (ACU/ CPAC) Family Foundation 100 VCDL 100 (Life Member) == The Spirit of Virginia == == our Facebook Page Twitter: @JohnMcGuire4VA Instagram: JohnMcGuire4VA == == john@mcguireva.com www.mcguireva.com | | | == | == | == | == == == | Delegate Buddy Fowler and Sheriff John Jones | Paid for and Authorized by McGuire for Virginia | | McGuire for Virginia | PO Box 242, Manakin Sabot, VA 23103 | | Sent by mailto:john@mcguireva.com powered by

| | | Peter, [](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=df853ccc295c43ab9630c4b0550a63a8&_e=wjBkrr-5xgv5oMWcjD8o0va7GIaYQE4lQYlAXCZCrUxxHBN0UVex8bkj-BDKrczCBLYS74ILjghD3js5X8ljuPTQtiMqbptZiBZOKP8OCeUGPbSypNAQFys8X-ozeK8AV2B1WvNNA6x75okdKj421gXAEd-ecB0u6qQsCfsjVK0j54t--wMWjC55cGCxsd0fTQCXXZC-y62uXSOyGS06G8yO2BALEZtnjhuQoqx9EW1c3qip43HO7nZ_Q1gg1v3wskcnpDYO7wGG6PO85Dhp0rz_BoSYkPdPi1pvmDuMWsuEwom3DqI4G211SXy-H8rdrhlajbuBuzHVQ5vaVsHqclXYoclJ5brQf9WTye3b2ru0Y-QDwJPkO9kcBOwzHSWs) It’s John from Team Cao. **I****’****m going to get right to the point - Hung and I need your help to meet our pre-primary goal or we****’****re going to start to have to make some difficult decisions about this campaign.** I know it feels sometimes like your money is going into a black box, but trust me when I say we’re using every single dollar to get Hung’s message out. Whether it’s responding to Tim Kaine’s attacks, getting ads on TV, or reaching out to Virginians across our commonwealth, campaigns are expensive - especially ones where our opponent is one of the most well-connected career politicians in DC. This election will come down to whether or not we’re able to meet our grassroots fundraising goals. They’re the only way we can ensure we can keep up with Tim Kaine’s millions. [**With the primary around the corner, EVERYTHING is coming down to this moment. Hung is the ONLY candidate who can win in the general, and right now he****’****s counting on us. Whether you can give $5 or $50, every single contribution counts. Can you pitch in now?**](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=df853ccc295c43ab9630c4b0550a63a8&_e=wjBkrr-5xgv5oMWcjD8o0va7GIaYQE4lQYlAXCZCrUxxHBN0UVex8bkj-BDKrczCgRBLgs-fJVD3-N7jhalh84N6-iKfg-ojQ5091AYtTbw0YpflitwAlTL0Mdt6wrNUnmIEE8kV5XQLAvMv6a3S4-0pNt6fRJOypva4bgNOTg9fWChh6J4ZDKuhKYxSc3CClsCiIDCOJW_C7PhpPC2uKuU4dMXq2QdjlyOrmCRGrVOMVYVr8ZpsxQArn-8iBum3Uk0fEbkSJg0Wn9gqjb1kgLQVxAp1RF-F7fRz94U3JoHyrwa-N9Xo_rqZrtcVNkJwZ6NiPOfMK3pp-RvXZ3xu94XxVC8id3yGX3qTJsOOKedvBL_HuX80PJsHLmNx6C6k)

name: Sam Brown
subject: This is a disaster
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sam Brown for Nevada
body:
Had to write this to you as soon as I saw the numbers.| | | [](http://links.myfreedomnews.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=335d8784ab1346c4a565c332fa970a1e&_e=KtESDngF2vOcqhPe3AyLK1GGPbvE11eRt1oHy5yFDbZx7-zGzsuXniG7VvHa1fj0LBsB2myBydlK0zpcrC_A0PGfigGFTVC6YqOHeNCdeu2n8_D2igAI4KUnemStcUSyK36e45utgTOOogAO7NzUlNTkZMI_1DXMMDPurkSunz_LQhj_EKsNoUPgdnSskAYjI3tsFWTmNhkjz5kq_wU_L3jj9TP89G7WWYKPFrSNPFZY-NVkB8Qpl2avjmpR-uPV1RiMfPUbvpaZiHTIqfozYrXWJWa_ti4zeKkBQ70UsNnkTglHqn0cJBjxgszAkqmYq9GS0gfaZ-sU0ouqctxQLZCIyROpsb35ETYzVuBMcsgrrmyrdC5yyoZ8wUiL0Vi3QfzweX-td2Lo22GTvEne9EPJ3zLo8T4KSy8yrBgdh8jmVBnEW4HIIDdbP7OjgJH6w41nCaCqak-dfh4UI1qrRw%3D%3D)
---

---
Friend, they want us to give up and shut down our entire operation.

Ever since the day I made a firm decision, after constant prayer and discussion with my family, about entering this Senate race, I have given everything I can. **[But I can’t keep this going without you, Friend.](http://links.myfreedomnews.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=335d8784ab1346c4a565c332fa970a1e&_e=KtESDngF2vOcqhPe3AyLK1GGPbvE11eRt1oHy5yFDbZx7-zGzsuXniG7VvHa1fj0LBsB2myBydlK0zpcrC_A0PGfigGFTVC6YqOHeNCdeu2n8_D2igAI4KUnemStcUSyK36e45utgTOOogAO7NzUlNTkZMI_1DXMMDPurkSunz_LQhj_EKsNoUPgdnSskAYjI3tsFWTmNhkjz5kq_wU_L3jj9TP89G7WWYKPFrSNPFZY-NVkB8Qpl2avjmpR-uPV1RiMfPUbvpaZiHTIqfozYrXWJWa_ti4zeKkBQ70UsNnkTglHqn0cJBjxgszAkqmYzxMMbe14BhFV3HGN87FdUKghah1oafyb_Edj_J-aH8p0J1qkIcXv5rouRvAYko8LZ6jlUsSkH2s6qHHdebrYW8T-uB2Nbay-5kzRzNN2g6MiSrXfo3gr0oxi-7ohknSq5Ttx6rt46SkdlDerKdb4yg%3D%3D)**

I was ecstatic that patriots across the country were coming together to take back Nevada and with it, take back the Senate.

But my radical left wing opponent, Sen. Jacky Rosen's numbers show that the radical left has no plans of backing down anytime soon.

The DSCC is on a mission to shut me down completely. **[That is, unless we can take a stand and continue our momentum this month.](http://links.myfreedomnews.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=335d8784ab1346c4a565c332fa970a1e&_e=KtESDngF2vOcqhPe3AyLK1GGPbvE11eRt1oHy5yFDbZx7-zGzsuXniG7VvHa1fj0LBsB2myBydlK0zpcrC_A0PGfigGFTVC6YqOHeNCdeu2n8_D2igAI4KUnemStcUSyK36e45utgTOOogAO7NzUlNTkZMI_1DXMMDPurkSunz_LQhj_EKsNoUPgdnSskAYjI3tsFWTmNhkjz5kq_wU_L3jj9TP89G7WWYKPFrSNPFZY-NVkB8Qpl2avjmpR-uPV1RiMfPUbvpaZiHTIqfozYrXWJWa_ti4zeKkBQ70UsNnkTglHqn0cJBjxgszAkqmYUAOZstx63YZ7ZK4MDSdmWChOEQ4OjMLcRH0clHqe7W-UV_2ODZSPD665PukiED-fsBJw4vr2b_iMNEhr_Z13TX3iB0Qi5DEqsduzvvci-VYLvPa2FduTvyTUHKtCxsXjOIm2XE70SbDotmOWBHb2ow%3D%3D)**

Because they know that unlike Jacky Rosen, I won’t be a puppet for the Washington swamp.

**[I’ll be a voice for the people of Nevada and for YOU. ](http://links.myfreedomnews.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=335d8784ab1346c4a565c332fa970a1e&_e=KtESDngF2vOcqhPe3AyLK1GGPbvE11eRt1oHy5yFDbZx7-zGzsuXniG7VvHa1fj0LBsB2myBydlK0zpcrC_A0PGfigGFTVC6YqOHeNCdeu2n8_D2igAI4KUnemStcUSyK36e45utgTOOogAO7NzUlNTkZMI_1DXMMDPurkSunz_LQhj_EKsNoUPgdnSskAYjI3tsFWTmNhkjz5kq_wU_L3jj9TP89G7WWYKPFrSNPFZY-NVkB8Qpl2avjmpR-uPV1RiMfPUbvpaZiHTIqfozYrXWJWa_ti4zeKkBQ70UsNnkTglHqn0cJBjxgszAkqmY4L-YjwVR4k8zzwKJGB8E3t6h-byg3hIVdC_9DXP48Zu8SFxpcNVWuPfzF-r2lNcqKMRfeTlE5EQL-KqmhdSJFInqbqpc4AfKvEHZVcQD8SRWYBY4CBOL55m1pBebwFfNyxu9DbdEHE7vzPcegOvuNQ%3D%3D)**
Friend, the biggest SECRET of my campaign is that with your support we will always have the edge.

**[As much as I hate to ask, would you consider chipping in today to keep my fight going?](http://links.myfreedomnews.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=335d8784ab1346c4a565c332fa970a1e&_e=KtESDngF2vOcqhPe3AyLK1GGPbvE11eRt1oHy5yFDbZx7-zGzsuXniG7VvHa1fj0LBsB2myBydlK0zpcrC_A0PGfigGFTVC6YqOHeNCdeu2n8_D2igAI4KUnemStcUSyK36e45utgTOOogAO7NzUlNTkZMI_1DXMMDPurkSunz_LQhj_EKsNoUPgdnSskAYjI3tsFWTmNhkjz5kq_wU_L3jj9TP89G7WWYKPFrSNPFZY-NVkB8Qpl2avjmpR-uPV1RiMfPUbvpaZiHTIqfozYrXWJWa_ti4zeKkBQ70UsNnkTglHqn0cJBjxgszAkqmYuhp3hdYbOWL-cBYyTvVoP_7xgza4xh1l_mrAIx1ekvAx_ZabNkyub5eqqkyeP7SXRL2tH6Q76fJT2Djy6wU4pM_-ZK7MtV-qO5M2rO_3rPTyqtBljkD0c95JJv43CFrW6qFeIOKEAXOjMaA79Gg4zg%3D%3D)**
Thank you for your dedication.

Sincerely,

CPT Sam Brown

body:
Whether you can give $5 or another amount, it’s going to add up fast if enough people join you.

We know it’s Saturday.

But please — don’t close this email just yet. We’ll keep this short.
We’re writing to humbly ask if you can make your first donation to Ruben’s campaign today.
We’ve made good progress towards our goal over the last few days, but we’re still tracking behind. If you could make your first donation online today, we can catch up and hit our goal. It’d be an absolutely HUGE help.
Whether you can give $5 or another amount, it’s going to add up fast if enough people join you. Several others have already chipped in, and they’re hoping you’ll do the same.
That’s how we’ll defeat Kari Lake and help Ruben hold control of the U.S. Senate.

name: BobCasey.com
subject: Bob Casey vs. David McCormick
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=3069%2E552475%2EzZAH3m)
Peter,
We wanted to take a moment to thank you for your support. Without you, our campaign would not be what it is today.
We’re building a team of people from all walks of life in PA, with the support of grassroots donors from all over, and it’s proof that Bob Casey has and will continue to fight for working Pennsylvania families. Meanwhile, David McCormick is relying on the backing of billionaires and the worst of the GOP who focus on very little beyond their own interests.
At the end of the day, we have to ask, **whose side are you on?**
This November, Pennsylvanians will choose between an honest and reliable leader fighting for progress and a Connecticut mega-millionaire who will do and say anything to help his bottom line.
We know whose side we’re on. Bob Casey is right for our Commonwealth, and his experience as a public servant has proven time and time again that he will always stand up for all Pennsylvanians in the U.S. Senate. **However, this isn’t a fight we can win alone.**
[**Together, we can step up by taking action to support our campaign. Will you chip in $5 or whatever you can to step up and show that we’re all in for Bob Casey?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240525-1?recurring=1&refcode=em20240525-1&refcode2=3069_552475_zZAH3m&akid=3069%2E552475%2EzZAH3m)
