body:
We need to be prepared to fight back with everything we’ve got against the flood of outside money pouring into NY-17.
Folks,

My team and I just set an ambitious **$25,000** end-of-month fundraising goal. In just a moment, I’m going to explain why it’s so crucial we don’t fall short—but if you’re already on board, you can **[donate here to help us reach our goal →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85601311/475314694/132774807?refcode=em24_240525_eom1_fnd_gq_act___mj_ettx&utm_campaign=em24_240525_eom1_fnd_gq_act___mj_ettx&utm_medium=email&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=&refcode2=37c5d71b-9f1a-ef11-86d0-6045bdd9e096&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzN2M1ZDcxYi05ZjFhLWVmMTEtODZkMC02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hMk0Jmx8U9d7OgJEsFBjk6VEvU9vdiCvkeFbdU84MLg=)**

clean_body: We need to be prepared to fight back with everything we’ve got against the flood of outside money pouring into NY-17. Folks, My team and I just set an ambitious $25,000 end-of-month fundraising goal. In just a moment, I’m going to explain why it’s so crucial we don’t fall short—but if you’re already on board, you can = Look, it’s clear that NY-17 will determine which party holds the House majority. Election experts are calling our race a “toss-up,” so we can’t afford to leave anything to chance. Especially when we know Mike Lawler and his MAGA Republican allies will do (and spend) anything to win this November. We need to be prepared to fight back with everything we’ve got against the flood of outside money that will pour into NY-17. Falling short of our goal simply isn’t an option: We must have the resources to compete and ensure our message reaches every voter in the Lower Hudson Valley. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- Yours in the fight, Mondaire Jones Mondaire Jones is running for Congress to finish the work he started last term. He's ready to fight to lower costs for residents of the Hudson Valley, defend our democracy, raise wages, and protect reproductive rights for all. And he's doing it without a penny from corporate PACs. = = **= ** PAID FOR BY MONDAIRE FOR CONGRESS P.O. BOX #873, SLEEPY HOLLOW, NY 10591

These tees, tanks, hoodies, and stickers make a bold statement — and it couldn’t be more critical.
Right-wing lawmakers have recently introduced record numbers of anti-LGBTQ legislation. Their hateful agenda is unpopular, but gerrymandering shields them from democratic accountability. So when we fight for fair maps, we fight for equality. And every purchase helps fund our fight.
**We need to boldly show the resilience of queer existence and come together to say we’ll slay partisan gerrymandering once and for all this Pride season.**
[**Click here to shop our 2024 Pride Collection today to get your new gear in time for your local parades and marches — or just for your everyday existence!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/85601639/475315074/1787122801?refcode=don_ndrc_trddnrs_email_mayfun_email_20240525-NDRC-Red-PrideMerch_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20240525-NDRC-Red-PrideMerch_&utm_campaign=mayfun&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJhYzVkNzFiLTlmMWEtZWYxMS04NmQwLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Jsrm7HPt9q8eqH59hghSVrcKobcjsAPiFYnsX2GyunE=&emci=8081a5c4-2e19-ef11-86d0-6045bdd9e096&emdi=2ac5d71b-9f1a-ef11-86d0-6045bdd9e096&ceid=8431045)

name: Freedom First Project
subject: Democrats Trying To Ban Most Popular Handgun And Body Armor

wondering if you could contribute by the end of the month

Hi Derek — I’m
hoping you can pitch in
$10 or any
amount before my end-of-month fundraising deadline.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2907?c0=may2024_abs_em.WQbX9u&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC90_20240525_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1005&akid=6541%2E5257348%2ExD1QtH ]DONATE

We’re less than 6 months away from the November election and the stakes
could not be higher.

Donald Trump and MAGA extremists like Mike Johnson, Steve Garvey, Ted
Cruz, and more have wasted no time in attacking me. I can only expect that
the attacks will increase the closer we get to the election.

That’s why we must build a grassroots movement powerful enough to respond
to the relentless attacks we are facing from the far right and prove we’ve
got what it takes to handle anything that comes our way.

And every dollar we raise will help me have the resources to turn out
voters in the final stretch before the November election.

| | Peter – Americans should **NOT** be spied on by their own government. I’ve said it before, and I’ll say it again...
---
[](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=87044c6368904cc78321159a14375d84&_e=fEzjv-x_Ccru6mtvjP6kPivfwmPR3TfVlf2pLpP-vlUz3bPrPTHcPoVHcz_nTrjOiFsPLX2c3tcS8kfdwjPMj_PR5YNFVDqY5LD4rjc0R9XGzPjwTOnzP1tFqCHd8NUN0d00N5yLm8F-Ai2gly4Te4y9FJN6PeK8YOj-7EarXov65GaUqAgi-U6xLQ_-C76P03JkEjmdpgpn6oaVHxnceTxTFWpCcWgrQTopEagQ5-3jToROJCx1DivdJxoCU95fMgvkd46CyzjVeICEGmvTK43zRidVOEdT8c_LgUJLQJkfLHSYnNnXZ8U7tLT1H4JsvcaCDeNZDrJCP1AwAdIkEQELstMBhNtmAyIPMd_3eFZ-Fdsc4C6gW_ycC9xAwla8M29PRZewxSQukosNPwCGRbsZdx24V0LBfNMMZjV_q20%3D)
---
Our Founding Fathers put the 4th Amendment in place to protect us from a tyrannical government – and FISA is a blatant 4th Amendment violation. **_[**_I AGREE >>_**](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=87044c6368904cc78321159a14375d84&_e=fEzjv-x_Ccru6mtvjP6kPivfwmPR3TfVlf2pLpP-vlUz3bPrPTHcPoVHcz_nTrjOiFsPLX2c3tcS8kfdwjPMj_PR5YNFVDqY5LD4rjc0R9XGzPjwTOnzP1tFqCHd8NUN0d00N5yLm8F-Ai2gly4Te4y9FJN6PeK8YOj-7EarXov65GaUqAgi-U6xLQ_-C76P03JkEjmdpgpn6oaVHxnceTxTFWpCcWgrQTopEagQ5-3jToROJCx1DivdJxoCU95fMgvkd46CyzjVeICEGmvTK9xQ4cqeq660udmjdtXsOBcBAebWvU8NqA5Y5CpoOqb_33j6N-KRssjHxbkpd332gaMbeU76w2S5p4WJBuYGC7bc51RWOGeWwxKMMmEHLaAYuxHKa21YHjvxQcfZaygK4_DwOjyPE74NBq-IW4Cyctg%3D)_** But here’s what’s most disheartening. **Instead of protecting YOUR 4th Amendment right to unlawful search and seizure, Speaker Mike Johnson voted WITH the Democrats and against a warrant requirement.**
---
[**STAND WITH RAND: STOP FISA ABUSE**](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=87044c6368904cc78321159a14375d84&_e=fEzjv-x_Ccru6mtvjP6kPivfwmPR3TfVlf2pLpP-vlUz3bPrPTHcPoVHcz_nTrjOiFsPLX2c3tcS8kfdwjPMj_PR5YNFVDqY5LD4rjc0R9XGzPjwTOnzP1tFqCHd8NUN0d00N5yLm8F-Ai2gly4Te4y9FJN6PeK8YOj-7EarXov65GaUqAgi-U6xLQ_-C76P03JkEjmdpgpn6oaVHxnceTxTFWpCcWgrQTopEagQ5-3jToROJCx1DivdJxoCU95fMgvkd46CyzjVeICEGmvTK32LIw5HGbk7su04Ti-B6k26sGrut0zflAps13QXsOl06N0VSFPyt613ejLNoAKUi42wKN72bVlrnsx9vNZL_PA-UYgLfPzSghKRU2_LmaiG6TEW8-ZfD_T2Zmu6lklsWTqmYLDk8hLukzEuJnX9faI%3D)
---
Peter, this isn’t the first time Speaker Johnson has sided with Democrats. He also voted alongside Democrats and in favor of an insane **$1.25 BILLION** spending package. **As it stands now, I’m not so sure there’s a difference between Mike Johnson being in charge and the Democrats being in charge. **

name: Justice Democrats
subject: 1 month to protect Jamaal and reject AIPAC
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

We are officially one month away from the Democratic primary election in
New York’s 16th Congressional District, where a corrupt, conservative,
career politician is challenging progressive incumbent Jamaal Bowman for
his seat.

With one month to go and MILLIONS of dollars being spent by AIPAC’s
right-wing megadonor-funded network to unseat Jamaal, we need a
groundswell of grassroots support to fight back.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20240525.A15m3Y&refcode=em20240525-34968&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1001&akid=34968%2E1203867%2EsrpesY ]Our end-of-month fundraising deadline is approaching in less than one
week. Can we count on you to fuel our fight to re-elect Jamaal with a
contribution today?

The June 25th primary is AIPAC’s next chance to set our progressive
movement back and unseat a member of the Squad. They’ve already donated
over $1 million to George Latimer’s campaign, and their super PAC has
booked nearly $6 million in ads supporting Latimer and attacking Jamaal
across the district.

Jamaal is being outspent 20 to 1. Because he doesn’t take contributions
from corporate PACs, he’s relying on grassroots supporters to donate
whatever they can, so he can continue to fight for us, the people.

In one month, we can secure Jamaal’s seat in Congress to keep him fighting
for working families, Medicare for All, a permanent ceasefire in Gaza, and
public education, or else we’ll have another out-of-touch shill for
anti-abortion, anti-Palestinian, and pro-insurrection millionaires and
billionaires in Congress.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20240525.A15m3Y&refcode=em20240525-34968&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1002&akid=34968%2E1203867%2EsrpesY ]We’re running out of time. If you can afford to, please pitch in
$5 or whatever is possible to help us defend Jamaal’s seat
before it’s too late.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20240525.A15m3Y&refcode=em20240525-34968&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1021&akid=34968%2E1203867%2EsrpesY ]Contribute $5

We don’t want to wake up with any regrets on June 26th. Thank you for
anything you can contribute to protect Jamaal and the rest of our Squad.

— Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20240525-34968-footer&t=1022&refcode2=34968_1203867_srpesY&akid=34968%2E1203867%2EsrpesY

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1023&akid=34968%2E1203867%2EsrpesY

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Gabby Giffords
subject: Hey, can we ask you a quick favor?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
If today is the day you can spare a contribution, we hope you’ll consider making that contribution to GIFFORDS PAC.
#

Hey, can we ask you for a quick favor before you get on with enjoying your Saturday?
[**If you’re able to today, will you make a contribution of ANY amount you can afford to GIFFORDS PAC?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-may24.vNbcqy&refcode=em240525-1-30&t=1&akid=8164%2E3935704%2E7iwEGO)
We understand that your inbox is flooded with messages from organizations and candidates asking for your support. We know it would be impossible to give to everyone every time they ask.
But, if today is the day you can spare a contribution, we hope you’ll consider making that contribution to GIFFORDS PAC.
Our May fundraising drive will be over in less than a week. While the amount we raise at our monthly deadlines is important, it’s just as crucial that we have a large number of individuals (like you!) chipping in. That’s how we’ll show our gun lobby adversaries that our gun safety movement is stronger than ever.
[**Your contribution has the power to save someone’s life. If you’re ready to be a part of this work today by making a contribution to GIFFORDS PAC, chip in right away:**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-may24.vNbcqy&refcode=em240525-1-30&t=2&akid=8164%2E3935704%2E7iwEGO)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[CONTRIBUTE $3](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-may24.lpOBpz&amount=3&refcode=em240525-1-30&t=3&akid=8164%2E3935704%2E7iwEGO)**
---
****
| **[CONTRIBUTE MORE](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-may24.lpOBpz&refcode=em240525-1-30&t=4&akid=8164%2E3935704%2E7iwEGO)**
---
****
Thanks so much in advance for your support,
The team at GIFFORDS

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=8164%2E3935704%2E7iwEGO) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: A few of the ideas I believe in
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=2191%2E4032634%2E1vXVCx)
---
I'm running for re-election because there’s a lot we’ve got to do in order to save our country from extremists and make real change for our working families. And I’m going to keep fighting my heart out for this. Here’s a few of the ideas I believe in: We need to pass a wealth tax. Supreme Court Justices should follow a basic code of ethics. Quality child care should not eat up an entire paycheck. Big bank executives should not be able to gamble with consumers’ livelihoods. The filibuster must be abolished so we can pass the laws that the majority of Americans are calling for, like protecting abortion rights and enacting gun safety laws. [**If you’re with me, will you pitch in to support my re-election today? In order to run our campaign for these plans, we need to hit our monthly fundraising goals, and we’ve got an important one coming up. So will you please pitch in $28 or anything you can so I can keep up this fight in the Senate.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/2217?amount=28&t=8&akid=2191%2E4032634%2E1vXVCx)

---
_If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_ |
---
| [DONATE NOW: $3](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/2217?t=22&express_lane=true&amount=3&akid=2191%2E4032634%2E1vXVCx)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $15](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/2217?t=24&express_lane=true&amount=15&akid=2191%2E4032634%2E1vXVCx)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $28](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/2217?t=26&express_lane=true&amount=28&akid=2191%2E4032634%2E1vXVCx)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $50](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/2217?t=28&express_lane=true&amount=50&akid=2191%2E4032634%2E1vXVCx)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $100](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/2217?t=18&express_lane=true&amount=100&akid=2191%2E4032634%2E1vXVCx)
---
| [OTHER AMOUNT](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/2217?t=20&express_lane=true&akid=2191%2E4032634%2E1vXVCx)
---

---
Your support will help ensure that we can keep building our movement for big, structural change. That we can get our message out there and campaign for these plans across the country. Powerful special interests and extremist Republicans will be against us. But when we organize, hold those in power accountable, and fight righteous fights, we can continue to make positive change. Additionally, our opponents and their special interest donors will use our fundraising results to gauge what they’re up against. So how about we give them something to sweat over? [**I wouldn’t ask if it weren’t powerfully important that we hit our goal: Please pitch in $28 or any amount before tomorrow at midnight to help power our fight.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/2217?t=14&akid=2191%2E4032634%2E1vXVCx) Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth
| | | |
---
| [DONATE](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/2217?t=12&akid=2191%2E4032634%2E1vXVCx)

name: Freedom Caucus
subject: Kevin McCarthy Targets Conservative Leader
disclaimer_text: Paid for by House Freedom Fund
body:
Because Kevin McCarthy and his allies want to punish conservatives like Bob Good for ousting him as Speaker and standing up for our freedoms, and most importantly, they want to discourage other conservatives from fighting for us in the future. | | | [ ](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=fa5e347da1d74b7e928ea17384022747&_e=TPbXYHJvjn0PLeo1CYMsCRxYchkDVBHMI9qm7sp0gduiTT3uO7GLtC5G3t7nnY-jccFtqSJhAH1UTegoSxiVt9I3_RNgS8akPVdQTcON82TlPH9AbdrnLLb_xSzIrJGG1P_uwFj7Rn2ShiNoGXT8g_T52AhbvPANS8SVeG8z-hCZ7RHAkRHxMCFX2hZV71mNgf8rZsLk5k98A-5MdBZ74TSSBwtAF-PeAHylMJIqmhzLaTib3kvxR3FW1FKxVo6W)
---
|
---
Fellow Conservative: If you're tired of spineless Republicans selling out our country, then read this email carefully. Former House Speaker Kevin McCarthy and his Establishment allies are dumping millions of dollars into a congressional race in Virginia to defeat conservative Congressman **Bob Good** , the chairman of the House Freedom Caucus. They aren't spending the money to defeat a liberal Democrat. No! They are targeting a conservative warrior in a Republican primary election. _**WHY?**_ Because Kevin McCarthy and his allies want to punish conservatives like Bob Good for ousting him as Speaker and standing up for our freedoms, and _most importantly_ , they want to discourage other conservatives from fighting for us in the future. **[**Please stand with Bob Good by making an urgent contribution to his campaign now.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=fa5e347da1d74b7e928ea17384022747&_e=TPbXYHJvjn0PLeo1CYMsCRxYchkDVBHMI9qm7sp0gduiTT3uO7GLtC5G3t7nnY-jccFtqSJhAH1UTegoSxiVt9I3_RNgS8akPVdQTcON82Qca2OEHPY15HtNoDo-Q4CMF8sNHCV0uZ1he_V8VdGgBrwkg6aTDen3S8HrDe-rRXvPvbxIXwoZZWgdQ2rUnEKYdB09jy4cvSK65lOLEc2Q2egQykIYf_kue4oDwNIgXKCcvfVFuDTKl5348NMimm1g)** _**There is no time to waste.**_ We need every conservative who reads this to take immediate action. The Republican primary election in Virginia is on June 18, and early voting has already begun!!
---
---
_U.S. Congressman Bob Good (R-VA)_
---
If we don't lock arms and stand with Bob Good and the House Freedom Caucus in this race, Kevin McCarthy and his cronies will get their way – they will defeat a conservative warrior who has fought the Swamp and discourage other leaders from fighting for our values, too. **[**Take action now and send the RINOs a message!**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=fa5e347da1d74b7e928ea17384022747&_e=TPbXYHJvjn0PLeo1CYMsCRxYchkDVBHMI9qm7sp0gduiTT3uO7GLtC5G3t7nnY-jccFtqSJhAH1UTegoSxiVt9I3_RNgS8akPVdQTcON82QKVC8tcjChCEySeeWnsk55fyRuJR7DpVsUeoV-ONoPHUsa8xLeZTpZ6Q1RWGI7BtbQhk83tkRSmxwLSY6eBhx5c4ZV0uy6RnSZ8TIoj_weQdW0miJ52FnIObqMgv1LU4g-0MpiJimrt_MkNeqsOQ7w)** And if the targeting of a strong conservative wasn't bad enough, consider the state legislator they are propping up to challenge Bob Good in the Republican primary. **John McGuire is a true RINO who will stab us in the back faster than you can say, Kevin McCarthy.** ❌ John McGuire voted to give taxpayer-funded college tuition assistance to illegal immigrants. ❌ John McGuire said that our country was too lenient when it comes to gun regulations, and he even spoke at an anti-gun rally.

❌ John McGuire said he doesn’t consider himself a Republican or a Democrat and has repeatedly praised Democrats like Ralph Northam, Nancy Pelosi, and Barack Obama. You can see why Kevin McCarthy and his allies want this fraud Republican in Congress. **[**Please take action and donate $5, $10, $25, $50, or more to Bob Good's campaign.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=fa5e347da1d74b7e928ea17384022747&_e=TPbXYHJvjn0PLeo1CYMsCRxYchkDVBHMI9qm7sp0gduiTT3uO7GLtC5G3t7nnY-jccFtqSJhAH1UTegoSxiVt9I3_RNgS8akPVdQTcON82QSgHbtCweoCYHmk5sxoKF1IGURwWPu5xelFqqC76fNur9DS7pNJD-mbfzo2Wbz07dxW4g-ZoVU7p2CjgdMIuaAUun4rx9KDFlRHxmsQujwbxH2WSvZvcPqEtJlb2unYYO6CFyqbY-bAlo-6Zm0oVXL)** House Freedom Fund will pay all processing fees and transfer 100% of your contribution directly to his campaign. He's up against millions in outside spending, so he needs every dollar you can give. This congressional race in Virginia has national implications that will impact all Americans. _**Please don't sit this one out.**_ The House Freedom Caucus and conservatives need your help now. Thank you for considering this urgent request and doing so much to help fight for America's future. Sincerely,
---
---
Ray Yonkura Executive Director House Freedom Fund
---
|
---
|
---
**SUPPORT THE FREEDOM CAUCUS**
---
---
The House Freedom Fund is the only political group in America that is exclusively dedicated to defending and expanding the House Freedom Caucus. Please support our conservative mission by making a one-time or recurring donation today!
---

subject: Is there ANYTHING we can say?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1159%2E791427%2Ej1nJMG)
We're emailing today to ask an important question, team:
**Is there ANYTHING we can say to convince you to stand with Ilhan Omar and make your first contribution to our re-election campaign today?**
What if we told you that right-wing groups like AIPAC and their billionaires donors have committed to spending over _$100 million_ in primaries like ours this year, and progressive champions like Ilhan are their top-priority targets?
How about if we told you that next week, we're facing a critical end-of-month fundraising deadline, and have some critically-important grassroots goals we _need_ to reach before it ends in order to fight back?
And what if we told you that the _ONLY_ way we're funding this movement is together, and that Ilhan is counting on each and every one of us to do our part?
It's all true — so what do you say? If you've been waiting for the right moment to add your first contribution, today is a great one. So please:
**[Use this link to make a contribution — $3, $10, or anything you can — to stand with Ilhan and our people-powered campaign. Anything you can chip in, no matter the amount, means so much to our ability to fight back against the attacks to come.](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-may24.KcBh3H&refcode=em240525-1-t2&t=2&akid=1159%2E791427%2Ej1nJMG)**

The popularity and momentum of _Let 's Address This_ continues to grow. Every time you open an email, like, comment, or share a post, or upgrade your subscription--you're advancing this human rights project. Thank you for your trust and support. Here's your quick recap of last week for _Let 's Address This_ with Qasim Rashid:
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..yPEFmuQbaaqE1dZPG_ZzulPGDw_Fn1GvrutzJXE6vRg?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=144938745)
**Monday**
* [BREAKING: The ICC Seeks Arrest Warrants for Israeli and Hamas Leadership](https://substack.com/redirect/0e2e5634-043c-4300-aa9f-14d13f58d47b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* What are the charges, who is being charged, and what happens next? Your quick but detailed summary of the ICC Charges against Israel and Hamas.

**Tuesday**
* [What if the Greatest Obstacle to Justice in America, is the Supreme Court Itself?](https://substack.com/redirect/86823829-ee19-4544-b62f-ff9d3a8fb901?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* Receipts show the current Court's right wing extremist rulings are not aberrations, but manifestations of SCOTUS history--and that much change.

**Wednesday**
* [The Qasim Rashid Show -- Episode 121 -- Youth, Racial Justice, and Hope](https://substack.com/redirect/a431d423-e610-4832-8e3d-73705299a703?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* I welcome Corryn G. Freeman, a Florida-based social activist, political operative, and an accomplished social change agent.

**Thursday**
* [Hate Mail of the Weak](https://substack.com/redirect/189843d2-c5f3-4c0b-84f5-cf77c6a28007?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* A response to a white supremacist who called me a "filthy Muslim ni**er."

**Friday**

body:
We are only 10 days away from the June Elections

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85609286/475331483/-197340401?refcode=wrapper_hdr&ms=240525_pot_eom1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQ0MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWQwZWYzYTQtYTcxYS1lZjExLTg2ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=V90X2wCXSbekNIgg2XT-hPz0-2pR51UgQevVtR0QdPw=)

It’s officially crunch time, team. We are only ten days away from the June Elections and we’re firing on all cylinders here at Pascrell HQ. Our voter contact efforts are in full swing and we’re working hard to get voters from every corner of NJ-09 to show up for Bill. Election Day is Tuesday, June 4th — don't miss it. Outside of voting, the best way you can help our campaign is to chip into our voter contact efforts so we can reach voters online and at the doors in the final few days until our primary. Everyone in North Jersey knows that Bill Pascrell is the leader they can count on to fight for and deliver for them. **[We can’t let our voter contact efforts slow down. Can you contribute to our Voter Outreach Team to ensure that we can talk with voters throughout NJ-09? Every dollar counts.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85609287/475331484/-197340401?refcode=240525_pot_eom1_l1&ms=240525_pot_eom1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQ0MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWQwZWYzYTQtYTcxYS1lZjExLTg2ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=V90X2wCXSbekNIgg2XT-hPz0-2pR51UgQevVtR0QdPw=)** **[help us reach voters](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85609288/475331485/-197340401?refcode=240525_pot_eom1_b1&ms=240525_pot_eom1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQ0MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWQwZWYzYTQtYTcxYS1lZjExLTg2ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=V90X2wCXSbekNIgg2XT-hPz0-2pR51UgQevVtR0QdPw=)** Thanks for your support, — Pascrell Outreach Team [**P.S. For voting resources and information visit this page.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85609289/475331486/-1371854476?ms=240525_pot_eom1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQ0MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWQwZWYzYTQtYTcxYS1lZjExLTg2ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=V90X2wCXSbekNIgg2XT-hPz0-2pR51UgQevVtR0QdPw=&emci=06af46cf-1819-ef11-86d0-6045bdd9e096&emdi=ad0ef3a4-a71a-ef11-86d0-6045bdd9e096&ceid=9668897)
| The toughest member of Congress is progressive New Jersey fighter Bill Pascrell. Bill is leading our battle to protect Social Security and Medicare. Peter, during her time as vice president and throughout her long career in public service, Kamala Harris has been at the forefront of the fight for American families – **and been a powerful progressive champion.**
* In a first-of-its-kind gesture of support for reproductive rights, VP Harris visited an abortion clinic in Minnesota to express her outrage at the attacks on our reproductive freedoms.

* VP Harris recently unveiled **$20 billion** in green bank grants to fund clean energy projects nationwide. This is thanks to the Inflation Reduction Act – which she played an integral role in passing.

* And as a champion of progressive policies, she’s been a strong voice in the fight to defend voting rights, protect our environment, advocate for economic justice, and defend reproductive rights.

Attorney General Letitia James knows that, for Black women in politics, nothing is a given. ---
### Americans are Rallying and Election Integrity is Winning!
#### What a week!
On Monday we got word that Sen. Chuck Schumer planned to reintroduce his Border Bill. The bill was designed to codify the Biden Administration's currently illegal and unconstitutional Executive Branch amnesty and force U.S. taxpayers to fund the ongoing invasion of undocumented migrants.
The bill was soundly defeated earlier in 2024, but in today’s political climate...who knew what might happen. But here’s what did happen - on Wednesday the bill was bought for a vote and it was defeated, with even more Republicans and Democrats standing together in opposition this time around! **Win!**
Then on Thursday, the U.S. House repealed a law allowing noncitizens to vote in local elections in the District of Columbia - with 52 Democrats standing with Republicans to support the repeal! **Win!**
Several months ago, True the Vote launched [The 611 Project](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.bYZLwP2tKNW52PF5H5Fs6XnSdcrSmzbZQfStcjy751i-Ux7pGZZnGS3_QkKO6_ELjC5yHL05Cxwb3cle8YQ6yKtVkcypgOA0jUcNT7veafcBt32r4VXADhckHug6UWEKhYIR7sg19nlnmZvzM5_hcePTOTt4H620rHopB7netuoCVDT5zUpEPznvEzLQrmFkaP7fkdch4Cs-C7JTMWaSgQ/46n/iXOyv390TyOjk2D5gRARiQ/h2/h001.tMzN-FTWPSDe4dCr6tp1wSsMYy_c-9eV9UFG9joPgBk) to raise awareness about how noncitizens are being registered to vote and what immediate actions can be taken to prevent their registrations from being activated. With a 44 page handbook, talking points, and direct phone and email access to state and federal representatives, we have helped thousands of frustrated Americans ensure their voices are heard - and we will not stop!
Also on Thursday ... another win ... in the Bronx! The True the Vote Team was on the ground helping people with voter registration and record checks while they waited in line to attend the Trump Rally.
| [| | | True the Vote @TrueTheVote |
---|---|---
Do you believe our election system is honest? We hit the streets of the Bronx to find out what the community thinks!

**324** Likes **140** Retweets **30** Replies ](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.bYZLwP2tKNW52PF5H5Fs6d632pOaHlQVWOb7P_0r4ZGOI29TeQaAtrLNM7xgUpwCDp_Ny6EUorT3JB818I5KlybRJFSw030PS8aJY6Rv_7jmghV1pxRq-lkvvG6tlABdTMAQmH_a_rkP0OhBvifVHpCrFdwPiOH2-IeMHYxUmKnStW5l7yf9A3BIH_iPdalY56sXjDUP2VaP_hlxQzsAswtPTcsNkleqALqGAVfnCoc/46n/iXOyv390TyOjk2D5gRARiQ/h3/h001.RGQNQcrTchLtaFsm_ZlDk3-g9hX6Hzk6s7Hnc6vCTyA)

clean_body: Hi Peter, 1,632. That’s the number of votes that separated me from my opponent in the last election. If that seems pretty close to you, that’s because it is. And let’s be clear: 2024 is set to be even closer. With control of the House on the line, we need to maximize Democratic turnout across Colorado’s 8th District if we want to win again. 164. That’s the number of days we have left to make sure every voter in our district knows what’s at stake in this election. That may seem like a long time, but Election Day on November 5, 2024, will be here before we know it. In these final 164 days, we’re going to organize like never before — but we need more funds to keep up the fight. $10. That’s what we’re asking you to donate today to help power our campaign to victory on November 5th. name: Jon Tester
subject: Dark money groups are spending millions
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
they’re just in it for power and influence
| | |
---
Hi folks.

Here’s a photo of my grandparents, Arnfred and Christine, on their wedding day in 1905. That was a couple of** ** years before they picked out a flat piece of grassland just outside Big Sandy to homestead.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85611253/475336805/73003207?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk5070-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOWU1MzE5OS1hOTFhLWVmMTEtODZkMC02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IW6FucNGwJh_cLQxC9deBgben1H0Oh9HqzPiDetlBGo=)
That patch of loamy, alkaline clay soil is the same one where I grew up, where Sharla and I raised our kids, and where we still farm the land to this day.

Things weren’t easy for Fred and Christine. They suffered devastating windstorms, bitter cold, fires, poisonous snakes—pretty much everything but locusts. They had a couple hundred acres to their name, a newly-built barn, a windmill, their healthy son and daughters (including Helen, my mom), strong muscles, and the powerful work ethic that built rural America.

I first ran for office to make sure our government was serving hardworking Americans like my grandparents. Folks like our teachers, farmers, and construction workers deserve a government that fights for them.

But the special interests trying to unseat me don’t care about that. Dark-money groups are spending millions of dollars to misinform voters and replace me with a mouthpiece for their own agenda. They’ll do whatever it takes to elect their handpicked candidate because they don’t care about protecting our way of life—they’re just in it for power and influence.
**That’s not how I operate, and it’s why we’re running this campaign differently. I’m counting on grassroots folks like you chipping in what you can, when you can, to build a team strong enough to take on the mountains of cash these outside groups have earmarked to defeat me.**
**[Can I count on you to split a contribution between my people-powered campaign and Kirsten Gillibrand’s? With the election season in full swing, we need to fight back now.>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85611255/475336807/73003207?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk5070-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOWU1MzE5OS1hOTFhLWVmMTEtODZkMC02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IW6FucNGwJh_cLQxC9deBgben1H0Oh9HqzPiDetlBGo=)**

clean_body: they’re just in it for power and influence | | | Hi folks. Here’s a photo of my grandparents, Arnfred and Christine, on their wedding day in 1905. That was a couple of years before they picked out a flat piece of grassland just outside Big Sandy to homestead. = That patch of loamy, alkaline clay soil is the same one where I grew up, where Sharla and I raised our kids, and where we still farm the land to this day. Things weren’t easy for Fred and Christine. They suffered devastating windstorms, bitter cold, fires, poisonous snakes—pretty much everything but locusts. They had a couple hundred acres to their name, a newly-built barn, a windmill, their healthy son and daughters (including Helen, my mom), strong muscles, and the powerful work ethic that built rural America. I first ran for office to make sure our government was serving hardworking Americans like my grandparents. Folks like our teachers, farmers, and construction workers deserve a government that fights for them. But the special interests trying to unseat me don’t care about that. Dark-money groups are spending millions of dollars to misinform voters and replace me with a mouthpiece for their own agenda. They’ll do whatever it takes to elect their handpicked candidate because they don’t care about protecting our way of life—they’re just in it for power and influence. That’s not how I operate, and it’s why we’re running this campaign differently. I’m counting on grassroots folks like you chipping in what you can, when you can, to build a team strong enough to take on the mountains of cash these outside groups have earmarked to defeat me. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Jon Tester and Kirsten Gillibrand will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Your donation—no matter the amount—plants the seeds of our movement, ensuring we grow the resources we need to win. Thanks for your support. Together, we can keep me in the Senate fighting for the little guy. —Jon | * | = A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 — and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, experts at FiveThirtyEight are saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. = And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, = Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

body:
Friend, Kyrsten Sinema is not running for re-election.
Kari Lake is the presumptive nominee of the Republican Party in Arizona’s U.S. Senate race.
Someone who cozies up to the furthest of the far-right: Steve Bannon, Mike Lindell, Mike Flynn, Roger Stone — and of course, Trump himself.
Someone who supports the near total abortion ban in Arizona and who continues to level baseless and unfounded conspiracies at honorable election workers.
She is a threat to our democracy, and there is nothing she won’t say or do to get elected.
It’s embarrassing. It’s sad. But most of all, it’s dangerous.
Ruben Gallego is the only thing standing in the way of the “MAGA Queen” becoming a United States Senator. And today, he desperately needs your help.

name: Ty Pinkins
subject: Proud of our progress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ty Pinkins for Congress
body:
Our work hasn’t slowed down in May

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85611898/475338251/1023996456?refcode=PLACEHOLDER_logo&amount=50&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTA5NDgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTQ5M2VlZjItYWExYS1lZjExLTg2ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=SfLMPfXbxiDpMzO7rAJ4Sr0mVjF-7a_Q5vye_3ZBl7U=)
Peter,

We’re heading into the final week of the month, and we have a lot to be proud of for May.

We’ve made incredible headway meeting with Mississippians in all 82 counties, many of whom I’ve had the pleasure of meeting while on the trail for my 800-mile advocacy run. Across the board, I’m hearing the same things – that folks feel ignored by our leaders in Washington and are ready for someone who will actually fight for our communities.

Today, I’m at the Mississippi Democratic Party State Convention to connect with fellow Mississippi Dems and show why I’m the candidate who can bring much-needed change to our state.

Part of demonstrating that our campaign has what it takes to win is making sure we have the fundraising numbers to back it up. Key supporters will be looking at our fundraising performance when deciding if they’re willing to support us, so we’re making a push to boost our fundraising before the end of the month.

[Will you help us prove our campaign has the support to elect a new Democratic Senator for Mississippi by chipping in $10, $25, or any other amount today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85611899/475338252/1023996456?refcode=PLACEHOLDER_l1&amount=50&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTA5NDgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTQ5M2VlZjItYWExYS1lZjExLTg2ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=SfLMPfXbxiDpMzO7rAJ4Sr0mVjF-7a_Q5vye_3ZBl7U=)
[DONATE »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85611900/475338253/1023996456?refcode=PLACEHOLDER_b1&amount=50&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTA5NDgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTQ5M2VlZjItYWExYS1lZjExLTg2ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=SfLMPfXbxiDpMzO7rAJ4Sr0mVjF-7a_Q5vye_3ZBl7U=)
As I’m talking with folks at the Convention today, I’m highlighting supporters like you who are making all of our work possible. Thank you for standing with us!

With gratitude,

_Ty_

* * *
| The son of a tractor driver, Ty doesn’t come from a wealthy family. He was born and raised in the small town of Rolling Fork, and is a proud son of the Mississippi Delta.

Frustrated by the lack of action from lawmakers on the issues facing people in Mississippi–and believing that the hard-working voters of Mississippi deserve much better–Ty Pinkins decided to run for office: the United States Senate in 2024.

[You can support Ty's campaign for U.S. Senate here:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85611901/475338254/1023996456?refcode=PLACEHOLDER_bioboxlnk&amount=50&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTA5NDgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTQ5M2VlZjItYWExYS1lZjExLTg2ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=SfLMPfXbxiDpMzO7rAJ4Sr0mVjF-7a_Q5vye_3ZBl7U=)

name: Jason Kander
subject: We’ll see you at the polls
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pereles for Missouri, Rhonda West, Treasurer
body:
https://www.perelesformissouri.com/ [https://www.perelesformissouri.com/]
Peter,
This is Jason Kander, and I want to talk with you about a very important opportunity we have right now to stand up for all of us here in Missouri.
Having served as Missouri’s Secretary of State from 2013 until 2017, and before that as a State Representative, I know what it takes to serve effectively in government. As an Army Intelligence Officer in Afghanistan, I have met and worked with people from all walks of life. But most importantly, I know what it takes to confront hard issues, and fight together for a better future for everyone.
That is the kind of commitment and dedication that makes Missourians proud. And that is what is so great about my friend Joe Pereles, who is running to flip a State Senate seat in St. Louis County red to blue : Joe is the kind of guy who will make us proud. A person with integrity, and grit. Someone with valuable experience serving others as a 37 year volunteer with the Red Cross, or delivering meals for a local food pantry.
Joe didn’t do any of that to advance a political career. He has served others his entire life because it was the right thing to do.
And now, because he saw the need, Joe has stepped up to run for State Senate. He is just the person we need in Jefferson City. And we have a chance to help elect Joe Pereles to the Missouri State Senate and change this state for the better.
In 2017, at the end of my term as Secretary of State, I delivered one final speech before the General Assembly. I still remember that speech—standing on the dais before a captive audience of folks who had made no secret of their disagreement with me and my values, I called for protecting Missourians’ right to vote and preserving our democracy, making an appeal to our better angels:
“Even though you have the power to take away the right to vote from the citizens of Missouri, you shouldn’t...but if you choose to [do so], well then: I guess we will see you in court.”
The current supermajority in Jefferson City is working harder than ever to do exactly what I warned about: take away the voice of the people, stripping us of our ability to be heard and to weigh in on many important policies that directly affect our lives.
And now, by electing Joe and flipping this seat, we will be on our way to end the supermajority in the State Senate, protecting our voting rights and getting things done in ways that will make all of us proud.
Folks, we have an incredible opportunity to end the chaos and stop the senseless attacks on democracy and majority rule. But this time, instead of saying “we’ll see you in court,” we say: “ we’ll see you at the polls.”
This is a crucial time. I hope you will send Joe some support so that we can win this crucial State Senate seat. Please join me in supporting Joe Pereles : [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/perelesformissouri24?refcode=kander]
DONATE $15 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/perelesformissouri24?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=kander_express_lane_15] DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/perelesformissouri24?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=kander_express_lane_25]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/perelesformissouri24?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=kander_express_lane_50] DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/perelesformissouri24?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=kander_express_lane_100]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/perelesformissouri24?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=kander_express_lane_250] DONATE $500 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/perelesformissouri24?express_lane=true&amount=500&refcode=kander_express_lane_500]
DONATE ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/perelesformissouri24?refcode=kander]
Now is the time to work.
Sincerely,
Jason

_The media is not your friend._
That's the advice Chris Cuomo gave me before I joined him for my first-ever live, primetime interview after being thrust into the spotlight by Florida Governor Ron DeSantis.
I didn't understand what he meant at the time -- or the first 100 or so times he told me after.
For five days, I was the most sought-out story in America - in the middle of a pandemic, no less.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..7eVlv43DkTOQMG58eJgwv5vspyNRNCPkIY2VRykZcKE?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=144972605)
I was screening calls from every news agency in the world. Everyone wanted to talk to me. Everyone wanted to hear my story.
It's flattering to have so many famous people ask for your time.
Especially when you were once a journalism major who idolized the callers you're screening. Especially when you're 30 years old and have never met anyone famous or important before. Especially when your life has been turned upside down in an instant and your future seems uncertain. Especially when you're being targeted by very powerful people. Especially when telling your story could save thousands of lives.
That's where I found myself in May 2020.
Journalists, celebrities, members of congress were all thanking me for my bravery, offering their support, and asking that I speak out.
Reluctantly, I did. And in doing so, I no longer had the protections granted to private citizens. I had crossed the line into public figure.
That's not how it should be. Stepping forward to defend yourself should not come at the cost of you and your family's privacy. And for all the alleged nuance between public figure and limited public figure status regarding civil proceedings, none of the laws in Florida protected me. None avenged me. I had to do that myself.
The last four years of my life have defied notions of the influence of an individual vs an institution, people vs power, and the notorious limits of 15 minutes of fame.
But there's a reason why when 100 people are asked to do something wrong, only one stands up and says no.
We bring our history to every obstacle we face in life.
In that seemingly ordinary moment that changed my life forever, I brought with me a lifetime of growing up in poverty, growing up rough in the dirty, rural south, a set of principles fixed by tragedy after tragedy, and a lifetime of being anything but ordinary.
I spent my life defying expectations. I had no reason to believe the rules were inflexible when my life was an experiment in seeing how many you could break.
Even in high school I found ways to reach beyond the limitations of my small world.
I first joined the Technology Student Association my senior year in high school, having moved from Mississippi, where no such programs existed. I won first place that year in the statewide TSA competition in Pennsylvania for a documentary I shot and edited about New Orleans' slow recovery after Hurricane Katrina - a deeply personal topic for me as a Katrina survivor.
I joined just about every club my new school had to offer, even though I had done none of those activities before - Future Business Leaders of America (won second place at state in impromptu speaking), Forensics (various medals for political and impromptu speaking), and even Model United Nations, where I received Gannon University's Outstanding Delegate Award in the Specter of Global Warming. That was also my new school's first year participating in Model UN.
I didn't stop when my dream of attending Syracuse University came true. From my first year there to my last, I was my class's elected Student Representative to the Newhouse School's student-faculty committee.
I arrived at Syracuse wanting to follow my passion for documentary filmmaking and photojournalism. I wanted to be sent into the worst places in the world and tell the stories of the people who needed to be seen and heard. That morphed into a focus on traditional journalism as I couldn't afford the costs of my own camera equipment.
Then, midway through my junior year, I changed majors after an unplanned pregnancy brought my son to me. No longer content with writing about the problems of the world, I decided to lean into my second major - geography- and work toward solutions.
I survived Katrina, though it left me scarred. I think most of what I sought in my education and in my life was an explanation - why did this happen? How did it happen? How do we stop it from ever happening again?
Though I kept my journalism majors through the rest of my studies at Syracuse, and double-majored in mass communications at Louisiana State University for my master's degree, I set out to work on that last question.
Which brought me to my job at the Florida Department of Health.
Over the last few months, I've been working toward ending this detour into disaster management.
Not only because no state will ever give me the keys to their data again, knowing my allegiance is to the public good and not to any organization or politician, but because the media, now more than ever, needs reporters who governments won't trust to keep their secrets.
The media needs reporters with unwavering commitments to truth, transparency and the public good.
The media needs to be a friend to whistleblowers.
If you'd like to help me in this journey, I need a camera, mic, and a few other supplies to get started. I already have a few brand partnerships in line to help me push out content once it's ready, but the initial setup is all on me.
[Click here to chip in](https://substack.com/redirect/6420e736-55d8-4474-b636-55fc90e08557?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

Friend, Here in Michigan, the flowers are blooming, the weather’s getting warmer, and the recent NFL Draft in Detroit drew the biggest crowd in HISTORY with almost 800,000 people! As I prepare for my annual Spring cleaning, a thought occurred to me. There’s nothing in need of more Spring cleaning than the Washington Swamp. As it stands, we’ve got a group of Democrats in unelected positions pulling all of the strings...since our President can barely put two words together. But mark my words: that’s all going to change when I get to the Senate. We will work to restore the voice of the American people beginning on Day One. And I’ll need your help getting started. **[**I need to know, what issue do you want to see me tackle first when I get to the Senate?**](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=1e4dd0d0e7c54f0d8fe181a4e0801628&_e=f2awMXdNMwuiAv34F-SO-kTTVPbxZpvstXZjm9DJDcHyMc8BaVpz3_BrQebyggnpr4HVgMdnwRK_i3OI1J170IlkTav93lct8ZKAtv-B71ly638LllW3_NE8Ol8KV16FvTqOk9FjI5g5YtSCO9mcv89YbLAlsXCIMdF2mimSgbmr9Ee_fqm--yI2dXaRsizVNNLX7FR46SYjgYSGh7UbEkSqGzLtUZxGKnAYmL3_7SyKhXFE3IoJRjDzUxq06Whv69sG2cR4Sm7FjMy-7hsHWJkLoTHzRDuCQm_u8qoc6iDLvrjXRi2tRVvhHgg0PBaJSGqJ6v5G2ELaAH0eapsw410HEqMtMOe35px8upzFHoXbOfB-k5_8Cr7j8XcowGKd83DfXzbBwl50UUVxeJSI1Fe3x_RXVBFGx3T408G5dtL83TCcPRuoYi7JRxhq4DNE8uHWu7jfFeUwDdZbJprONQ%3D%3D)**[](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=1e4dd0d0e7c54f0d8fe181a4e0801628&_e=f2awMXdNMwuiAv34F-SO-kTTVPbxZpvstXZjm9DJDcFi2pUJnbfT2Y8UA0geRZDVRqXE_83F7ckBLeWG20CleloQWwR6DCx8yjaqh3Xf70jxPGcC9Q5VACVHHEJ9mrpr8nwq9aSWeqWcSgB_1IINnU9PUYtZzZDuRLGGwx4obiu1CMKq3Vrmh5-Oe-u9vd7GQlI8DPikdSdyRGhdCMx8OsJ8tdV0jzmpdIePk1zt9BhdjIIIkXTcKiQ0sZE3fu6hjNVVOQefypwvanlEj-r0LHIxbuzaExKoVMeZqYcleFgCwSfX93NX89QydP6Vp17JUFpCdosXLji49vGQphyAzqSTgYOsjjhxyrt4x__D7Li2I9tBOrs9IgUzRTpaxUQ-XqAFSz7CdMt6fO2dOiL7dTn9H84LrCGAr1wKObpxZNZskNHLb1ztxGgZht4I8IHAPb1iJjeLsWOYOHC9RvZ6pRxYJ4LFRTVmO9_SR1BzXGg%3D)

clean_body: We’re giving out this new priority survey to top supporters like YOU | | | We don't want you to leave! But we understand if you don't want to receive these emails anymore. Click to unsubscribe. Friend, Here in Michigan, the flowers are blooming, the weather’s getting warmer, and the recent NFL Draft in Detroit drew the biggest crowd in HISTORY with almost 800,000 people! As I prepare for my annual Spring cleaning, a thought occurred to me. There’s nothing in need of more Spring cleaning than the Washington Swamp. As it stands, we’ve got a group of Democrats in unelected positions pulling all of the strings...since our President can barely put two words together. But mark my words: that’s all going to change when I get to the Senate. We will work to restore the voice of the American people beginning on Day One. And I’ll need your help getting started. Sincerely, Mike Rogers | | Paid for by Rogers for Senate. | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.commailto:mark@convert-digital.com. Don't want to receive these emails anymore? Click Rogers for Senate P.O. Box 132 St. Joseph, MI 49085

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: Our resources will determine our plans
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople
body:
#
There are just over five months until Election Day.
Powered by People is organizing across Texas to make the most of the time we have left, focusing on finding eligible unregistered Democrats and bringing them onto the rolls.
Texas now has the second-largest population of young voters in the nation. They’re helping to make Texas one of the competitive battleground states in America, and they’re the key to winning big elections in 2024 and beyond.
To reach these important voters, our volunteers are putting in the work to counter GOP suppression on college campuses. They’re registering students to vote, connecting the dots on what makes this election so important, and making sure they have everything they need to cast a ballot in November.
We’re hiring organizers in Dallas, Austin, San Antonio, and Houston to support the hundreds of volunteers who are out in the field doing this work. Depending on resources, we may be able to hire organizers in additional areas as well.
Which is why I’m reaching out to you today.
[**If you can, will you make a $3 contribution today so Powered by People can hire the organizers we need to reach voters across Texas? From paying for postage to hiring organizers, our work is funded by everyday people chipping in what they can.**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20240525.y0FfMA&refcode=ema20240525-239609&t=1&akid=239609%2E444211%2EYMyw-J)
We started Powered by People four years ago to bring Texans together toward the common goal of registering and organizing the voters we need to elect leaders who will keep us on the path toward freedom and democracy.
Given the stakes at every level of the ballot in November, our work is more crucial than ever.
Thank you for your support today.
— Beto

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pbp-em-2023-footer?refcode=em20240525-239609-footer&t=2&refcode2=239609_444211_YMyw-J&akid=239609%2E444211%2EYMyw-J)**
Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople.org](http://www.poweredxpeople.org?akid=239609%2E444211%2EYMyw-J), not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We are powered by grassroots supporters like you. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=239609%2E444211%2EYMyw-J).

| | Hi Peter, Lanon has never backed down from a challenge, and we're not about to start now. | | It’s been a big week, Peter. **On Wednesday, End Citizens United put Juan Ciscomani on their list of the Most Corrupt members of Congress** — thanks to the hundreds of thousands of dollars he accepts from corporate donors and the millions of dollars poured into this district by his dark money super PACs supporters. **On Thursday, Kirsten met with reproductive healthcare advocates** Kaitlyn Joshua, Amanda Zurawski, Amy Fitch Heacock, and Tucson's very own State Rep. Stephanie Stahl Hamilton. It was an inspiring and empowering conversation about the importance of protecting our most fundamental rights. **And today is our amazing Campaign Manager’s birthday** (happy birthday Alia!!). **_But there was one piece of news we got this week that’s changed everything._** We found out that Mike Johnson’s PAC — the far-right, anti-abortion, homophobic Republican House Speaker — has reserved almost _$6 million_ in ads in our district. That’s millions in out-of-state dark money that’s going to drown out our pro-choice, pro-democracy, pro-working family message. This is the most competitive race in Arizona, and to flip this seat blue, we’ll need all hands on deck. [**We only have six days to hit our fundraising goal. Will you help us flip AZ-06 blue by chipping in now?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85614756/475347206/1131851138?refcode=X_052524_EOM_B_week_act&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MmNlZDYyZi1hZjFhLWVmMTEtODZkMC02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Vy73CLZjdu5bOdaeQN6Dhi6eCcsrR7WCFaZv6P-CW_A=)

subject: You stood out to me today —

body:
| | | It's Sen. Schumer.

I'm between meetings, so I'll make this quick: Your name is on our list of inactive Democratic memberships for May, and I need to make sure you activate your membership before the midnight deadline.

If we want to save the Senate** _again_** this year, we need to begin laying the groundwork immediately. Voting rights, reproductive justice, President Biden's judicial nominees, and our ultra-slim Democratic majority are all on the line. We can't afford for anyone to sit on the sidelines!

**Your membership has never been more critical. Please, use this custom link to activate right now:**

**[www.dscc.org/202405members/#9716520](https://go.dscc.org/go/17944?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20240525-ChuckSchumer-SchumerShortMembershipRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20240525-ChuckSchumer-SchumerShortMembershipRF-Pros-sl1&akid=14877%2E9716520%2EINMeod)**

Thanks for taking action to activate your DSCC membership,

Chuck Schumer

name: Maxine Dexter
subject: We won!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maxine for Congress
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85615115/475348812/577006200?amount=25&refcode=header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMDk5MDQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGViNTUyZTEtYWYxYS1lZjExLTg2ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=AeVYkyJWYAZblLstz3Hfc8_ahTWjJAgI-GPF085yIgg=)
Peter, we did it! I’m honored to be the Democratic nominee for Oregon’s 3rd Congressional District, thanks to this incredible community. Your support, hard work, and generosity made this victory possible.

As Democrats, we stand united to protect our democracy, build resilient communities, address the climate crisis, expand abortion access, and create an economy that works for everyone.

We must ensure affordable housing, accessible mental health services, and universal healthcare. Our pressing need is to stand together against threats to our democracy. This election is about preserving free and fair elections, condemning political violence, and defending American democracy.

Oregonians deserve better than what we’ve seen from this MAGA-led Congress. There’s no time to waste. In Congress, I will listen, collaborate, and find paths forward that get results.

I leave you with a mission: help reelect President Biden and Vice President Harris, regain a Democratic majority in the House, protect our Senate majority, and defeat the threats to our democracy.

[**If you want to help me achieve this mission please consider donating $20 to be a Founding Donor of my general election campaign >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85615117/475348816/577006200?amount=25&refcode=MD_FR_2024.05.22_Win_B1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMDk5MDQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGViNTUyZTEtYWYxYS1lZjExLTg2ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=AeVYkyJWYAZblLstz3Hfc8_ahTWjJAgI-GPF085yIgg=)

Thank you from the bottom of my heart. Let’s celebrate our community’s strength and prepare to get back to work. Together, we will make a difference.

Thank you,

Maxine

body:
Ted is a proven America First warrior who FIGHTS for our MAGA values in the U.S. Senate. Read more >>>
Ted is a proven America First warrior who FIGHTS for our MAGA values in the U.S. Senate. Read more >>>

| | | Peter, Donald Trump, Jr. here - As you know, my father is under attack from the Biden White House and numerous absolutely unhinged persons using and abusing the American legal system to try and take him down. We also have Biden and the Democrats spending millions on ads falsely smearing us all and working to register as many far-left voters as possible before November. **But** _**we have another huge problem**_**you haven't heard about. We have an extremely close Senate race in Texas, and****Senator Ted Cruz needs urgent help****. We saw** _**Chuck Schumer**_**boasting just this week that the Democrats will win Texas and keep the U.S. Senate... ** Peter, we can't let that happen. If the Democrats take Texas, they'll keep the Senate and use senatorial power to stop the MAGA movement and block everything my father wants to accomplish-_including a full investigation of the Washington Swamp!_ Ted Cruz is a proven America First warrior, and we need him in the Senate fighting for us all. **[I urge you to chip in a donation to help him KEEP TEXAS RED for me and my Read more >>> | | | Peter, Donald Trump, Jr. here - As you know, my father is under attack from the Biden White House and numerous absolutely unhinged persons using and abusing the American legal system to try and take him down. We also have Biden and the Democrats spending millions on ads falsely smearing us all and working to register as many far-left voters as possible before November. But we have another huge problemyou haven't heard about. We have an extremely close Senate race in Texas, andSenator Ted Cruz needs urgent help. We saw Chuck Schumerboasting just this week that the Democrats will win Texas and keep the U.S. Senate... Peter, we can't let that happen. If the Democrats take Texas, they'll keep the Senate and use senatorial power to stop the MAGA movement and block everything my father wants to accomplish-including a full investigation of the Washington Swamp! Ted Cruz is a proven America First warrior, and we need him in the Senate fighting for us all. As I said, Texas is a TOP TARGET for Democrats in 2024. We need to send a surge of resources to this must-win district right now, but we’re $5,000 short of our goal. Will you rush a donation right now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-may24?&refcode=&amount=]
Here’s what NBC News is reporting:
"A district in Orange County, California, is set to be one of the most competitive national races in the fight to control the House of Representatives. [...] California’s 47th Congressional District, where Asian American and Pacific Islanders make up a quarter of the population, has repeatedly flipped from Democrats to Republicans over the past decade.” [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-may24?&refcode=&amount=]
CHIP IN $ >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-may24?&refcode=&amount=]
This key battleground district is currently represented by Katie Porter who narrowly won this crucial swing seat in 2022, but now, new polling has this race in a virtual dead heat.
We won’t mince words:
➜ The U.S. House is going to AGAIN come down to California.
➜ The California Democratic Party is going on the OFFENSE , working to change purple districts to solid blue.
➜ But, if Republicans can flip this seat from blue to red, our work to secure a Democratic House Majority will become VIRTUALLY IMPOSSIBLE .
Will you rush a donation of $20.24 or more to ensure that Republicans don’t flip CA-47 and that their dreams of keeping a U.S. House Majority go up in smoke? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-may24?&refcode=&amount=]

body:
Friend,
First, thank you all for helping us raise almost $23,000 in the last day - it took a good chunk out of the $100,000 we need to raise in these final days.
To help us close that gap further, please hit this link: [https://BrandonHerreraforCongress.com/Donate](https://contact.brandonherreraforcongress.com/l/6fI53a1vdu7637OWRF387YCA/JT4lGGXiawGOJYzNeC9Q2g/rmaYyEchD4ybo6HS806UGg).
Someone forwarded this meme to me - it's too good not to share:
[](https://contact.brandonherreraforcongress.com/l/6fI53a1vdu7637OWRF387YCA/M57l88eNcuBsQxlRBJNmQg/rmaYyEchD4ybo6HS806UGg)
But it's also kind of true - and I get it - we've been sending out a lot of fundraising emails lately. But it's for a simple reason:
We need it.
Our opponent has outspent us ten-to-one. While our budget for this run-off is a little over a million, Tony Gonzales and his allies have spent nearly ten million - almost none of it raised from donors like you but almost entirely from "millionaires and billionaires" who run the special interests Tony serves.
One of those billionaires who has written seven-figure checks to help Tony is one of the largest Democrat donors in the country, Haim Saban. What do you think Tony has done to earn that contribution?
But I'm still confident we'll hit this final fundraising goal and confident we'll win because I have the support of constitution-loving Americans on my side.
And, of course, every $5 you donate will earn you an entry to win a trip for two to San Antonio and the opportunity to fire the AK-50 and be featured in an upcoming video.
We have just days left until Election Day: please give what you can at [https://BrandonHerreraforCongress.com/Donate](https://contact.brandonherreraforcongress.com/l/6fI53a1vdu7637OWRF387YCA/JT4lGGXiawGOJYzNeC9Q2g/rmaYyEchD4ybo6HS806UGg).
Thank you,
Brandon

But I'm still confident we'll hit this final fundraising goal and confident we'll win because I have the support of constitution-loving Americans on my side. And, of course, every $5 you donate will earn you an entry to win a trip for two to San Antonio and the opportunity to fire the AK-50 and be featured in an upcoming video. We have just days left until Election Day: please give what you can at . Thank you, Brandon Paid for by the Brandon Herrera Victory Committee

Fellow American,
America has been **DESTROYED.**
The DEEP STATE has attacked me.

I've been **IMPEACHED.**

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: Republicans are trying to buy this Senate seat
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| We’re facing a real risk of being drowned out by the flood of Republican spending.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=2682%2E35263%2E31PZ6S)
Peter — Our May fundraising deadline is just one week away, so I’ll cut right to the chase: **[Will you chip in to help us hit our grassroots fundraising goal? We just increased our monthly goal, and I’ll explain why in just a moment.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-may24.HLGTSS&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20240525_AM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=2682%2E35263%2E31PZ6S)** I’ll put it bluntly, Peter: Republicans are trying to buy this Senate seat. It began when national Republicans handpicked a California bank owner to run against me. Then, the self-funding megamillionaire outraised our campaign last quarter with the stroke of a pen when he cut himself a seven-figure check. Now, he’s using his personal fortune to help plaster the airwaves with campaign ads. If that weren’t enough, his Republican allies have swooped in to launch ads of their own directly attacking me and misrepresenting my record. Eric Hovde and these right-wing super PACs have spent more than $11 million in total already. **We’re facing a real risk of being drowned out by this flood of spending. That is, unless we can hit our increased fundraising goals and fight back with ads of our own.** **[We have one week left to reach our target. Can you chip in to help me defend Wisconsin’s Senate seat from the Republicans trying to buy it?](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-may24.HLGTSS&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20240525_AM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=2682%2E35263%2E31PZ6S)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3663?c0=tbe-em-may24.viyL1N&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20240525_AM1_V1_S1&t=6&akid=2682%2E35263%2E31PZ6S)

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Joe from Texas, Inc
body:
I am a God-fearing, America-loving business owner that simply wants to get the land that I love back on sound financial footing. |
---
[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=5ec740c54e1844dfbf6e9c0490a18268&_e=oM7uK1gUCGMa0gp_ACKAAhnqEnK-cWPjiLggb1XByLhd09QrTSk_05KmO_gZJctth_hbwwgnciqbpyQYazRBYtCMA9nRXwfgCjb1Qyip_2iNQVn5BGPT9M4gy5KRKz1i8tnQsSCspv-7my1C1fR_R9VdUioPBfkZmsst0ORGioYbrcKdOFjsBmZh56pFqpVbfJp6HPBuxcRV7qJc5bqrjUPAHMct2OLXWxoZGQVbyt3su9vPjdaWxTxq_BUOUvO-pnBssqnalglbstJrnSdHwPbjyc8a1CPAOkbNB7PFcF0-gXHv-6Um95J9HG2uRMcilh7D6G5-CDw43wxQ6fDeURYL-WupldAvWCJdQ-2uS1rMlaoiWfQHvq_GpudcGbJ7Q3iLbsYoM8TqFel5ttZC8Fs5y6lhc8ir4N1YZXTEWJBxI0sWIHdCcrFcOuEusX_q7Zk727dWn0nHzwVTY1G3hQ%3D%3D)

Dear Peter

Our great nation is on the precipice of collapse and sadly, we are a country in crisis. What is the cancer that is killing America from within? The almost [$35 trillion national debt! ](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=5ec740c54e1844dfbf6e9c0490a18268&_e=oM7uK1gUCGMa0gp_ACKAAhnqEnK-cWPjiLggb1XByLhd09QrTSk_05KmO_gZJctth_hbwwgnciqbpyQYazRBYtCMA9nRXwfgCjb1Qyip_2iNQVn5BGPT9M4gy5KRKz1i8tnQsSCspv-7my1C1fR_R9VdUioPBfkZmsst0ORGioYbrcKdOFjsBmZh56pFqpVbfJp6HPBuxcRV7qJc5bqrjUPAHMct2OLXWxoZGQVbyt3su9vPjdaWxTxq_BUOUvO-pnBssqnalglbstJrnSdHwPbjyc8a1CPAOkbNB7PFcF0-gXHv-6Um95J9HG2uRMciz9UpZb54yhlf0AiHQJ2GD0ibgMBR_XWGG9w2Hyh6mZcZ4WaxMAVyAnmO_PoDQF9_6Ank_bpbWKcSoT0UU4EZgDmBsqImAdg1rRDnYx9MUOehFtdCP7zp89bjs_MI90P6NIDqWFWdYMRscGNs9QIpEA%3D%3D) Every man, woman, and child must pay back $105,000 – I repeat, $105,000 each to eliminate this fiscal albatross.

[I’m Joe From Texas.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=5ec740c54e1844dfbf6e9c0490a18268&_e=oM7uK1gUCGMa0gp_ACKAAhnqEnK-cWPjiLggb1XByLhd09QrTSk_05KmO_gZJctth_hbwwgnciqbpyQYazRBYtCMA9nRXwfgCjb1Qyip_2iNQVn5BGPT9M4gy5KRKz1i8tnQsSCspv-7my1C1fR_R9VdUioPBfkZmsst0ORGioYbrcKdOFjsBmZh56pFqpVbfJp6HPBuxcRV7qJc5bqrjUPAHMct2OLXWxoZGQVbyt3su9vPjdaWxTxq_BUOUvO-pnBssqnalglbstJrnSdHwPbjyc8a1CPAOkbNB7PFcF0-gXHv-6Um95J9HG2uRMci2pkMPgPKb_822LO_Y8muTJIEnO9NpS4tPJZteC8NqRs8YvP8lhPEOGXH4h6VApxmkLGqZnuMSSmG6_uoEoGwuqEtGo1KM49AQZSLgvTaS9qQZVxqxomdACnRevaBYUjbuVptvTXBiAniFohQuHdO_g%3D%3D) Just like you, I am fed up with reckless politicians racking up debt and then sticking you with the bill. Your family is forced to tighten spending because you’re paying more to fill up your tank, put food on your table, and pay the rent. Unfortunately, Congress did not get the memo.

Their spending is out of control, making the financial burden on your children and grandchildren worsen by the day. That’s the bad news. The good news is that together, we can fix this. All it takes is signing our [Contract From the American People right here.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=5ec740c54e1844dfbf6e9c0490a18268&_e=oM7uK1gUCGMa0gp_ACKAAhnqEnK-cWPjiLggb1XByLhd09QrTSk_05KmO_gZJctth_hbwwgnciqbpyQYazRBYtCMA9nRXwfgCjb1Qyip_2iNQVn5BGPT9M4gy5KRKz1i8tnQsSCspv-7my1C1fR_R9VdUioPBfkZmsst0ORGioYbrcKdOFjsBmZh56pFqpVbfJp6HPBuxcRV7qJc5bqrjUPAHMct2OLXWxoZGQVbyt3su9vPjdaWxTxq_BUOUvO-pnBssqnalglbstJrnSdHwPbjyc8a1CPAOkbNB7PFcF0-gXHv-6Um95J9HG2uRMciHx1UIUJCpMyDzy-Cdsqwp13tCWLkgkO_gnyOe47GU2aPfvJPJ0ocJ4maPvuGu6z7aGx5JeX8-mKd-63YmtcN7mlM5LnDI6uWLRFuJuQ4nZSA1ejgfbUmKn8Hzo96v0lwDWE9XlYooHG-4Torz0ul5A%3D%3D)

Folks, I am not a politician. I am a God-fearing, America-loving [ business owner ](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=5ec740c54e1844dfbf6e9c0490a18268&_e=oM7uK1gUCGMa0gp_ACKAAhnqEnK-cWPjiLggb1XByLhd09QrTSk_05KmO_gZJctth_hbwwgnciqbpyQYazRBYtCMA9nRXwfgCjb1Qyip_2iNQVn5BGPT9M4gy5KRKz1i8tnQsSCspv-7my1C1fR_R9VdUioPBfkZmsst0ORGioYbrcKdOFjsBmZh56pFqpVbfJp6HPBuxcRV7qJc5bqrjUPAHMct2OLXWxoZGQVbyt3su9vPjdaWxTxq_BUOUvO-pnBssqnalglbstJrnSdHwPbjyc8a1CPAOkbNB7PFcF0-gXHv-6Um95J9HG2uRMcic8WB1IwIIobXgvNuu9TESVpn4Ff1xFKc9C_SmJco36j2p4jXz_LBLU9L5JW1S4cDJHrLr4uA2cRzlzWhH3AYsp_45Fhov0lz8EG5Ht9OgThxcn560tciJDTtLPi1QGWyh-yr6IB919lJ-JQ41ttikg%3D%3D)that simply wants to get the land that I love back on sound financial footing. That’s it. How easy it is to start a small business or do business year to year in our state is largely up to how easy the Secretary of State makes things. As a small business owner, I know Christi isn’t doing the work, and it’s time to change things up. I’m deeply appreciative of anything you can give. – Jesse Montana needs your help to defeat the Far Right and protect our values of caring, community, and free and fair Elections. Your donation will protect election integrity, public land access and build a friendlier secretary of state office for Montanans! Paid for by Mullen for Secretary of State

subject: 10 states. 13 candidates.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
Leaders We Deserve has now endorsed thirteen young candidates across the United States.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20240525&t=1&akid=724%2E587540%2Ey05SJ_)
Peter,
Leaders We Deserve has endorsed thirteen young candidates across the United States, who are energized and ready to take on the fight of our generation. They represent some of the best of our generation and the future of the Democratic Party. Here’s a map to show where exactly we are focusing our efforts this election cycle:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20240525?refcode=em20240525&amount=5&refcode2=724_587540_y05SJ_&akid=724%2E587540%2Ey05SJ_)
[**These young leaders are ready to bring positive change to their communities and we are leaving no stone unturned to make sure they get that opportunity. Can you pitch in $5 today to make sure nothing stands in our way of electing the Leaders We DESERVE?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20240525?refcode=em20240525&amount=5&refcode2=724_587540_y05SJ_&akid=724%2E587540%2Ey05SJ_)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20240525?amount=5&refcode=em20240525-724&refcode2=724_587540_y05SJ_&akid=724%2E587540%2Ey05SJ_)**
It’s our promise to you: **your donation will go towards uplifting a LWD endorsed race in one of the 10 highlighted states above.**
But we aren’t just going to send over some cash and pat ourselves on the back. Every dollar you donate will put LWD on the ground with campaign staff. We will work directly with the campaign’s staff to assess what strategies or tools would be most helpful.
With your help, we will work to supply each campaign with the tools they need to win their races — whether that’s more doors knocked, airing TV ads, campaign literature, or something else entirely.
[**So Peter, can we count on you to help fuel the fight by making a $5 donation to these 13 fearless young leaders as they tackle great odds to bring positive change into their communities?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20240525?refcode=em20240525&amount=5&refcode2=724_587540_y05SJ_&akid=724%2E587540%2Ey05SJ_)

Thanks for all that you do,
Leaders We Deserve
**P.S. Know about a young, progressive candidate who should be on our radar? Reply to this email and let us know!**

name: Lucas Kunce
subject: Reproductive rights are going on the ballot in Missouri this year.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
This issue wins time and time again – even in red states.
#
Abortion is going on the ballot in Missouri, Peter.
This spring, Missourians for Constitutional Freedom collected signatures from hundreds of thousands of Missourians who are ready to take back power over their own bodies, families, and lives from control-freak politicians like Josh Hawley.
They needed to collect at least 171,000 signatures.
But they didn’t just end up collecting 171,000 signatures. **Instead, over just 80 days, they collected _nearly 400,000 signatures._**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/51013?refcode=em20240525-5602&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=5602%2E614464%2EeNqCYS)
**[CHIP IN NOW](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/51013?refcode=em20240525-5602&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=5602%2E614464%2EeNqCYS)**
**This is a game changer for our U.S. Senate race here in Missouri.**
**Hawley has the worst record of anyone in the U.S. Senate on reproductive freedom.** He paved the way for Missouri’s extreme and cruel abortion ban by working to overturn Roe v. Wade. He co-sponsored a national abortion ban in the U.S. Senate. And now, the corrupt family business he started with his wife and donor judge has made it all the way to the Supreme Court in their case to ban the abortion pill mifepristone in all 50 states.
This is Josh Hawley’s first time up for re-election since leading this charge to outlaw abortion. And he’s about to see what voters think about Big Brother politicians like him.
When abortion is on the ballot, voters show up time and time again to take back their freedoms – even in red states. **And if recent election wins for abortion rights in states like Kansas, Kentucky, and Ohio have proven anything, it’s that Josh Hawley should be very afraid.**
This year, we’ll have a chance to end Missouri’s extreme abortion ban and hold Josh Hawley accountable for making it happen. But we need your help to get it done.
**[So Peter, will you help us take advantage of this incredible momentum by making a donation today? This is going to be a real fight to defeat Josh Hawley and protect abortion rights this year, but I know that with your support we’ll be able to take back power for everyday Missourians this November.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/51013?refcode=em20240525-5602&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=5602%2E614464%2EeNqCYS)**
