[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/51014?refcode=em20240525-5602&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=4&akid=5602%2E614464%2EeNqCYS) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/51014?refcode=em20240525-5602&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=5&akid=5602%2E614464%2EeNqCYS) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/51014?refcode=em20240525-5602&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=6&akid=5602%2E614464%2EeNqCYS) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/51014?refcode=em20240525-5602&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=7&akid=5602%2E614464%2EeNqCYS) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/51014?refcode=em20240525-5602&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=8&akid=5602%2E614464%2EeNqCYS) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/51014?refcode=em20240525-5602&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=9&akid=5602%2E614464%2EeNqCYS) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/51013?refcode=em20240525-5602&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=10&akid=5602%2E614464%2EeNqCYS)

Thanks for all your help, Peter.
Now let’s get to work,
— Lucas

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MAXWELL FROST FOR CONGRESS
body:
| [](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/XPjw22mzjuZBSxm1lrhRmw~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRoNJgHP0TOaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL21hZi1lbS1wZ2U_cmVmY29kZT0yMDI0MDUyNV9lbV9mcl9iMV90aGFuay15b3VfZW5fcnMmYW1vdW50PTI3JmNkbWM9Mmd2OUtCdFF6NTdSRkszQ2JyRW1SRmJRWXZKJnJlZmNvZGUyPTJndjlLQnRRejU3UkZLM0NickVtUkZiUVl2SiZyZWZjb2RlY2RtYz0yZ3Y5S0J0UXo1N1JGSzNDYnJFbVJGYlFZdkpXA3NwY0IKZkYHE1JmMppWWlIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAGk~) Peter, it’s Maxwell. I first need to thank you. I know there’s a lot of campaigns reaching out to you, so I’m beyond grateful for people like you who’ve paid attention and resonated with our message.

As the first Gen Z member in Congress, it's been the honor of a lifetime. The GOP establishment never expected us to be here, and will stop at nothing to defeat our youth-powered movement in November.

**So today, I’m asking you for $1. Yup. Literally just a dollar.**

I hate to have to ask but there is too much on the line - taking action on gun violence, protecting abortion access, and the bold change my generation is demanding - to give up now.

clean_body: | ~ Peter, it’s Maxwell. I first need to thank you. I know there’s a lot of campaigns reaching out to you, so I’m beyond grateful for people like you who’ve paid attention and resonated with our message. As the first Gen Z member in Congress, it's been the honor of a lifetime. The GOP establishment never expected us to be here, and will stop at nothing to defeat our youth-powered movement in November. So today, I’m asking you for $1. Yup. Literally just a dollar. I hate to have to ask but there is too much on the line - taking action on gun violence, protecting abortion access, and the bold change my generation is demanding - to give up now. An astounding, and profoundly humbling, 74,757 people have donated to this campaign. If everyone reading this chipped in just $1 as their very first contribution to my campaign, we’d blow past our weekly fundraising goal, but we only have until midnight. ~~ | | | ~~ ~ | ~ | I can't thank you enough, Maxwell ~~ ~ | PAID FOR BY MAXWELL FROST FOR CONGRESS Maxwell Frost for Congress PO Box 772671 Orlando, FL 32877-2671 United States | Maxwell is an organizer representing Florida's 10th Congressional District in Congress. name: Charlie Kirk, Turning Point Action
subject: How we're going to Chase the Vote
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TURNING POINT ACTION (TPACTION
body:
Please read the following message from our sponsor.

Friend

We're in the fight of our lives to save America,
and it's a fight we can't win without YOU!

Turning Point Action is leading the Right with
CHASE THE VOTE, our innovative ballot-chasing strategy to ensure
EVERY Conservative in a battleground state VOTES.

Friend, can I count on YOUR gift right now to help
support this MASSIVE and GAME-CHANGING ballot-chasing initiative?

For every dollar you donate, you'll help Turning
Point Action put MORE boots on the ground, knock on MORE doors,
and turn out MORE voters in the must-win precincts and states in
the 2024 Election.

Donate now and HELP WIN!

For years, the radical Left has beaten us in the
ballot game.

As recently as the 2022 Election, there was hope
for even more Conservative victories ... but not enough ballots
from Conservative voters were cast and delivered.

That's why, despite conservative majorities in
battleground states like Arizona, Georgia, and Wisconsin, we
didn't secure the victories we needed.

But we learned -- and now, with YOUR support,
Turning Point Action is determined to make a difference and get
out the vote to WIN BIG in 2024.

Turning Point Action's CHASE THE VOTE Initiative
can be a GAME-CHANGER for the Right, but only if I can count on
grassroots patriots like YOU for support.

Donate now and HELP WIN!

Imagine the impact of:

• THOUSANDS of patriotic voters reached and
registered,

• HUNDREDS of THOUSANDS of voters getting to
their polling locations or casting their ballots by mail, and

• getting out the vote to WIN BIG for True
Conservative Principles in Arizona, Georgia, Wisconsin, and
beyond in 2024.

Friend, your support can be the DECIDING FACTOR in
how many voters that Turning Point Action is able to reach,
register, and TURN OUT to vote in 2024 -- please, make your gift
right now to help.

Thank you for standing with me and Turning Point
Action.

I hope you're proud of the work you're already
accomplishing to help SAVE AMERICA from the radical Left, and I
can't wait to see how much more we're able to do for America's
future in the year to come.

For America,

Charlie Kirk

Founder

Turning Point Action

Support Turning Point Action

PAID FOR BY TURNING POINT ACTION (TPACTION.COM) AND
NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE.

4930 East Beverly Road

Phoenix, Arizona 85044

name: J. Tester
subject: Being a farmer makes me a better senator
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Debbie for Florida
body:
everything is on the line
| | |
---
Hello, in just a minute I’ll ask you to split a contribution between my campaign and Debbie Mucarsel-Powell's ahead of our critical weekly deadline, but first I hope you’ll give me a moment to explain why it’s so important to give — especially today.
I grew up on my family’s farm, and Sharla and I still work that land today. In my opinion, being a farmer makes me a better senator. My background is a big part of the reason I remain grounded and focused on defending our Montana way of life. Because with all the chaos in Washington (especially now), you need somebody who will roll up their sleeves and get to work.
Last time I ran, nearly $70 million was spent on the Montana Senate race. This time around, we’ve already passed that number: **A****n eye-popping $120 million has been spent or reserved in advertising alone.** It’ll take a lot of support from this team to raise what we’ll need to protect this seat.
And if you know me, I’m not the kind of person who likes to ask for money. But I bet Mitch McConnell would be _furious_ if we showed him that a whole lot of grassroots power is stronger than his wealthy donors and super PACs will ever be.
Let’s be clear: **This election isn’t a sure thing.** Experts say this race is a toss-up and rank Montana as one of the seats most likely to flip. That’s why it’s SO important you make a contribution today — everything is on the line.
Everyone — including Mitch McConnell — is watching what we raise to judge the strength of this team. **I don’t expect you to chip in every time I ask, but I need you on my side now more than ever to show our opponents we’re ready to fight back and win.**
[**Will you split a contribution between my campaign and Debbie's today? It couldn’t come at a more critical moment:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85618952/475359466/1318177582?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1256-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGFkN2M5YzQtYjQxYS1lZjExLTg2ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Ki4DTwFHFpsZrHD48fU6i-AdyvVUCrsAm-quuAPhpPU=)

clean_body: everything is on the line | | | Hello, in just a minute I’ll ask you to split a contribution between my campaign and Debbie Mucarsel-Powell's ahead of our critical weekly deadline, but first I hope you’ll give me a moment to explain why it’s so important to give — especially today. I grew up on my family’s farm, and Sharla and I still work that land today. In my opinion, being a farmer makes me a better senator. My background is a big part of the reason I remain grounded and focused on defending our Montana way of life. Because with all the chaos in Washington (especially now), you need somebody who will roll up their sleeves and get to work. Last time I ran, nearly $70 million was spent on the Montana Senate race. This time around, we’ve already passed that number: An eye-popping $120 million has been spent or reserved in advertising alone. It’ll take a lot of support from this team to raise what we’ll need to protect this seat. And if you know me, I’m not the kind of person who likes to ask for money. But I bet Mitch McConnell would be furious if we showed him that a whole lot of grassroots power is stronger than his wealthy donors and super PACs will ever be. Let’s be clear: This election isn’t a sure thing. Experts say this race is a toss-up and rank Montana as one of the seats most likely to flip. That’s why it’s SO important you make a contribution today — everything is on the line. Everyone — including Mitch McConnell — is watching what we raise to judge the strength of this team. I don’t expect you to chip in every time I ask, but I need you on my side now more than ever to show our opponents we’re ready to fight back and win. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Jon Tester and Debbie Mucarsel-Powell will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = You and I have won tough battles before, and I’m confident we’ll do it again. Thanks for sticking with me. — Jon | * | | | = Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is a Floridian, South American immigrant, mother, and former Congresswoman. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85619362/475360785/872526041?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZDZjZmUyZi1iNTFhLWVmMTEtODZkMC02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Skqwt92E2gr5vq7i8VifUGaq92wz4kDLWPJ7dibeGxw=&emci=70404580-b41a-ef11-86d0-6045bdd9e096&emdi=8d6cfe2f-b51a-ef11-86d0-6045bdd9e096&ceid=19445147)

Hello,
Do you know what a “tracker” is? I had never heard the term until after I decided to first run for office against Lauren Boebert in 2022.
“Trackers” are essentially professional stalkers – the political version of paparazzi. They’re paid by Super PACs or groups funded by the Koch brothers to follow you around with a video camera everywhere you go. Often, they yell ridiculous questions and try to get you to say something that they can then edit up and spin into a fake scandal or put in attack ads.
Well, the first tracker of the campaign has begun showing up to my events with voters – recording every word I say and every breath I take.
This is going to be one of the closest and most important races on Election Night. In 2022, I lost to Lauren Boebert by just 546 votes.
We can win this critical House seat, but the Super PACs are coming after me. They know how close this race is going to be – especially now that Lauren Boebert has run off scared.
**I’m not taking money from corporate PACs, so if we’re going to be able to fight back against their lies, I’m counting on you. We need to raise another $150,000 before our end-of-May fundraising deadline if we’re going to win this House seat, and right now, we’re still very short.**
[**Please, will you give $5, $25, or whatever you can afford before our critical fundraising deadline to help me win this critical House seat and replace Lauren Boebert in Congress?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85619364/475360787/1610638071?refcode=em20240525am-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=8d6cfe2f-b51a-ef11-86d0-6045bdd9e096&recurring=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZDZjZmUyZi1iNTFhLWVmMTEtODZkMC02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Skqwt92E2gr5vq7i8VifUGaq92wz4kDLWPJ7dibeGxw=)

clean_body: Do you know what a “tracker” is? Hello, Do you know what a “tracker” is? I had never heard the term until after I decided to first run for office against Lauren Boebert in 2022. “Trackers” are essentially professional stalkers – the political version of paparazzi. They’re paid by Super PACs or groups funded by the Koch brothers to follow you around with a video camera everywhere you go. Often, they yell ridiculous questions and try to get you to say something that they can then edit up and spin into a fake scandal or put in attack ads. Well, the first tracker of the campaign has begun showing up to my events with voters – recording every word I say and every breath I take. This is going to be one of the closest and most important races on Election Night. In 2022, I lost to Lauren Boebert by just 546 votes. We can win this critical House seat, but the Super PACs are coming after me. They know how close this race is going to be – especially now that Lauren Boebert has run off scared. I’m not taking money from corporate PACs, so if we’re going to be able to fight back against their lies, I’m counting on you. We need to raise another $150,000 before our end-of-May fundraising deadline if we’re going to win this House seat, and right now, we’re still very short. = Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = I’m running for Congress because I care about the people of Western and Southern Colorado. I want to be a representative who will actually work every day for Colorado water, energy, and jobs – not for personal gain or the whims of corporate donors. But the only way I can get that message out and correct the lies they’re going to tell about me is with your donation now to my campaign. Thank you for everything you do. With gratitude - Adam ** Paid for by Adam for Colorado. Adam for Colorado PO Box 1240 Glenwood Springs, CO 81602 United States Contributions or gifts to Adam for Colorado are not tax deductible.

name: Jane PAC
subject: Penguins work together, and so should we 🐧
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
Why penguins?

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/85619670/475361193/1328794144?refcode=ea.266f75e1-b51a-ef11-86d0-6045bdd9e096&ms=ea.266f75e1-b51a-ef11-86d0-6045bdd9e096&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI2NmY3NWUxLWI1MWEtZWYxMS04NmQwLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=CjuaCndbMOC0-s6SU5FgKVpeqA-8DTVXfZBMFepmyio=&emci=58eecb18-3719-ef11-86d0-6045bdd9e096&emdi=266f75e1-b51a-ef11-86d0-6045bdd9e096&ceid=4823105)
---
**Just like us, penguins face an existential threat from the climate crisis.** The Antarctic peninsula is one of the fastest-warming places on Earth. The loss of Antarctic sea ice caused by rising global temperatures could wipe out _over 90%_ of emperor penguins by the end of the century. In Chile, rising ocean temperatures, changing wind patterns, and acidification are disrupting the marine ecosystem, making it increasingly harder for Patagonian penguins to find food. And in even more disturbing — but not isolated — cases, penguins have been caught directly in the crossfire of ecological disasters caused by oil. In one case, more than 20,000 endangered penguins on a remote island were coated in oil after a damaged ship leaked more than 800 tons (!) of crude oil into the ocean. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/85619671/475361194/-365124088?refcode=ea.266f75e1-b51a-ef11-86d0-6045bdd9e096&ms=ea.266f75e1-b51a-ef11-86d0-6045bdd9e096&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI2NmY3NWUxLWI1MWEtZWYxMS04NmQwLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=CjuaCndbMOC0-s6SU5FgKVpeqA-8DTVXfZBMFepmyio=) **Biodiversity is like a complex puzzle, and each species is a tiny, but critical piece.** Taking away even one piece, like the fish population penguins depend on, damages the whole puzzle — and the ecosystem at large. _So, what can we do about it?_ We need to elect climate champions who understand this delicate puzzle, and the role we play in it. **[If you can, make a donation now to help us elect climate champions who understand the complex nature of biodiversity, and the role we play in it >>>](https://click.everyaction.com/k/85619672/475361195/-365124088?refcode=ea.266f75e1-b51a-ef11-86d0-6045bdd9e096&ms=ea.266f75e1-b51a-ef11-86d0-6045bdd9e096&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI2NmY3NWUxLWI1MWEtZWYxMS04NmQwLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=CjuaCndbMOC0-s6SU5FgKVpeqA-8DTVXfZBMFepmyio=)** | [**TAKE ACTION →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/85619673/475361196/-365124088?refcode=ea.266f75e1-b51a-ef11-86d0-6045bdd9e096&ms=ea.266f75e1-b51a-ef11-86d0-6045bdd9e096&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI2NmY3NWUxLWI1MWEtZWYxMS04NmQwLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=CjuaCndbMOC0-s6SU5FgKVpeqA-8DTVXfZBMFepmyio=)
---
**_We can learn a lot from penguins._** Emperor penguins live in one of the most extreme environments on Earth. But they work together to survive — and thrive — on the inhospitable Arctic sea ice.
Male and female penguins take turns incubating their eggs in the dead of winter. When temperatures dip to lows of -50 degrees Fahrenheit, the entire colony comes together to form a giant huddle for warmth. Penguins on the inside of the huddle take tiny steps and gradually move in waves that rotate the penguins on the outside of the huddle to the warm center.
**No penguin is left out alone in the cold.**
This is an important lesson for our movement. None of us stand a chance against nihilistic fossil fuel billionaires if we stand alone. But standing together, we will build a movement that can weather the most brutal storms, and protect the ecosystems we all depend on, from people to penguins.
Look, we’re not the only ones feeling the effects of the climate crisis, and the impacts — on even our smallest fellows — matter. **[Gift a contribution today](https://click.everyaction.com/k/85619674/475361197/-365124088?refcode=ea.266f75e1-b51a-ef11-86d0-6045bdd9e096&ms=ea.266f75e1-b51a-ef11-86d0-6045bdd9e096&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI2NmY3NWUxLWI1MWEtZWYxMS04NmQwLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=CjuaCndbMOC0-s6SU5FgKVpeqA-8DTVXfZBMFepmyio=)** to elect climate champions who understand the complex nature of biodiversity and the role we play in it.
Thank you,
The (penguin lovers) at Jane PAC
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/85619675/475361198/2105508926?refcode=ea.266f75e1-b51a-ef11-86d0-6045bdd9e096&ms=ea.266f75e1-b51a-ef11-86d0-6045bdd9e096&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI2NmY3NWUxLWI1MWEtZWYxMS04NmQwLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=CjuaCndbMOC0-s6SU5FgKVpeqA-8DTVXfZBMFepmyio=) | [**DONATE TODAY**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/85619676/475361199/2105508926?refcode=ea.266f75e1-b51a-ef11-86d0-6045bdd9e096&ms=ea.266f75e1-b51a-ef11-86d0-6045bdd9e096&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI2NmY3NWUxLWI1MWEtZWYxMS04NmQwLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=CjuaCndbMOC0-s6SU5FgKVpeqA-8DTVXfZBMFepmyio=)

[**DONATE MONTHLY**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/85619677/475361200/2105508926?recurring=true&refcode=ea.266f75e1-b51a-ef11-86d0-6045bdd9e096&ms=ea.266f75e1-b51a-ef11-86d0-6045bdd9e096&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI2NmY3NWUxLWI1MWEtZWYxMS04NmQwLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=CjuaCndbMOC0-s6SU5FgKVpeqA-8DTVXfZBMFepmyio=)

name: Senator John Kennedy
subject: Jellyfish have more brains than the liberals
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Kennedy for Us
body:
I know. Total Shocker.

|
---
Folks,

**_I have hope for my Liberal friends ...jellyfish have survived for more than 165 million years without a brain, so there is hope for a few of them._**

Just going over the numbers so far and it's looking like it could be one of my worst months in recent memory. I'm not asking for much, but a few dollars would go a long way.

**[If you are on my team and have a brain, unlike the D.C. Radicals, then I'm asking for a quick donation to get us situated for this month. For years, Sherrod has been a progressive leader delivering results for Ohio families.
There’s a reason Sherrod is beloved by the labor movement — he’s a fierce champion for workers and unions.
As chairman of the Senate Committee on Banking, Housing, and Urban Affairs, Sherrod and I are working together to make sure the economy runs for the American people, not the wealthy elite and mega-corporations.
Sherrod is a great colleague and friend — but he’s in for a tough re-election this November.
Trump personally endorsed Sherrod’s far-right opponent, who just so happens to have millions of dollars to bankroll his own campaign. And Sherrod is already being attacked on the airwaves by GOP super PACs.
**The U.S. Senate needs Sherrod Brown — and that’s why I’m asking:**

body:
We’re preparing for a competitive and challenging election cycle over the next three months. Can we count on your support today?
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20240525-3914-footer&t=1&akid=3914%2E420207%2EqwS9wJ)

name: VoteVets.org
subject: The hypocrisy of these people
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS ACTION FUND
body:
The National Republican Congressional Committee and Republican candidates are running ads and attacks on social media, calling Democratic Veterans terrorists.
#
Derek, the Republican Party plays with Military pay and benefits on a regular basis every time they tease a government shutdown.
They held up the promotions of HUNDREDS of our most senior officers over a political stunt trying to limit access to abortion.
They blocked support for our international allies for MONTHS.
They REFUSED to come to the table and provide care for Veterans suffering from toxic exposures.
And who fixed every single one of these problems?
The Democrats.
Democrats back the GOP into a corner and get the government funded every time they shut it down. Democrats took the fight to Tuberville and his abortion warriors and got our officers confirmed. Democrats forced the MAGA-right to pass critical aid for our allies who are under attack. Democrats got the PACT Act passed after decades of fighting.
VoteVets played a critical role in each of these fights. We’re often the only organization on the left playing any role in these fights, to be honest with you.
And another fight is emerging right now.
The National Republican Congressional Committee and Republican candidates are running ads and attacks on social media, calling Democratic Veterans terrorists. They’re saying Veterans who put their lives on the line, in uniform, to defend America, support terrorism.
The stench of hypocrisy here is almost too much to stand. It’s false. It’s insulting. It’s dishonorable. But it’s entirely representative of the MAGA GOP in 2024.
We’re going to need all hands on deck to start fighting against these attacks. Can we count on you in the fights ahead?
[**Make a donation to VoteVets today and help us fight back against the GOP. We can’t do this alone, and almost all of the money we raise comes from emails like this and supporters like you. We need your help.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-c4-em-may24.RUuZX0&refcode=em240525-1-30&t=1&akid=25138%2E3013755%2EHzYZz_)

name: David Flippo
subject: Flippo is A Rated with Gun Owners of America
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Committee To Elect David Flippo]( "Paid for by The Committee To Elect David Flippo")
body:
The Second Amendment is a fundamental part of what makes our Nation resilient and free, and Democrats want to take that away from you... |
---
| | Peter,

I hope this message finds you well. Today, I write to you not just as a candidate for Nevada’s 4th Congressional District, but as a fellow citizen deeply committed to the preservation of our constitutional rights, particularly the Second Amendment.

On October 7th, we witnessed a stark reminder of the essential role that the right to bear arms plays in our safety and sovereignty. The tragic events in Israel, where private gun ownership is highly restricted, underscored the vulnerability that comes with such limitations. This incident could have unfolded differently if the principles we hold dear in America were applied—principles that empower citizens to defend themselves and their loved ones.

As we stand with Israel, our greatest ally, it is crucial that we also stand firm in our commitment to our Constitution. Make no mistake:**the Democrats will betray your rights, just like they have betrayed Israel.**

The Second Amendment is a fundamental part of what makes our Nation resilient and free. It is a right that we must cherish and defend as it ensures not only our security but also that of our future generations.
---
| [ ](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=421d92d6b1&e=273c9a71fb)
---
|
# **This is why I am A-Rated by the
Gun Owners of America. **
Your support is vital in helping us advocate for policies that protect our constitutional rights and in promoting awareness of the importance of these rights. Together, we can ensure that the values we hold are preserved and respected, so that America can once again be that Shining City on a Hill.

Please consider making a contribution to our campaign. Your donation, whether $50, $100, or more, will go directly towards our efforts to advocate for a safer, stronger, and freer America. You can make your contribution by following this link:
---
| [DONATE NOW](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=4ed5a55927&e=273c9a71fb "DONATE NOW")
---
| | Thank you for your continued support and for standing with us in these critical times. Let us reaffirm our commitment to our rights, to our safety, and to our allies. Together, we are unstoppable.

In Liberty,

Lt. Col. David Flippo
---
| [ ](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=b218aa70ee&e=273c9a71fb)

| David Flippo, Lt. Col. (USAF Ret.)

body:
NY-16 heads to the ballot box in just one month.

George Latimer is a lifelong Westchester resident who has built a career in public service by delivering unparalleled progressive results for local residents. Now, he's taking that work to the next level by running to represent New York's 16th District in Congress. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/-Phg2RhDIEGJVPbb5vK87g2?unsubscribedata=SElSIHcSgpn6G2YIx7gURc9mj%2FBkt03fYAyYj4Idfeed%2BoiejPJqzTGaL8zXkdXUsCrlaDeIESidHinK8Jw1sjbJYYeFHBGwnq0cuEnbt%2FyZTqHIVQqZO%2F1Oeld7gVBg5pl863wwbfNvdAoOaY1yBluhTcyt%2Bp1qSvwROLhAxqB5HDysBIMgUmy4JmC5fKbAiHtJbfoXLty2EDJZ3U7V3wAwmiSrVr4kn1eWI7HxbA63td5R7GIyQ1cvqCNasDzEXETchGKfHh7glfIYiakYi1IeEW3ygp1e6OmH6nPSNVCKbYU3Bu4M8iKEfLlQqWxS02H2G5qw02Gxnj19Znbq4Iw7SKFFXAbiePrYw7Tz6rQu0lF%2BC0FqqjHn6N4Lk56EvQ9r4v%2FfKKreWz%2FPHcj3u0fD34oeMbpkCtM3ABWOe9aZG2%2FmRCi5WNZMNi0TG92z)

Peter, one month from today, NY-16 will head to the polls and cast their ballots in the primary election. It’s what has allowed me to make **incredible progress** for the people of NY-16 over the last three decades, and it’s what will determine every move I make in the halls of Congress. name: Maxwell Frost
subject: why wouldn’t you want regular, working people in Congress?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
What they don’t realize is that their favorite attack line is actually something we need more of.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/85623051/475364933/2725734?refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2024-05-25_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNhZWFhOThjLWI4MWEtZWYxMS04NmQwLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=mPWUdqpm4PZQ1dg5SeF-mRqY8wnWDuw4RIBDy2nTVXM=)
---
Peter, I’ve gotten a lot of pushback since I first announced I was running for Congress. People said I was too young. That I didn’t look or act like a Congressman. That my legislative priorities were too pie-in-the-sky.

But there’s one subject Republicans can’t get _enough_ of attacking me for: not being rich.

What they don’t realize is that their favorite attack line is actually something we need _more_ of.

**We need and deserve young, working, everyday people in Congress who know firsthand the struggles of the working class – and I’m proud to represent us. But increasing our ranks means building an unbeatable organizing movement, and to do that, I need as much grassroots support as I can get. I need you, Peter**

[_**If you believe in having representatives who can _actually_ represent the lives real people live, will you split a donation between Fight for Progress and my campaign right now? Every dollar helps me keep fighting for us in Congress, and build a fair future for the working class >>**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/85623052/475364934/1736965664?refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2024-05-25_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNhZWFhOThjLWI4MWEtZWYxMS04NmQwLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=mPWUdqpm4PZQ1dg5SeF-mRqY8wnWDuw4RIBDy2nTVXM=)
| [CONTRIBUTE ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/85623053/475364935/1736965664?refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2024-05-25_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNhZWFhOThjLWI4MWEtZWYxMS04NmQwLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=mPWUdqpm4PZQ1dg5SeF-mRqY8wnWDuw4RIBDy2nTVXM=)
---
I’ll never apologize for having humble beginnings – because my family _fought_ to give me what chances I’ve had. My abuela, mom, and aunt fled Cuba in the 1960s with no money, and without knowing English. My abuela worked multiple factory jobs just to give her kids a better shot.

It’s her legacy I’m carrying forward when I walk onto the House floor, team. Because working people know – we’re in this together.

But let’s be real: You shouldn’t have to be working class to care about working class _priorities_. **You don’t need to be rejected by an apartment, or become houseless, or drive Uber to make ends meet – all of which I’ve done – to know that our economy isn’t working for everybody. You just have to care.**

[_**I’m fighting to stay in Congress because I care, Peter. But the born-rich Republican donor class hates that, and will spend whatever it takes to hold me back. I need your help to stay here and build the world we deserve despite them. clean_body: What they don’t realize is that their favorite attack line is actually something we need more of. | = Peter, I’ve gotten a lot of pushback since I first announced I was running for Congress. People said I was too young. That I didn’t look or act like a Congressman. That my legislative priorities were too pie-in-the-sky. But there’s one subject Republicans can’t get enough of attacking me for: not being rich. What they don’t realize is that their favorite attack line is actually something we need more of. We need and deserve young, working, everyday people in Congress who know firsthand the struggles of the working class – and I’m proud to represent us. But increasing our ranks means building an unbeatable organizing movement, and to do that, I need as much grassroots support as I can get. I need you, Peter = | = I’ll never apologize for having humble beginnings – because my family fought to give me what chances I’ve had. My abuela, mom, and aunt fled Cuba in the 1960s with no money, and without knowing English. My abuela worked multiple factory jobs just to give her kids a better shot. It’s her legacy I’m carrying forward when I walk onto the House floor, team. Because working people know – we’re in this together. But let’s be real: You shouldn’t have to be working class to care about working class priorities. You don’t need to be rejected by an apartment, or become houseless, or drive Uber to make ends meet – all of which I’ve done – to know that our economy isn’t working for everybody. You just have to care. = | = | = | = | = | = In this together, Maxwell * | | = Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee. name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Intel
subject: What is the Great Reset?
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWLBaTTWpN

My name is Larry P. Arnn, and I'm the president of Hillsdale
College, a Christian liberal arts college in southern Michigan.

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWLBaTTWpN

Please see a special message from our
sponsor:

Dear
Fellow American,

My name
is Larry P. Arnn, and I'm the president of Hillsdale College, a
Christian liberal arts college in southern Michigan. Hillsdale
was founded in 1844 with the mission of providing "sound
learning" of the kind needed to preserve "the blessings of civil
and religious liberty."

A few
years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World
Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great
Reset initiative.

What is
their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short,
they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab-the
founder and executive director of the Forum-wrote, "We need a
'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would
also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This
initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt
to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some
social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a
seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic
of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we can communicate directly with
you.

In this
seminar, we consider the idea of the Great Reset and its
implications for America. But that's not all. We also delve into
pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

Sign up
now using the secure link below, and we'll send the Great Reset
seminar lectures-absolutely free-directly to your inbox.
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/63209896:WLBaTTWpN:m:3:2627245898:8570A23E28E6A160443B3270FB79187C:r

Don't
miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the
defense of American liberty.

Use the
link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm
regards,

Larry P.
Arnn

President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing
Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: Team Kennedy
subject: RFK Jr’s Weekly Message & Upcoming Events!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
"I am available any day of the week to debate."

|
---
| | | [](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_5_24_24_a1&n=1)
---

Upcoming Events: Join Us for a Memorable Experience!
[Santa Monica, California](https://www.kennedy24.com/santa-monica-reception?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_5_24_24_a1&n=2) \- Sunday, June 2nd at 6:00 PM
Join us for an exclusive reception with Robert F. Kennedy Jr. and Cheryl Hines at a private venue in beautiful Santa Monica. Enjoy an evening of hors d’oeuvres, cocktails, a fireside chat, and a unique photo opportunity.
[Edmonds, Washington](https://www.kennedy24.com/edmonds-reception?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_5_24_24_a1&n=3) \- Sunday, June 9th at 4:00 PM
Experience an evening of elegance with Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. at a stunning waterfront venue. This exclusive fundraiser offers a fireside chat, a Q&A session, and gourmet hors d'oeuvres and cocktails.
[Glendale, California](https://www.kennedy24.com/glendale-reception-june?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_5_24_24_a1&n=4) \- Thursday, June 13th at 6:00 PM
Don’t miss this exclusive reception with Robert F. Kennedy Jr. at a private venue in Glendale. This special fundraising event includes a fireside chat, Q&A session, and a photo opportunity with RFK Jr.
* * *
RFK Jr.: Demand Open Debates! Sign the Petition
I am available any day of the week to debate.
President Biden and Former President Trump have agreed to 2 debates with one of the rules being no other candidates allowed. What are they afraid of?
The answer is obvious: Me - coming up strong in the polls.
**I am the only presidential candidate in history who has polled ahead of both major party candidates in head-to-head races.**
In fact, I am well ahead of President Biden and tied with Former President Trump among Independents. **_That is 70 million Americans_!**
The largest and most accurate polling firm in this election cycle, Zogby confirmed this in their recent poll of head-to-head matchups.
The American people deserve to see the top candidates debate.
**To make this happen, I need your help.** [Please sign our petition today to support our call for open debates. Every signature counts and brings us closer to ensuring that all voices are heard on the debate stage.](https://www.kennedy24.com/debate-petition?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_5_24_24_a1&n=5)
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://www.kennedy24.com/debate-petition?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_5_24_24_a1&n=6)
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/debate-petition?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_5_24_24_a1&n=7)

name: Casey HQ
subject: Extremely expensive
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=3070%2E552475%2EtuXQaI)
Peter, we’re worried.
**[We just got out of a team-wide call, and we’re still behind on our fundraising — so before we go any further, we need to ask: Will you chip in $5 to help turn things around?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240525-2?refcode=em20240525-2&refcode2=3070_552475_tuXQaI&akid=3070%2E552475%2EtuXQaI)**
Pennsylvania’s Senate race is on track to be one of the most expensive in the country — millions will be spent on ads to blanket Pennsylvania’s airwaves, and recent polls show that the race is tightening. With the Senate majority hinging on what we do in this race, we have to close the fundraising gap.
Donations to emails like this are a huge part of our budget, and they power this campaign. So after this not-so-great update, we need your help to turn things around.
**[Can we count on you to chip in today? Your contribution could help make the difference between a red and blue Senate.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240525-2?refcode=em20240525-2&refcode2=3070_552475_tuXQaI&akid=3070%2E552475%2EtuXQaI)**
**[Donate ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240525-2?refcode=em20240525-2&refcode2=3070_552475_tuXQaI&akid=3070%2E552475%2EtuXQaI)**
If we come together now, we’ll win together in November.
Let’s do this,
Team Casey

* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=3070%2E552475%2EtuXQaI)
* [Update Your Information](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://go.bobcasey.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=3070%2E552475%2EtuXQaI)

To give by check:
Bob Casey for Senate
PO Box 58746
Philadelphia, PA 19102
Email us: [info@bobcasey.com](mailto:info@bobcasey.com)
PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC.

body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85624472/475369350/-240735101?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMDMzNWYxZC1iYjFhLWVmMTEtODZkMC02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JtSFKL-7gQ_FxqqVZ_mGv6pvJkuRfgSRVFi7jaXW1Gg=) If we lose this battleground district in November, there’s no way we can flip control of the House. Both parties know it, which is why Speaker Mike Johnson and his allies have named Sharice Davids a top target for defeat — and why they’ve already started spending against her. **So we need a surge of grassroots donations to keep Sharice in Congress, and with our May fundraising deadline just a few days away, we started updating our fundraising records. Here’s what we have on file for you:** | **Name:** | \--
---|---
**Your Sharice for Congress Supporter Status** | ** INACTIVE **
**Next Deadline** | May 31, 2024
**Your Suggested Donation** | **$5 -**[_**Click here to donate now >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85624474/475369352/1879636074?refcode=email_052524_Supporter-record&amount=5&amounts=5,15,25,50,75,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMDMzNWYxZC1iYjFhLWVmMTEtODZkMC02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JtSFKL-7gQ_FxqqVZ_mGv6pvJkuRfgSRVFi7jaXW1Gg=)
_NOTE: If you’ve given in the last week, or under a different email address, the record above may not reflect your contribution. Rest assured, we received it and are grateful for your support!_
The fact is, this is a critical moment in our race. Speaker Johnson just personally sent money to Sharice’s opponent. GOP Super PACs are already running digital ads attacking Sharice’s record. **And we still have quite a bit of ground to make up in the next six days if we’re going to close out May with the resources to fight back against an onslaught of opposition spending.**
[_**This is an all-hands-on-deck campaign to re-elect Kansas’ only Democratic representative in Congress — one of the most effective leaders we have, but also one facing a LOT of attacks from extremists who are targeting this seat. Bernie was born in Bogota, Colombia. At age five, his American Dream began when he moved to the United States with his family. Bernie became an American citizen at age 18.

Through his relentless work ethic and untamable entrepreneurial spirit, he turned the first car dealership that he purchased in 2005 into one of the largest dealership groups in America.

In 2016, Bernie recognized the value and transformational potential of blockchain technology, before it received mainstream attention, and moved much of his volunteer time and investment dollars into the space. In 2018 he co-founded ChampTitles, which grew to be quite successful as Bernie served as Chairman of the Board.

After a long, successful career, Bernie sold most of his business to begin focusing on his calling: protecting the American dream for another generation.

Solving our country’s problems requires common sense. In Washington, Bernie will fight to shrink government, protect our freedoms, stop the Chinese Communist party from taking our data and land, and always put America First.

Ohioans are done with politicians who talk a big game and do nothing. Bernie wants to go to D.C. to get work done – just like he always has.

In 2016, Bernie recognized the value and transformational potential of blockchain technology, before it received mainstream attention, and moved much of his volunteer time and investment dollars into the space. In 2018 he co-founded ChampTitles, which grew to be quite successful as Bernie served as Chairman of the Board. After a long, successful career, Bernie sold most of his business to begin focusing on his calling: protecting the American dream for another generation. Solving our country’s problems requires common sense. In Washington, Bernie will fight to shrink government, protect our freedoms, stop the Chinese Communist party from taking our data and land, and always put America First. Ohioans are done with politicians who talk a big game and do nothing. Bernie wants to go to D.C. to get work done – just like he always has. FOLLOW BERNIE ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | Paid for by Bernie Moreno for Senate Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go: .

body:

Friend, Rashida has officially filed petition signatures to be on the ballot for her re-election campaign for Congress. **This is the first big step in Rashida’s re-election and it’s thanks to supporters like you who are powering our campaign.** [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtgpTt5uIZZI26HHaaljGsx1kaRIl8NZU7eAwohqEoAX8XJ96bthdLzi_jBnsGFn9pO8Kerkdz_FEUaGLCoPuj5dTeWhQV56y2AFt636tAEdloSJt6caY1SEq3SvczQoihqkyxLnE_ed9aKCZxL6K2Olrb3o87EZx-8T3mWkY9Ide--qURnq85n_bOaap1MoB2NGoUVC59nU16M7uXIZbANfL3opqvYoK8p6NmyLyq-L2-llp9jDs7y3qXrtCk6ugLjJSvzzrwi_sKHNzlTRn9ctBRcB4FFEaGJn5bGjeVof6H_4DhqP7MqN7MOknlV2_ykMMSXmmSIKBI2yYj2HvyjrnJ6RVxDTpR_m8ywxBjgJEPhmAUQLM87Ae69-mI8tiuS5ECk5CFo1Ch3tg77CvMQwW16kfYyxdkNc_nCt61yKbW1_VfpDUjAkRCGCWEFflrT3M4L8fMlwFsUVEZGzKhUD6xK-jHAb3DzrZGsXJvDFxskK-fRI4JwrTgZMpl4CnA/46n/5BH2p8-1Q_67C9pyusI2PA/h1/h001.UCjOXnzFfKAXWlFkycr2mGevDKqsQ6a3o4xe0Rn7jss) Thanks to our growing field team who are knocking on doors and organizing events, we were able to collect and submit the needed signatures ahead of the deadline—from supporters in each community in the district. **It’s important that our field operations are up and running now, because this is how we push back against a multi-million-dollar attack campaign.** AIPAC and its network spent $1 million in 2022 on a campaign seeking to misconstrue Rashida’s record of advocating for her constituents and all marginalized people. This year they’ve already spent more than $100,000 on Islamophobic attacks against Rashida, and they’re trying to defeat other progressive lawmakers as well. We run robust grassroots re-election programs, connecting directly with district residents and prioritizing being rooted in the community. When Rashida is on the ballot, she also uplifts working class candidates and candidates of color who are demanding equal rights for all. [**Donate today to Rashida’s re-election campaign and split your donation between her campaign and Rashida’s Rooted in Community Leadership PAC to support the next generation of leaders, from State Houses to Congress.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtgpTt5uIZZI26HHaaljGsx1kaRIl8NZU7eAwohqEoAX8XJ96bthdLzi_jBnsGFn9rbxkR5jid4bOUqMY9RuOUnKba6via0xu9MkvTs8pW6nXvatknUoMl8Qe7yr0dJxUPSwJ6CiFh4-FaEJNKLBOPa1oa8_zM_NRKplFr-yyVHC1ZWXMXNnKh6KayS17SJtoAj-JQbSe1op5kI8OqGtJ1pN_NhpO-ZTBMrxt_yA1-pKA69WaaTO40jSjr0wDlMDh-tVoj2GTac6oNe3kr_KjP6N8yosbqgxSM61Y4f9POI5RmVDIjOcW04P0-O0MbPHTtEpKE8kNZZMtGXpxV6YkdGRIREta_-M8dK_bS4__8ndaqjTA4zXrFs1rHJjAJNpwJgRujs0iXxBPsHvTHZLqUQe88dvRkTV2oyGpnLeSLht-hnVXKvsLPeF1XufjP3mQR0fBhJlrQx1ZaJnN0OPQbdepDnBINkNDBf43vHaIx4p9zw3W8I19l5ivcnqU0TZtk/46n/5BH2p8-1Q_67C9pyusI2PA/h2/h001.7-R34a6PrtkdrxGlqD1Xovgr4tL9RvehyMv7xGZTTN0) | [DONATE](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtgpTt5uIZZI26HHaaljGsx1kaRIl8NZU7eAwohqEoAX8XJ96bthdLzi_jBnsGFn9rxtK_mDMHi46aykDq_xLOmdLy3aVRjVqrKdUtsnxadsrnJ3Yk4GpCGYcUnHRCEnOlrQW6iKLTFeSmfE6xKcjna3E0yATwiFvcWwhDZD1t0ZXkprMUnU7Wzw2kyLNmPLgtgBrV679J6lx3J-KinIiv79vxb4uk90T_ZRfgPwZZP9zgtLL8GKjwaErJZIKgAqDbigeLxFi27Oszor5E7p38-sehK--1ieEJG15VBJfujdnRTinnzGMzMB8AlsfdQ-7ldralf6ArHlrffrEqdFsoxTv--6ctvR8VYNSjkGAgaWBA2ifU51BLv938406uhFNxKD7494ToPCuR-zvqcmlgEgWUCvNEESO1nwIes0VbVOh3QmpSf6Rjb8W0DP6jCBRmnGQ4dyrQU3HSChaXN9wQ6x-740PqLVPsTGuOUOjc7H1V0IVmIh4fRkcRdPu4v9io/46n/5BH2p8-1Q_67C9pyusI2PA/h3/h001.GMClItkFs82d3sohJbviULP0aHl_xx8fnAb3nBWPNbA)

Rashida works closely with her constituents to craft policy, and she’s training other lawmakers on how to set up Neighborhood Service Centers in their congressional districts like she has in Michigan’s 12th. These centers help navigate government services, **r****eturning more than $5.5 million back to Rashida’s constituents** in the form of Social Security and other benefits.

When residents meet with Rashida in person, they’re 100% sold on her leadership―seeing how she delivers for her district and uplifts marginalized communities and working people. **Recently, Rashida held events with older members of her district, hearing directly from them on their needs, and then bringing their voices back to Congress to advocate for policies that address a lack of housing, hunger, homecare, and more.**
[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtgpTt5uIZZI26HHaaljGsx1kaRIl8NZU7eAwohqEoAX8XJ96bthdLzi_jBnsGFn9oz-HBeyKLLEcVpiPKBa32vNq2PAMkEoUBzPBYVW5FDhFI_I0o0MvyvpuYaVRlkDvizYAK3rAr3bN851D6N4qdhxH8RyZHIUHN9Sa3mz0MnHMGHUBEs997WNDtd7GSrObEvnr8gn9DwmXbceKnR7eg9ghyBpJkL5pgY4FHtCmdshl4eBr5e0PttqRmbkUh_4_X8sP5sEnbGyp8ZiWFtHhZcKvzFtYhiLhOJmpkLvSUEJF0uiDl5b6mT4iJ3eNzQg8txlB874puM2L2jNtm7Mz-r1Okcd7SfneSSo43xOM8UKG2e9UeYhHqHE7OG3ot425lT6gJZWvc1kY8k9LPqzRCbxtAAIVX9EGify9yfIbaYpF5cpc_T-m_fyiFJ-YF-a40x2exOIHbPvy-ttv85supl6fH5yYZ3knN2wx35gUjjiAzlo7_rUrU2_rgC4ftgITw/46n/5BH2p8-1Q_67C9pyusI2PA/h4/h001.Ie8emLACONxYRYc8X1ZY2CE_SZvB27Vqc6LSNbg_1rc)
**But with attacks from anti-Palestinian group AIPAC and their allies against Rashida and other progressive legislators, we need the resources to not just respond, but to get out in front of these ugly attacks.**
That’s exactly why we’re organized and on the ground, meeting with voters every day―empowering residents, listening to their concerns, and ensuring we all have the resources we need to not only survive, but thrive. Through her PAC, Rashida also supports other candidates who are similarly invested in their constituents, because that’s how we build a government that works for everyday people.
[**Donate to power Rashida’s re-election campaign today and split your contribution with Rashida’s Rooted in Community Leadership PAC to support progressive candidates up and down the ballot. With your support, our movement for change keeps growing.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtgpTt5uIZZI26HHaaljGsx1kaRIl8NZU7eAwohqEoAX8XJ96bthdLzi_jBnsGFn9on8CI-bePRua8rar0ds5k2rFGmQTfkpN7paAFxKUdkTqNCRxfVz_RvNI0XZDpIMc29pVDc0muvxaE6RpVkIE-QLnk1RGnKd_GAn1vfWwXhSS5os5WiF4cNIIP-lUHS9upfi18gDHcwjSS4kneKkaoWGIHVxEUpDuAEirImoVYpKIck5ylX-TfkEhfbux1TU4VbtXTB8qNTlxQfHDP1Fs-t8gqG1vLdQvPgfwcD2uCHEPGhNeu3tQIPXB0LIxVQvZPpahJYXdJWe_rsI_4REpV0P3U4qU2MYtFncCiPBFUWbxNHML_IVi6EDqGaEHd5-lsuRhJwnH15xR9LvSTyW90WvD_DKSkkemzdnYkdKL0VFMQfviaCg1yY4hnC09yZR6OHVofGLJoFxLfldNXFebwM91plezbOjEoe1jCSVNXXnJ2gh2XyL4wWsocNaHI6YK0/46n/5BH2p8-1Q_67C9pyusI2PA/h5/h001.HzBDaZBygNZ7i0gcJB8ozM-DzLBuR5AYwsEUrPQ34vY)

clean_body: Rashida will never back down from speaking truth to power. | | | Friend, Rashida has officially filed petition signatures to be on the ballot for her re-election campaign for Congress. This is the first big step in Rashida’s re-election and it’s thanks to supporters like you who are powering our campaign. Thanks to our growing field team who are knocking on doors and organizing events, we were able to collect and submit the needed signatures ahead of the deadline—from supporters in each community in the district. It’s important that our field operations are up and running now, because this is how we push back against a multi-million-dollar attack campaign. AIPAC and its network spent $1 million in 2022 on a campaign seeking to misconstrue Rashida’s record of advocating for her constituents and all marginalized people. This year they’ve already spent more than $100,000 on Islamophobic attacks against Rashida, and they’re trying to defeat other progressive lawmakers as well. We run robust grassroots re-election programs, connecting directly with district residents and prioritizing being rooted in the community. When Rashida is on the ballot, she also uplifts working class candidates and candidates of color who are demanding equal rights for all. | Rashida works closely with her constituents to craft policy, and she’s training other lawmakers on how to set up Neighborhood Service Centers in their congressional districts like she has in Michigan’s 12th. These centers help navigate government services, returning more than $5.5 million back to Rashida’s constituents in the form of Social Security and other benefits. When residents meet with Rashida in person, they’re 100% sold on her leadership―seeing how she delivers for her district and uplifts marginalized communities and working people. Recently, Rashida held events with older members of her district, hearing directly from them on their needs, and then bringing their voices back to Congress to advocate for policies that address a lack of housing, hunger, homecare, and more. But with attacks from anti-Palestinian group AIPAC and their allies against Rashida and other progressive legislators, we need the resources to not just respond, but to get out in front of these ugly attacks. That’s exactly why we’re organized and on the ground, meeting with voters every day―empowering residents, listening to their concerns, and ensuring we all have the resources we need to not only survive, but thrive. Through her PAC, Rashida also supports other candidates who are similarly invested in their constituents, because that’s how we build a government that works for everyday people. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately, split evenly between Rashida Tlaib and Rooted in Community PAC | | | | | | | | | As Rashida challenges the unjust status quo that oppresses people and normalizes genocides across the world, let’s show her that we have her back. -Team Rashida Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . subject: Deadline tonight!

body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/virginians-for-jay-jones [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/virginians-for-jay-jones]
Friend,
I'm reaching out today because we have an important reporting deadline tonight at midnight.
I've said it before, I will say it again today, Jay Jones is the right Democrat to serve as Virginia's next Attorney General. He is smart, he is a listener, he cares about the future of the Commonwealth, and he will be an Attorney General who is focused on justice for everyone in the Commonwealth. I am honored to lead this committee in supporting and encouraging Jay Jones to be our next Attorney General.
Please join me in supporting Jay Jones with a contribution of $10 or more before our reporting deadline at midnight! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/virginians-for-jay-jones]
Thank you,
Governor Ralph S. Northam

name: Mark
subject: ICYMI: No Doubt About It Podcast Highlights and Memorial Day Update
body:
For: dpwillis67@gmail.com — did you catch these clips? | | | | | |
---
[](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=5474409e2e&e=567664f14c)
|
As many of you are on the road for Memorial Day, we thought it would be a great time to catch up on our [**most recent episodes of the No Doubt About It podcast**](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=92e19284ab&e=567664f14c)with Krysty & Mark Ronchetti.
---
| **100th Episode Celebration!
** We celebrated our milestone 100th episode by looking back at some of the most memorable moments from the show this year. It's been an incredible journey, and we couldn't have done it without you, our loyal listeners.
---
[Stream Episode Now](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=5715cb964a&e=567664f14c)
| **Border Policy Gaslighting** We dove into Michelle Lujan Grisham's attempt to defend the Biden administration's border policy on CNN. We broke down the disingenuous nature of her defense, highlighting how the current administration has essentially thrown the borders wide open.
---
[](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=a60b25c8b7&e=567664f14c)
[Stream Episode Now](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=9f7ba9539a&e=567664f14c)
| **Harrison Butker Commencement Speech Fallout:** The debate between Mark & Krysty over Harrison Butker's commencement speech continues to spark conversation. Our viewers had plenty to say, and we've shared some of the most engaging feedback.
---
[](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=bafb19530b&e=567664f14c)
[Stream Episode Now](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=9e1bf16d9a&e=567664f14c)
| As you enjoy the holiday weekend, please take a moment to remember and pray for those who have given their lives to protect our freedom.
**→**[**We'll be taking Monday off, but join us for our next episode this Wednesday!**](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=271db01ca0&e=567664f14c)

Have a safe and happy Memorial Day weekend.

Best,
Mark and Krysty Ronchetti
---

name: Sara Jacobs
subject: Real talk – how much do you know about pregnancy?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
Friends – a question for you that may seem odd, but just go with it: Do you know how a pregnancy is dated?
I ask because a new study shows that only one-third of people know that pregnancy dating (meaning how many weeks pregnant a person is) starts on the first day of the last menstrual period .
Let’s think about what that means:
*
People
on
average
find
out
that
they’re
pregnant
a
few
days
after
they
miss
a
period.
*
That
means
that
when
people
find
out
they’re
pregnant,
they
are
already
dated
at
about
five
and
a
half
weeks
pregnant!
*
But
that
doesn’t
account
for
everyone
–
a
full
25%
of
people
don’t
realize
they’re
pregnant
until
seven
weeks
or
later.
So when anti-abortion Republicans pass extreme six-week abortion bans in red states – and call them the ‘gold standard’ – what they’re really doing is effectively banning abortion outright for nearly all pregnant people.
And here’s an incredibly jarring part of this study: The data shows that people who support six-week abortion bans are significantly less likely than others to correctly understand this basic timing around pregnancy. Another study backs this up, too – showing that the more you know about pregnancy, the more likely you are to support access to abortion.
( It’s almost as if getting pregnant or having a loved one who was pregnant makes you intimately aware of all the health challenges and serious complications that can occur, and how having access to a potentially lifesaving abortion is a no-brainer! )
What else does this study report?
Well, not surprisingly, women are much more likely to know more about pregnancy timing than men (43% vs. 23%). And yet in states like Florida, where a six-week ban went into effect on May 1, the lawmakers who support and enact these dangerous bans are overwhelmingly MEN.
Let me be clear – I’m not saying that Republican politicians only support extreme abortion bans because they don’t know enough about pregnancy. In fact, they’ve made it clear that attacking our reproductive freedoms is about control , not about our health or even our pregnancies.
But everyday voters (especially men!) need to be informed about pregnancy: how it’s dated, the very real health risks pregnant people face, and how an abortion ban anywhere in this country harms women, girls, and pregnant people everywhere. And they need to know what’s at stake in November.
That’s why between now and Election Day, we all need to be having these conversations with people in our lives and circles – so that when the time comes, we can kick the anti-abortion extremists out of office for good.
This is incredibly important, and we can’t just expect the problem to be solved on its own. So are you with me? If you are, please consider pitching in $25 to my re-election campaign to help defeat my anti-abortion MAGA opponent and flip the House blue in November. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
Thanks for being here.
-Sara
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
Congresswoman Sara Jacobs
California’s 51st District
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
If you can’t give much right now, I want you to know that even $1 or $5 makes a difference. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em] And if you can’t give at all, I understand. I appreciate you taking the time to read these emails and stay connected with my campaign – regardless of whether or not you’re able to chip in financially. Thank you!

Proud of this endorsement | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/547aca35ef2f/coach-tuberville-puts-together-a-winning-team?e=54a81bd33c)
---
| | Dear Peter,
---
| | _**REMINDER: EARLY VOTING STARTS TODAY IN NEVADA**_

I was recently endorsed by a great American patriot. Football coach and US Senator Tommy Tuberville:
---
| [ ](https://elizabethfornv.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8092551f57aee37054250c5&id=7d4cc1928b&e=54a81bd33c)
---
| _"As a football coach, I know the importance of having strong, reliable players on your team who are ready to tackle challenges head-on. In the political arena, it's no different. Today's political climate demands leaders who are not only aware of the challenges we face but are also prepared to confront them with grit and perseverance. Elizabeth Helgelien is exactly the kind of leader we need on our team in Congress. Her steadfast commitment to the principles of limited government, individual liberty, economic freedom, and putting America First is precisely what Nevada and our nation require in these trying times. I wholeheartedly endorse Elizabeth Helgelien for Congress in Nevada's 3rd Congressional District. She's the MVP we need to ensure our conservative principles are advanced and our American ideals are protected. Elizabeth Helgelien is the right choice, and I'm proud to be on her team"
-**Senator Tommy Tuberville**_

As someone who played tackle football in school, it is a high honor to be endorsed by legendary coach and now US Senator Tommy Tuberville. We have been overwhelmed by endorsements by great patriots like him. Our campaign is energized to fight for the people of Nevada and to be a voice for conservative values in Congress.

[Friend, will you chip in to our race to get our America First message out to voters?](https://elizabethfornv.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8092551f57aee37054250c5&id=6b341b4b61&e=54a81bd33c)

name: A.G. Holder Alert (via All On The Line)
subject: An existential fight for our democracy
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
A.G. Holder put it best
|
---

**Team, when democracy calls, you answer.**
**A.G. Holder put it best himself recently: “We're in the middle of an existential fight for our democracy — an uphill fight for freedom and fairness for all.”** And thanks to the vigilance of folks like you, we have a real shot at winning that fight.
With our democracy under constant attack, it’s going to take everything we’ve got to defend it.
That’s why your support means so much.
You understand how important it is that we all get involved in this fight, because you understand how much is at stake. You know that everything we care about, from affordable healthcare to reproductive freedom and beyond, relies on fair maps. And you’re stepping up to meet the weight of this moment by supporting our work.
We still have a long way to go, and as A.G. Holder indicated, we can’t get complacent with this much on the line for our democracy this year. But having you by our side in this fight keeps us motivated and energized.
[**Recommit to the movement for fair redistricting and help keep up the momentum in the fight for fair maps →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/85627402/475375346/779549763?source=eng_aotl_redite_email_mayfun_email_20240525-AOTL-Evergreen4NC-AGAlert_&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjgzZGQxZmE1LWMwMWEtZWYxMS04NmQwLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=thpDpYrUSXAYM3KQ2VKNQvnb2sKDaIOs00a4-m6TZp8=&emci=9529bf4d-4619-ef11-86d0-6045bdd9e096&emdi=83dd1fa5-c01a-ef11-86d0-6045bdd9e096&ceid=8431045)

name: George Whitesides
subject: quick recap for Peter
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85627413/475375462/-731719488?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YmZkMjhkMy1jMDFhLWVmMTEtODZkMC02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g_7Lkg1s_6SW0WQziNbZZQ-1IhDZjk_wSF6YLJhbeJ8=)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85627416/475375465/-731719488?refcode=em-5.25.24-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YmZkMjhkMy1jMDFhLWVmMTEtODZkMC02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g_7Lkg1s_6SW0WQziNbZZQ-1IhDZjk_wSF6YLJhbeJ8=)

Peter,

I’m sorry to reach out over the weekend, but I’m hoping that you’ll hear me out.

**Earlier this month, the first poll was released in our race – showing us ahead of MAGA Mike Garcia by 3-POINTS.** This staggering data shows just how vulnerable Garcia really is in our community.

**A few days ago, the Congressional Leadership Fund – a key Republican super PAC led by GOP House Speaker Mike Johnson – announced a $30 _million_ ad buy in California.** They directly singled out CA-27 as a key race for the majority by promising most of that cash to the Los Angeles area, with cable and broadcast TV buys slated for our district.

**Now, we’re approaching our end-of-month fundraising deadline.** Republicans see our movement as a threat to their extreme majority, and we need a strong finish to beat back their attacks.

**[Please, chip in $3 before the weekend is out to help me flip CA-27 and the House majority blue. subject: More Tax Hikes
body:
Biden trying to raise taxes...again | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us1.campaign-archive.com/?e=c50c08d277&u=bfee6d8faa8bd945842640631&id=4f6fffa5b3)

---
|
# More Tax Hikes
---
| |
---
|
---
| Our nation is under siege by President Biden’s reckless economic agenda. At a time of unprecedented inflation, Biden proposes a multi-trillion-dollar tax hike, dismantling the successful Trump–Pence tax cuts of 2017. These cuts fueled historic economic growth, boosted wages, and brought American jobs back from overseas. Yet, Biden’s plan threatens to reverse all these gains, plunging us into economic chaos.

Since Biden took office, real household income has plummeted by nearly 3%, inflation has skyrocketed to an average of 5.5%, and families are struggling with soaring energy prices that have climbed nearly 30%. His relentless spending spree and burdensome regulations are crushing the middle class, costing us a staggering $1.939 trillion annually. Now, Biden’s tax increases will drive jobs to China and Mexico, endangering our national security and supply chains.

We must fight back against this disastrous agenda. Biden’s progressive plan doesn’t aim to help struggling Americans but to fund a radical leftist agenda. Our country’s future is at stake. We must protect the economic freedoms that made our nation prosperous.

Let’s take a stand and **Save America Now. **
---

# FROM THE DESK OF LARRY KUDLOW
---
| | Reader,**I am pleased to share with you that The New York Sun, one of my daily must-read papers, is now the exclusive publisher of my regular columns.

I invite you to consider joining the Sun to receive unlimited access to my latest commentary, alongside some of the finest American journalism.

**But there's also far more to what the Sun is building.

As you know, journalism isn't what it used to be.

I've been in the business for decades, and never before have I seen this once noble profession so abused. The major papers are no longer on the side of the American people, and we are right to withhold our trust.

The impact on our democracy is considerable. Without real accountability, the worst actors in government and at corporate institutions have free reign, and patriotic, hard-working Americans are being sidelined and ignored.

The antidote is to join the movement to build a better alternative. That's the American way.

**The charge to restore American journalism is being led by the Sun.** A proudly all-American, principled publication that has plenty of room for conservative thought and conservative writers, the Sun has upheld the highest journalistic standards since 1833. That's 18 years before the New York Times published its first number.**My decision for the New York Sun to become the exclusive publisher of my regular columns was not taken lightly.**

I value their work and have been impressed by their team, but I know they have a hell of a battle ahead. They are the David facing many Goliaths.

They will only succeed if we join with them in this grassroots national effort. Joining the Sun costs as little as a penny a day. I encourage you to sign up today. Every single person counts.
---

name: Josh Harder
subject: Ripple effects from Trump’s trial
body:
Millions coming to our district.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85629653/475380354/-1463099547?refcode=-header-&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDljOTg3MGEtYzQxYS1lZjExLTg2ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=D3hXjhCavpRCz5o7QgwS3lA0zOzgNIf1xEnAtoyZRMA=) | Peter, The results of Trump’s trial are going to have a variety of ripple effects. The obvious ones we know, but today I want to share one that you might not have thought of. And it’s already happened. **GOP fundraising has skyrocketed because of Trump’s trial.** They are raising millions of dollars from their base who believe they are donating to save their leader from a witchhunt. name: John Avlon
subject: Trump raised this family’s taxes
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOHN AVLON FOR CONGRESS
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hodgsons [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hodgsons]

Friends, i t’s true. But you won’t hear about it from Trump or his flunky Nick Lalota.

Trump and his right-wing Washington Republicans raised taxes for middle class families on Long Island.

The worst part is that they did it out of spite as part of a political stunt designed to punish “blue states” by taking away the state and local tax deductions that had been in place for a century.

This is a matter of fairness: because New Yorkers give far more to the federal government than we get back - while “red” states get more than they give. Republicans are never going to restore that state and local deduction because they’re invested in the red state blue-state divide. In fact, Trumpublican leaders just made it official: after a disastrous, do-nothing congress, they announced that they won’t restore the SALT deductions if they stay in control of the House.

That’s one more reason why New Yorkers know we can’t afford to lose this fight. When I’m in Congress, I’ll focus on lowering the cost of living and improving the quality of life. Democrats will rebuild the middle class and protect women’s reproductive rights - which are under assault by Republicans right now.

I want this campaign to be a conversation, which is why I’m constantly talking with families just like the Hodgsons. It’s why I’m proud that this conversation is the basis for our new ad.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hodgsons [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hodgsons]

Voters across Suffolk County are seeing this ad right now. I hope you’ll watch and pitch in to make sure every voter sees this important message. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hodgsons]

This is exactly why I’m running for Congress, but I can’t do it alone. Thanks for fighting the good fight with me.

-John

clean_body: [] Friends, i t’s true. But you won’t hear about it from Trump or his flunky Nick Lalota. Trump and his right-wing Washington Republicans raised taxes for middle class families on Long Island. The worst part is that they did it out of spite as part of a political stunt designed to punish “blue states” by taking away the state and local tax deductions that had been in place for a century. This is a matter of fairness: because New Yorkers give far more to the federal government than we get back - while “red” states get more than they give. Republicans are never going to restore that state and local deduction because they’re invested in the red state blue-state divide. In fact, Trumpublican leaders just made it official: after a disastrous, do-nothing congress, they announced that they won’t restore the SALT deductions if they stay in control of the House. That’s one more reason why New Yorkers know we can’t afford to lose this fight. When I’m in Congress, I’ll focus on lowering the cost of living and improving the quality of life. Democrats will rebuild the middle class and protect women’s reproductive rights - which are under assault by Republicans right now. I want this campaign to be a conversation, which is why I’m constantly talking with families just like the Hodgsons. It’s why I’m proud that this conversation is the basis for our new ad. [] Voters across Suffolk County are seeing this ad right now. I hope you’ll watch and pitch in to make sure every voter sees this important message. [] This is exactly why I’m running for Congress, but I can’t do it alone. Thanks for fighting the good fight with me. -John CONTRIBUTE [] PAID FOR BY JOHN AVLON FOR CONGRESS John Avlon for Congress PO Box 1200 Sag Harbor, NY 11963 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .
