name: Shawnna Bolick
subject: Week 20: Legislative Update
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTE BOLICK
body:
| | | [ ](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=a88303a642&e=a7ab36849c)
---
| | Dear Freedom Fighters,

This past Monday the Joint Legislative Budget Committee released its [monthly fiscal highlights report](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=80cd1bae98&e=a7ab36849c) on forecasted revenues for our state. As you know, we aren’t seeing a very rosy economy under Joe Biden. This means the governor’s office is probably ready to start negotiating the state’s budget with the House and Senate before it's projected we need to cut even more from the budget.

The release of JLBC’s monthly report coincides with Bidenflation numbers posted being up nearly 20% since Biden took office. Americans are spending over $12,800 more annually to buy the basics because of Bidenflation compared to three years ago. Bidenflation is a tax on all Americans due to the Democrat’s out of control spending habits and printing more money.

This week while the State Senate was at work, we passed HCR 2060, Arizona’s Secure the Border Act making it a state crime to be in the U.S. illegally if you don’t enter through lawful ports of entry. This bill sends a clear message that Arizona Republicans support the public safety of all Arizonans. On June 4th the Arizona House will take up this HCR for a vote. Then, it will be sent to the November ballot for Arizonan voters to decide. I look forward to the voters passing the Secure the Border Act come November to restore our community’s safety.

During my vote explanation, I took some time discussing how DC is an utter failure when it comes to protecting our community’s public safety. On May 7th, 15 Congressional moderate Democrats admitted in a letter to Biden that there is chaos on our southern border. In their letter, these democrat co-signors asked Biden and his administration to “immediately take further action to restore order at the southern border and fix our broken immigration system.”

This Congressional letter goes on to state, “All of our constituents, no matter our congressional district, have felt the impacts of the current border situation. Communities across the country are grappling with the fentanyl crisis and struggling to find appropriate shelter and services for those seeking asylum.”

Further, these congressional democrats urged Biden to use his executive authority “to better address security at the Southern border, interdict illicit fentanyl and allow for orderly legal immigration.”

But we all know Biden’s immigration policies aren’t humanitarian; they’re only creating more victims of crime even though it is preventable.

**_FACT:_** on Biden’s very first day in the Oval Office, he canceled the national emergency declaration on the border which called for the construction of the border wall with Mexico and ended the “remain in Mexico” policy for asylum seekers. When Biden revoked the previous administration’s Border policy, illegal immigration into the United States skyrocketed, overwhelming our local law enforcement and Border Patrol as well as non-profits and Border towns.

Meanwhile, the Biden Administration expanded access to migrants in foreign countries seeking asylum, such as Cuba, Haiti, Nicaragua, and Venezuela parole program and the Customs and Border Patrol’s [CBP One mobile App](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=b2b31257ac&e=a7ab36849c). The Biden Administration came up with this “under-the-radar” approach to illegal immigration using parole authority.

The parole policy was created years ago to allow presidents to let people in on a case-by-case basis for “urgent humanitarian reasons or significant public benefit.” The Biden Administration has been abusing the parole program on a mass scale. On May 6th, senior officials with the Biden Administration confirmed that the parole program expanded “lawful pathways” for 435,000 people from Cuba, Haiti, Nicaragua, and Venezuela to live and work in the United States for two years. Federal officials also confirmed that number also accounted for more than 50,000 Chinese communists for the 2023 fiscal year and nearly 30,000 Chinese communists in the first half of the current fiscal year.

In February of this year, Pew Research Center reported that 80 percent of Americans, including 73 percent of Democrats, think the U.S government has done a bad job when it comes to handling the influx of illegal immigrants.

According to a recent Gallup survey, 27 percent of Americans consider illegal immigration to be the most significant issue currently confronting our nation.
It is worth noting, for the past three months, illegal immigration has remained at the top of Gallup’s list.

While Hobbs continues to play politics with our citizen’s public safety by vetoing [Senate Bill 1231](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=da3c77a0da&e=a7ab36849c), this November Arizona voters will be able to send a clear message that we value safety over partisan politics by voting YES on the Secure the Border Act.

I have been to the Border a few times. Biden [auctioned off millions of dollars’](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=2afee59d57&e=a7ab36849c) worth of unused components from the former administration’s border wall for peanuts in an apparent run-around pending Congressional action. Also, more than $300 million worth of taxpayer-funded wall parts have been left to rust out in the sun since Biden came to office rendering these Border wall materials useless.

Our local law enforcement officials increasingly encounter foreign nationals who have entered our country illegally or remain here illegally. Over the past few months some of these individuals and groups have been involved with organized crime like retail theft or drug cartels. We have read about these stories on the news.

Earlier this year, a local headline read, “Organized crime groups from South America linked to metro Phoenix burglaries.” Even the City of Scottsdale’s Chief of Police, Jeff Walther, said residential robberies were on the rise in this wealthy suburb of Phoenix. Walther said, "this criminal trend has been a continuous and escalating problem. It is not one group or ring responsible for this crime series. This is transnational organized crime."

Organized crime involving even the police is an integral part of the worsening immigration crisis. Sadly, cartels and transnational criminal organizations are taking full advantage of the situation that we’re presently in, preying on all socioeconomic classes and neighborhoods across Arizona. I don’t know about you, but I don’t want to further empower these transnational criminal enterprises. We all know the cartels are rather sophisticated. They’re also constantly switching the entry points they choose for migrant families, children, and single adults to illegally come into our state.

I would be remiss if I also didn’t include at least one story documenting an illegal immigrant with a criminal record who killed an Arizona resident. Grant Ronnebeck was a 21-year-old convenience store clerk who was killed in 2016 by an illegal immigrant while he was working. Grant was shot point blank in the face by a crazed felon who had been facing deportation. The illegal immigrant would not have been at the convenience store if it had not been for our broken immigration system.

While I am meeting with voters across District 2, the border and fentanyl have been top issues for my constituents regardless of party affiliation for the past year. Even though Legislative District 2 is located about 175 miles north of the southern border, my constituents still view illegal immigration as a top issue important to keeping their families safe.

As a public official, I serve the state to protect public safety. We know statistically the poor are hardest hit by the ravages of illegal immigration and Biden’s open border policies. We don’t support individuals or groups who want to do irreparable harm to our children and adults with laced fentanyl distribution, or the rise in human and sex trafficking.

Also, next month expect a full vote in the Senate on [HCR 2056. ](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=bc2e19e7f2&e=a7ab36849c) This bill if passed by both the Senate and House will give voters in November the opportunity to weigh in on ensuring Arizona’s future elections are administered more efficiently and without the use of foreign monies influencing its outcome.

To all of those of you who have served our country, a BIG thank you!
To all those men and women unable to read this message, this weekend we remember you and your ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. WE THANK YOU.

Have a safe Memorial Day while remembering those who have come before us.

Take care,
Shawnna

name: Joe Biden
subject: Hitler's language
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
Donald Trump's official account shared a video saying he'd create "a unified Reich" if he wins this election. | | |
---
This week, Donald Trump's official account shared a video saying he'd create "a unified Reich" if he wins this election. That's Hitler's language. It's not America's. **And so long as I'm your President it never will be.** Folks, our freedoms are at risk, our very democracy. That's not hyperbole. [And that's why I need you -- as a top supporter of this campaign -- to help me defeat Trump and his extremism by donating $25 to this email. But, let’s be honest, this just shows that MAGA Republicans are the ones running scared. One thing we know is that when Republicans pour money into a race, that means they’re worried. They know how strong our team is, and they know how much the federal funding and common sense policies I have delivered resonates with voters. Republicans want an edge over us, but we can’t let that happen. Our end-of-month fundraising deadline is coming up next Friday, and we’re at risk of being outspent. This race is one of just EIGHT Democratic toss-up races in the House, so we don’t have a single second to waste. In 2022, I beat my MAGA extremist opponent by just 1,350 votes. In 2024, it could be even closer — and we can’t risk the chance of losing.
Right now, we’re up against an anti-choice extremist who would rather uphold the will of extremists like Donald Trump and Mike Johnson than address the pressing issues that matter to New Mexico’s second district.
Listen, I didn’t run for Congress to selfishly prop up an establishment party agenda. I ran for Congress to fight for New Mexico and defend our freedoms that Republicans are putting at risk.
I know I keep saying this, but it’s just that important: This is one of the most critical election years of our lives. The outcome of Election Day will define the future of NM-02, reproductive healthcare access and our democracy.
I’m proud to represent this district and I’m proud to continue fighting tooth and nail to protect reproductive freedom, our public lands and our democracy. But if we’re going to be successful, I need your help right now.
[Our end-of-month fundraising deadline is in 6 days, and we can’t afford to be outspent by MAGA dark money groups. clean_body: We’re not going to let MAGA dark money outspend us, are we? Gabe Vasquez won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022. He's running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Saludos, it’s Gabe Vasquez. This is the state of the race for NM-02 right now: = You read that exactly right. National Republicans feel so threatened by pro-democracy, pro-choice, pro-progress campaigns like ours that they’re spending nearly THREE MILLION DOLLARS to flood the airwaves right here in our district. The Congressional Leadership Fund — a dark money group supported by MAGA Speaker Mike Johnson — wants to intimidate Team Vasquez into giving up. But, let’s be honest, this just shows that MAGA Republicans are the ones running scared. One thing we know is that when Republicans pour money into a race, that means they’re worried. They know how strong our team is, and they know how much the federal funding and common sense policies I have delivered resonates with voters. Republicans want an edge over us, but we can’t let that happen. Our end-of-month fundraising deadline is coming up next Friday, and we’re at risk of being outspent. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = This race is one of just EIGHT Democratic toss-up races in the House, so we don’t have a single second to waste. In 2022, I beat my MAGA extremist opponent by just 1,350 votes. In 2024, it could be even closer — and we can’t risk the chance of losing. Right now, we’re up against an anti-choice extremist who would rather uphold the will of extremists like Donald Trump and Mike Johnson than address the pressing issues that matter to New Mexico’s second district. Listen, I didn’t run for Congress to selfishly prop up an establishment party agenda. I ran for Congress to fight for New Mexico and defend our freedoms that Republicans are putting at risk. I know I keep saying this, but it’s just that important: This is one of the most critical election years of our lives. The outcome of Election Day will define the future of NM-02, reproductive healthcare access and our democracy. I’m proud to represent this district and I’m proud to continue fighting tooth and nail to protect reproductive freedom, our public lands and our democracy. But if we’re going to be successful, I need your help right now. = | = Thank you as always for your support, Gabe | | | ---|---|--- = Together, we flipped NM-02 in 2022. Now, Gabe is busy in Congress fighting for reproductive choice, economic opportunity, affordable healthcare, and the best interests of the people. Gabe won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022, and is running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone.** | = = Paid for by Gabe Vasquez for Congress Gabe Vasquez for Congress Drawer L Mesilla, NM 88046 United States If you would like to unsubscribe, click here: To receive less email from Gabe Vasquez for Congress, . _— The Intelligencer, 05/15/24_

34 Senate seats are up for grabs this year, and Democrats are defending 23 of them — **including three in states that Donald Trump won in 2016 _and_ 2020.** One of those seats is all but certain to flip, meaning that we can’t afford to lose _any other_ races if we are going to defend our majority.
Not only is the 2024 Senate map one of the toughest maps we’ve seen in _years_ , but Trump Republicans are launching an all-out effort to capitalize on it.
Donald Trump is holding rallies in states with competitive Senate races. Wealthy GOP donors and super PACs are already spending tens of millions of dollars to hand Republicans Senate control. And get this: **several of our Democratic incumbents are running against wealthy self-funders who have already tapped into their personal fortunes to spend on their races.**
**Outside money is flooding into states with competitive Senate races, and they’re counting on us to help fight back.[Will you pitch in a donation to Fight Like Hell PAC today to power our efforts to support Democratic Senate candidates and defend our majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85632632/475385544/1253923687?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240525_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjExOTU4OTMtYzkxYS1lZjExLTg2ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=fXKbQG_gWtCsn8vjB-FRe1iQlMOSUKBWNGFgPSx3Cz8=)**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: \-- | Team, here’s where things stand in our fight to protect our Senate majority: | | "SENATE DEMOCRATS HAVE NO MARGIN FOR ERROR IN NOVEMBER" — The Intelligencer, 05/15/24 = | = 34 Senate seats are up for grabs this year, and Democrats are defending 23 of them — including three in states that Donald Trump won in 2016 and 2020. One of those seats is all but certain to flip, meaning that we can’t afford to lose any other races if we are going to defend our majority. Not only is the 2024 Senate map one of the toughest maps we’ve seen in years , but Trump Republicans are launching an all-out effort to capitalize on it. Donald Trump is holding rallies in states with competitive Senate races. Wealthy GOP donors and super PACs are already spending tens of millions of dollars to hand Republicans Senate control. And get this: several of our Democratic incumbents are running against wealthy self-funders who have already tapped into their personal fortunes to spend on their races. Outside money is flooding into states with competitive Senate races, and they’re counting on us to help fight back.= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = | = = | = = This fight will be hard, but that's never stopped Gretchen Whitmer in the past, and it certainly isn't going to stop her now. Thank you. — Fight Like Hell PAC Fight Like Hell PAC PO Box 15093 Lansing, MI 48901 United States | mailto:info@fightlikehellpac.org| | Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC

* * *
When Larry Hogan jumped into Maryland’s open Senate race, it shifted the entire Senate landscape and shifted Maryland from safely blue to a battleground state. Here are 5 examples proving that Marylanders deserve better than Larry Hogan:
_He vetoed a $15 minimum wage._
_He undercut workers by vetoing legislation that would have allowed them to deduct union dues from state income taxes._
_He vetoed a bill to restore voting rights to more than 44,000 previously incarcerated Marylanders._
_He vetoed common sense gun legislation mandating background checks._
_He vetoed legislation to increase access to reproductive care by increasing the number of abortion providers in Maryland._
[**Larry Hogan isn’t fooling anyone, team, and we can’t afford to let him represent Maryland in the U.S. Senate. clean_body: | = Hey there, I wanted to pass along this message from my friend, Angela Alsobrooks, who's running to represent Maryland in the U.S. Senate, please take a minute to read her message! Thanks, Nikki When Larry Hogan jumped into Maryland’s open Senate race, it shifted the entire Senate landscape and shifted Maryland from safely blue to a battleground state. A lot of Hogan’s momentum comes from the perception that he’s a moderate voice in an otherwise extremist, out-of-touch GOP. But Hogan’s veto record tells a very different story, team. In fact, we’re about to give you 5 clear examples proving that Larry Hogan would be just one more rubber stamp for the GOP’s agenda in the Senate, but before we do that: = | = = Here are 5 examples proving that Marylanders deserve better than Larry Hogan: He vetoed a $15 minimum wage. He undercut workers by vetoing legislation that would have allowed them to deduct union dues from state income taxes. He vetoed a bill to restore voting rights to more than 44,000 previously incarcerated Marylanders. He vetoed common sense gun legislation mandating background checks. He vetoed legislation to increase access to reproductive care by increasing the number of abortion providers in Maryland. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation will go through to Nikki Budzinski and Angela Alsobrooks immediately: | = = | = = | = = Thanks! —Alsobrooks HQ | = Nikki for Congress PO Box 5171 Springfield, IL 62705 United States | mailto:info@nikkiforcongress.com Paid for by Nikki Budzinski for Congress

body:

The Bureau of Elections denied Callie Barr's "meritless" challenge to Lorinser's nomination petitions.
A staff report issued Friday by the Michigan Board of Elections (BOE) deemed Bob Lorinser's nomination petitions for Michigan's 1st Congressional District sufficient. After review, a challenge by our Democratic primary opponent was recommended for dismissal.
But, friends, our fight for a fair and free election isn't over.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cd1primary [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cd1primary]
Can you contribute today [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cd1primary] to help us catch up on our legal expenses?
READ MORE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cd1primary]
Friends,
Callie Barr contested more than half of our nomination petitions in an attempt to remove Bob from the ballot. The BOE rejected her claims in their entirety.
Ms. Barr blatantly and intentionally disregarded election law.
While legitimate challenges are essential to combat fraud, Barr abused the process as a dirty political weapon. This was a desperate tactic. It attacked Dr. Lorinser's integrity and insulted voters as it attempted to dismiss the will of thousands of legitimate voters without discernible cause.
The failed attempt to disenfranchise voters should not go unanswered.
We do not need more politicians who try to abuse the Democratic process. We need candidates like Dr. Bob Lorinser, who prioritizes honesty and integrity above everything else and strives to earn the Democratic nomination through merit, not manipulation.
The Michigan Board of State Canvassers will meet on May 31 to approve ballots. In the meantime, we need your help staying above the negativity. Your generosity goes a long way toward covering our expenses in fighting this frivolous challenge. Help us elect dignified leadership.
Please consider making a contribution today to help us cover the costs incurred in defending Democracy. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cd1primary]
Thank you.
Onward,
Kevin
Kevin Numerick
Campaign Manager
Bob Lorinser for Congress
Northern Michigan / Upper Peninsula
Democrat, MI01

Latino communities aren’t just a second thought to Democrats — we’re prioritizing the issues that affect Latino voters in Arizona, and that starts with a conversation. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85633773/475388197/1510686721?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240525_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTc5MmNjOGItY2IxYS1lZjExLTg2ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=KuWBLsJkNFygi6IG_qinky2CbzsjS1hfRu4CAfDxn0Y=) | [MOBILIZE LATINO VOTERS IN ARIZONA](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85633774/475388198/1510686721?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240525_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTc5MmNjOGItY2IxYS1lZjExLTg2ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=KuWBLsJkNFygi6IG_qinky2CbzsjS1hfRu4CAfDxn0Y=)

Democrats are finding new ways to engage with voters, meeting them where they are to make sure they have all the tools and information they need before heading to the ballot box in less than 200 days.
These events help small businesses while offering face-to-face interactions with candidates, and help to lower barriers to voting that Latino voters often encounter. We’re able to register folks and keep voters aware of the dates they need to know to be able to cast their ballots.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85633775/475388199/1510686721?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240525_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTc5MmNjOGItY2IxYS1lZjExLTg2ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=KuWBLsJkNFygi6IG_qinky2CbzsjS1hfRu4CAfDxn0Y=)
**Meanwhile Republicans in Arizona haven’t had offices to directly engage with Latino voters since 2022. **
When we say we’re prioritizing everyday Arizonans, we mean it, and we want to make sure Latino voters have a real seat at the table. [**Pitch in before the end of May to help us mobilize even more Latino voters in all 15 counties.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85633776/475388200/1510686721?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240525_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTc5MmNjOGItY2IxYS1lZjExLTg2ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=KuWBLsJkNFygi6IG_qinky2CbzsjS1hfRu4CAfDxn0Y=)

clean_body: | = Latino communities aren’t just a second thought to Democrats — we’re prioritizing the issues that affect Latino voters in Arizona, and that starts with a conversation. = | = Democrats are finding new ways to engage with voters, meeting them where they are to make sure they have all the tools and information they need before heading to the ballot box in less than 200 days. These events help small businesses while offering face-to-face interactions with candidates, and help to lower barriers to voting that Latino voters often encounter. We’re able to register folks and keep voters aware of the dates they need to know to be able to cast their ballots. = Meanwhile Republicans in Arizona haven’t had offices to directly engage with Latino voters since 2022. When we say we’re prioritizing everyday Arizonans, we mean it, and we want to make sure Latino voters have a real seat at the table. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = | = = | = = Thanks for your help today! — AZ Dems Arizona Democratic Party PO Box 36123 Phoenix, AZ 85067-6123 United States mailto:info@azdem.org | PAID FOR BY THE ARIZONA DEMOCRATIC PARTY. body:
| Hi Peter,

Trump and extremists are working behind-the-scenes to destroy Medicare and Social Security programs again!

That’s why Ami needs to hear from you. What are your thoughts about these recent threats against health care. [**_Take Ami’s survey before midnight._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85633981/475388752/-1765549954?ms=EM_NBI_AB_20240525_SV_2_3MO_team_NA_NA_healthcareAAPI&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS85MDU3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MzYyMGQzZi1jYzFhLWVmMTEtODZkMC02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jPGawd_jXD2eZjGPhPmM_oy58is8JiAZW9Jn0rxO-Q4=&emci=704bc5d1-e819-ef11-86d0-6045bdd9e096&emdi=53620d3f-cc1a-ef11-86d0-6045bdd9e096&ceid=32394541)
**[Answer Now→](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85633982/475388760/-1765549954?ms=EM_NBI_AB_20240525_SV_2_3MO_team_NA_NA_healthcareAAPI&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS85MDU3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MzYyMGQzZi1jYzFhLWVmMTEtODZkMC02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jPGawd_jXD2eZjGPhPmM_oy58is8JiAZW9Jn0rxO-Q4=&emci=704bc5d1-e819-ef11-86d0-6045bdd9e096&emdi=53620d3f-cc1a-ef11-86d0-6045bdd9e096&ceid=32394541)**
* * *
**_Ami’s original message for context:_**

Peter, as Democrats are working to lower costs and broaden health care access, Trump and extremists are making moves to destroy Medicare and Social Security programs.

Biden and Democrats have made tremendous progress in the health care system through the Affordable Care Act. But if it was up to Trump and his allies the health care would be inaccessible and unaffordable.

**_[That’s why I need to hear from my supporters like you. Will you fill me in on your thoughts about these threats against affordable health care?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85633983/475388767/-1765549954?ms=EM_NBI_AB_20240525_SV_2_3MO_team_NA_NA_healthcareAAPI&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS85MDU3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MzYyMGQzZi1jYzFhLWVmMTEtODZkMC02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jPGawd_jXD2eZjGPhPmM_oy58is8JiAZW9Jn0rxO-Q4=&emci=704bc5d1-e819-ef11-86d0-6045bdd9e096&emdi=53620d3f-cc1a-ef11-86d0-6045bdd9e096&ceid=32394541)_**
**[Answer Now→](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85633984/475388774/-1765549954?ms=EM_NBI_AB_20240525_SV_2_3MO_team_NA_NA_healthcareAAPI&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS85MDU3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MzYyMGQzZi1jYzFhLWVmMTEtODZkMC02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jPGawd_jXD2eZjGPhPmM_oy58is8JiAZW9Jn0rxO-Q4=&emci=704bc5d1-e819-ef11-86d0-6045bdd9e096&emdi=53620d3f-cc1a-ef11-86d0-6045bdd9e096&ceid=32394541)**
As a doctor and former county Chief Medical Officer, I’ve seen firsthand the peace of mind the ACA gave to American families.

Every year in office, Trump cut Social Security and Medicare programs, causing pain and strife across the country. **_We need a health care system that works for patients, not against them._**

Democrats stopped Republicans from ending these life-saving programs. My Democratic colleagues and I are fighting to expand health care access and cut costs every day.

But, Peter, need to know your opinion about the health care system. [_**Participate in our health care survey today, it’s really quick→**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85633985/475388781/-1765549954?ms=EM_NBI_AB_20240525_SV_2_3MO_team_NA_NA_healthcareAAPI&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS85MDU3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MzYyMGQzZi1jYzFhLWVmMTEtODZkMC02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jPGawd_jXD2eZjGPhPmM_oy58is8JiAZW9Jn0rxO-Q4=&emci=704bc5d1-e819-ef11-86d0-6045bdd9e096&emdi=53620d3f-cc1a-ef11-86d0-6045bdd9e096&ceid=32394541)

Be well,

Dr. Ami Bera

1. The House GOP’s top super PAC just announced they’re going to spend $2.1 MILLION on ads to defeat Kristen
2. Our anti-abortion GOP opponent – who already put $1 million of his own fortune into his campaign – just launched TV ads across the district
3. Kristen’s race for Congress is one of the only true tossups in the country – and will decide control of the House

Now, we’re just 6 days away from our May deadline and we still need to raise another $41,132. Whether or not we hit this goal will determine when we can start running our own ads on TV and online and reach the voters we need to win this race.

Hey Peter! It's Yass. I hope you're enjoying your Memorial Day Weekend! With our primary just two months away, we're making some of the most important strategic decisions of our campaign. **How many more organizers should we hire? How many yard signs can we afford to print? How many TV and digital ads can we buy in the expensive Arizona media market, and when should we run them?** The answers to all of these questions are determined by whether we can meet our last two fundraising goals before this primary. Peter, the earlier we can meet our fundraising goals, the more strategic we can be with our decisions. Making these critical investments now will have a much bigger impact than making them later. [**That's why I'm humbly asking for your support ahead of our big May fundraising deadline this Friday. name: OcasioCortez.com
subject: We have exactly one month
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
In 2018, Alexandria made headlines when she beat all odds and became the youngest woman ever elected to Congress.
But it’s her unrelenting commitment to the progressive movement that elected her in the first place — fighting for bold climate action, Medicare for All, and real change for working families like her own — that has kept our values at the center of the national conversation.
**Now, her primary election is in exactly 1 month**. And with your help, Alexandria can operate independently from our corrupting system of campaign finance and revolving-door politics. **That's bad news for corporations and special interests enriching themselves from the status quo, but great news for everyday people.**
[Will you make a $5 donation today to Alexandria’s 2024 re-election campaign? Any amount makes a huge difference to keep a progressive champion in Congress fighting for us.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20240525.KQ_LvQ&refcode=em20240525-6489-P_FND_EOM_HDL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=6489%2E2526796%2EsywbHV)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20240525.KQ_LvQ&refcode=em20240525-6489-P_FND_EOM_HDL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=6489%2E2526796%2EsywbHV)**
We need to get Alexandria back to Congress so she can keep doing what she was elected to do: demand better.
Alexandria campaigned on expanding Medicare in order to make prescriptions more affordable. Now, Medicare has the power to negotiate prescription drugs — and insulin is capped at $35/ month. Alexandria’s Green New Deal was called pie-in-the-sky, but it laid the groundwork for Congress to pass its largest ever investment to fight climate change — $369 billion.
And because she takes no donations from corporations, lobbyists, or special interests, **Alexandria works only for us.**
[Please chip in any amount you can to AOC’s 2024 re-election fund today. Every dollar, no matter the amount, shows widespread support for our progressive priorities from NY-14 and beyond.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20240525.KQ_LvQ&refcode=em20240525-6489-P_FND_EOM_HDL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=6489%2E2526796%2EsywbHV)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20240525.KQ_LvQ&refcode=em20240525-6489-P_FND_EOM_HDL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=40&akid=6489%2E2526796%2EsywbHV)**
Whether or not you can give today, thank you for standing with our movement.
With gratitude,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20240525?refcode=em20240525-6489-P_FND_EOM_HDL&t=41&refcode2=6489_2526796_sywbHV&akid=6489%2E2526796%2EsywbHV)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20240525-6489-P_FND_EOM_HDL&t=42&akid=6489%2E2526796%2EsywbHV)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=43&akid=6489%2E2526796%2EsywbHV) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=44&akid=6489%2E2526796%2EsywbHV) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=45&akid=6489%2E2526796%2EsywbHV)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress

As we celebrate National Wine Day, it’s a perfect reminder of the incredible local products our region has to offer. Representing Oregon’s 6th Congressional District, which includes the beautiful Willamette Valley, I see firsthand the pride and passion that goes into our local wine industry. **But while we enjoy this special day, I want to be perfectly clear: My work in Washington is far from finished.** I’m dedicated to supporting Oregon’s economy, protecting reproductive rights, and investing in our communities across the state. Every day, I strive to uphold the Oregon way of life — even as the far-right attempts to push us backward. body:

| |
# News From Around the World
---
New military drills in Taiwan, insurgency in New Caledonia, and the death of the Iranian president and foreign minister...
---
| | | | [ ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/atw0424?refcode=atw)
---
|
## China and Taiwan
---
| China has initiated two days of extensive military exercises around Taiwan as a "punishment" for what it deems "separatist acts." This move comes shortly after Taiwan inaugurated its new democratically elected leader, Lai Ching-te, who has urged Beijing to stop its intimidation tactics. The drills, involving dozens of Chinese fighter jets with live ammunition and various naval vessels, simulated attacks on "high-value military targets" and are seen as a significant test for Lai in managing the fraught relations with China. Starting early on Thursday, the exercises encircle Taiwan and involve joint operations by the army, navy, air force, and rocket force. The drills cover the Taiwan Strait and areas to the north, south, and east of Taiwan, as well as near Taiwan's outlying islands of Kinmen, Matsu, Wuqiu, and Dongyin. This marks an assertive demonstration of China's claim over Taiwan, which it considers a part of its territory despite never having governed it, and its vow to reclaim the island by force if necessary. Despite the military maneuvers, daily life in Taiwan's capital, Taipei, proceeded normally, reflecting the population's accustomed response to such threats. Local news covered the drills but also focused on domestic political issues and routine matters like tax filings. Taiwan's main stock index, the TAIEX, even saw a slight increase, indicating a level of resilience and normalcy amid the ongoing tensions.
---
| | |
### Insurgence in New Caledonia
---
| One of France's remaining colonies in the Pacific, New Caledonia, has seen mass rebellion from the native Kanak people, who amount to about 40% of the population.
---
| | | [ ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/atw0424?refcode=atw)
---
| | | | The rebellion comes a response to a new law which would give more voting rights to French immigrants to New Caledonia, a move which the native population fiercely opposes. France has held New Caledonia since the 19th century, and has seen many uprisings and protests in favor of independence from French rule by the Kanaks in the past century.
---
## Death of the Iranian President
| [ ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/atw0424?refcode=atw)
---
|
Tens of thousands of Iranians attended the funeral of President Ebrahim Raisi in Tehran after he died in a helicopter crash on a foggy mountain on Sunday. The crash also claimed the lives of seven others, including Foreign Minister Hossein Amir-Abdollahian. The supreme leader, Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, led the prayers and consoled Raisi’s grandchildren, urging the nation to remember Raisi as a devoted servant, despite his controversial past involving the execution of political prisoners. The presidential elections have been scheduled for June 29, amidst the political uncertainty following Raisi’s death. Speculation about the helicopter crash's cause persists, with conflicting accounts suggesting sudden weather changes or possible technical issues. Despite attempts to locate the crash site using Turkish night-vision drones, the wreckage was ultimately found by an Iranian ground rescue team. The acting foreign minister, Ali Bagheri, has stepped in, and one of his key tasks will be to negotiate with the UN nuclear inspectorate for increased access to Iran’s nuclear sites. The funeral's turnout appeared smaller compared to the 2020 procession for General Qassem Soleimani, with many citizens opting for a holiday. Meanwhile, Saeed Jalili is emerging as a strong candidate for the upcoming presidential election.
---
| | |
## Investing in No Dem Left Behind's Efforts to Keep All Informed and American Politics in Context
---
We started our Around the World newsletter because we realised how vital it was to have the context of world news when understanding our own situation in America. **Not only do world events heavily affect our politics and lives as Americans** – in everything from global supply chains to foreign conflicts – **U.S. politics also make a big impact on politics around the world.** [**Join us today to stay informed and support our efforts to flip rural America blue. We believe that the rise of right-wing nationalism does not happen in a vacuum, and we have seen how the chaos in one half of the globe can easily spread overseas. Around the World is the newsletter keeping you informed of the global context.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/atw0424?refcode=atw)

If I can’t confront her on it during a live debate, it means my team has to knock on doors, call voters, and buy ad time to get the message out. Talking to voters takes resources — and with less than six months before the election, we can’t afford to come up short. That’s why my team has set a goal to raise $13,000 by May 31st at midnight. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | = | = | = | = | = | = At this stage in the campaign, hitting every single deadline is critical. We have to start making decisions NOW on hiring staff, communicating with voters, and buying ad time. Missing our goal at this stage in the race could mean falling short of the resources we need to compete with the MAGA money that’s coming into the Granite State to prop up Kelly Ayotte. = — Cinde * | = | = Click here to from Cinde Warmington's email list. name: Scott, Tammy Baldwin for Senate
subject: The GOP has already spent more than $11 million to defeat Tammy
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| We decided to increase our May advertising buy.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=2675%2E35263%2EeL_Q7u)
Peter — I made a difficult decision this week as Tammy’s campaign manager, and I thought you should know about it. First, let me catch you up: Tammy’s Republican opponent has outspent us on the airwaves for the past three months, spending north of $6 million on ads alone. But it doesn’t stop there. Multiple right-wing dark money groups have swooped in to support Hovde’s campaign by flooding Wisconsin with attack ads of their own. **All in all, Republicans have already combined to spend more than $11 million to defeat Tammy.** Wisconsin elections are historically expensive, but even this is unprecedented, Peter. We’ll be drowned out by these outside spenders if we don’t change our campaign strategy. **After much discussion with Tammy and the team, we decided to increase our own May advertising buy to fight back against Hovde and his right-wing allies.** The money isn’t in the budget right now, but I gave the green light anyway. I’ll be honest, I took a big risk here. There’s no doubt about it. But I was willing to bet that if I reached out and told the truth, our grassroots supporters would come through to help fill this unexpected hole in our budget so we can keep these ads live. **[Can I count on you to chip in to Tammy’s reelection campaign today? The only way we can keep pace with Eric Hovde and the dark money groups spending big to flip this seat is with the support of folks like you.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-may24.HLGTSS&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_NO_20240525_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=2675%2E35263%2EeL_Q7u)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3663?c0=tbe-em-may24.viyL1N&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_NO_20240525_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=2675%2E35263%2EeL_Q7u)

name: Team Schiff
subject: We’ll get straight to the point (we promise)
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=6543%2E5257348%2EelT9Gk)
Hey Derek,
We know you’re probably enjoying your Saturday so we’ll get straight to the point. **[We’re asking for a $3 contribution to Adam’s Senate campaign](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=may2024_abs_em.HG8rlH&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC90_20240525_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=3&t=4&akid=6543%2E5257348%2EelT9Gk)** — let us explain why.
[DONATE](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2907?c0=may2024_abs_em.WQbX9u&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC90_20240525_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=5&akid=6543%2E5257348%2EelT9Gk)
---
Mitch McConnell has been hand-picking ultra-wealthy GOP Senate candidates all over the nation to push their extremist agenda and take hold of the Senate majority — popular support be damned.
This means they could also pump money into Steve Garvey’s campaign in an effort to tear down Adam — but our grassroots supporters, like you, can help us get ahead of these MAGA schemes.
Adam’s end-of-month fundraising deadline is less than one week away. We have to meet our fundraising goals now so we can put up strong numbers at the end of the quarter to show that our campaign can win against his opponent.
**[Derek, will you pitch in $3 today so that we can meet our end-of-month fundraising goal?**](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=may2024_abs_em.HG8rlH&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC90_20240525_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=3&t=6&akid=6543%2E5257348%2EelT9Gk)

body:
Your support truly means so much to me.
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85640769/475399551/1820369458?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1260-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODAyMzRlN2YtZGExYS1lZjExLTg2ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=LffERmwXfLr7c6vflWhnS0pk8Vnxgr0QEIyARR70G5U=)
Hi, friend, thank you for being a part of this grassroots team to flip Florida blue. Your support truly means so much to me.
**I want to take a moment to tell you a bit about my record and why I'm in this race.[(Recent polling has me 4 points above Rick Scott, so if you're already all in to flip Florida blue, you can make a gift here.)](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85640770/475399552/1820369458?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1260-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODAyMzRlN2YtZGExYS1lZjExLTg2ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=LffERmwXfLr7c6vflWhnS0pk8Vnxgr0QEIyARR70G5U=)**
My mother brought my sisters and me to America when I was 14 to give us a chance at a better life. It took long hours, hard work, and a whole lot of hope, but we were able to win our American Dream. **That's why I made the decision to spend my career giving back to this incredible country and the state that gave me so much.**
I worked at several nonprofit organizations across Florida, helping to protect our wildlife and preserve our coral reefs. During my time working at Florida International University, I helped lead a new **program to** **improve access to affordable health care** for more Floridians.
In 2018, I decided to take these fights to Washington. I ran for Congress in a tough battleground district — and I won. In the House, **I wrote the bill to expand seniors’ Medicare Advantage coverage,** to ensure that more Americans could get the vital care they deserve. I also worked with Republicans to provide **economic relief to families and small businesses** and secured $200 million for **Everglades restoration. **
Throughout my time in Congress, **I fought tirelessly for commonsense gun safety reforms** , serving as the vice chair of the Gun Violence Prevention Task Force. This issue is deeply personal to me: When I was 24, my father died from gun violence. After leaving Congress, I joined Gabby Giffords' advocacy group as a senior advisor and continued to fight for safer communities and an end to the gun lobby's grip on Washington.
I'm incredibly proud of the work that I've done to uplift and protect my community. I'll never hide from my record. But I don't think that my opponent can say the same. **Rick Scott has spent his time in power writing the plan to cut Social Security and Medicare, attempting to undermine our elections, attacking our rights, and making it harder for working families to get ahead**. It's no wonder his approval ratings are tanking.
**My opponent is ranked as one of the most vulnerable senators on the ballot this year, but I can only defeat him with strong, early grassroots support.[So please, if you have anything extra to spare, will you make a donation to help me hit my critical $300,000 weekly fundraising goal so we can defeat Rick Scott and win a better future for Florida? I'm counting on you to have my back right now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85640771/475399553/1820369458?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1260-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODAyMzRlN2YtZGExYS1lZjExLTg2ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=LffERmwXfLr7c6vflWhnS0pk8Vnxgr0QEIyARR70G5U=)**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [DONATE $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85640772/475399554/1820369458?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=jtk1260-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODAyMzRlN2YtZGExYS1lZjExLTg2ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=LffERmwXfLr7c6vflWhnS0pk8Vnxgr0QEIyARR70G5U=)

Debbie Mucarsel-Powell

Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is a Floridian, South American immigrant, mother, and former Congresswoman. She’s dedicated her life to uplifting working families, ending gun violence, and fighting for her community. Now, she’s running to defeat Republican Senator Rick Scott and win a better, brighter future for Florida.

name: Frank Mrvan
subject: This is why I'm running for Congress, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www
body:
Is there anything I can say that would get you to split a contribution today?

|
---
Peter -- it's Frank Mrvan. I wanted to take this opportunity to remind my grassroots supporters why I am running to be Northwest Indiana’s voice in Congress for another term. **[If you’re in a rush today, I understand, but if you could please split a donation between the Indiana Democrats and my campaign, I would be so appreciative. >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85641176/475400556/-969499340?refcode=240525why&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZmUyZjJlMy1kYjFhLWVmMTEtODZkMC02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yLCIFgsvB45DIMuQiT8QtwMtybwiWMt8TqQJFz6rBNU=)** | | | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85641177/475400557/-969499340?refcode=240525why&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZmUyZjJlMy1kYjFhLWVmMTEtODZkMC02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yLCIFgsvB45DIMuQiT8QtwMtybwiWMt8TqQJFz6rBNU=)
---
I was first sworn into federal office after the election in 2020. Since then, I have made it my mission every day to make the working families of Northwest Indiana feel like they are heard and represented in the halls of Congress.
**The people of Northwest Indiana deserve leadership that will fight for them and their values.** As a lifelong public servant, I intend to continue to do exactly that.
As your Representative, I will continue to do work that reaches across the aisle, securing funding and passing legislation that protects your jobs, healthcare, and the economy.
Throughout my career as an elected official, I have listened to all individuals and worked in a bipartisan fashion to bring people together to solve problems.
**[I look forward to continuing to represent our collective interests in our nation’s capital, but I can’t get there without your help. name: Don Davis
subject: My race is getting more competitive
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Don Davis for NC
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/94275/images/DAV-Logo_2.png]
Hi there, this is Don Davis.
North Carolina’s first congressional district is a battleground! So, if you missed my previous emails, here’s a quick rundown:
*
North
Carolina
state
lawmakers
have
redrawn
the
district
maps,
making
this
the
only
competitive
race
in
NC.
*
The
Cook
Political
Report
has
rated
my
race
as
a
“
toss-up
[https://www.cookpolitical.com/ratings/house-race-ratings]
.”
*
Now,
experts
say
I
am
the
#5
most
vulnerable
House
member
[https://rollcall.com/2024/05/08/no-shortage-of-house-members-who-are-vulnerable-this-year/]
,
and
the
outside
special
interest
groups
are
spending
millions
to
try
to
unseat
me
[https://www.washingtonpost.com/politics/2024/05/22/house-races-speaker-johnson/]
.
Given the North Carolina General Assembly redrew the congressional map, it's no surprise how competitive this race will be. We need your help to protect this seat.
Therefore, I must ask you again: Would you be willing to pitch in $5, $20, or more to keep this seat for eastern North Carolina families? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fl-dav-new-branding-20220817] With your help, we can ensure our voices here in eastern North Carolina are heard in Washington, DC.
Thank you,
Don Davis

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Preserving and strengthening America's families
body:
We are witnessing a brutal, unceasing, and deadly assault currently being waged against American families—especially the traditional nuclear family. | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=04e308b77974475685d1c534ee1e4562&_t=6Rl0y9TXvKnaOw33TWIVLNKXw1JMG8TGCVtqq1MoT3asTGTH9e7cPZIkUsoOLubxjfJvw8WR9hsS70OskFGBofok_xBOJltX8pFGpURWVl0%3D)_

---
| | | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=04e308b77974475685d1c534ee1e4562&_e=Aq8WOZknIdUYUGU5CZCnbKOBZvb-Kr_G-MtWEYMgSuURP6Gnc0l4wBFsTOygDBbOXS9SvcLUpsONvUWr51tX_B_ITIXY0Shx7y5JgNLEia4zEotsFb1mnGZ4vvBF6P5jErTRgtCOvVj54V62S8GWYCqqfDrI9wsFgKscMT-forn-7YHFKMMKILhsbnc31nLSEciSV9tAs6Vafk5i47HC4Ec_Cl2eq53ADMmqw8MnzAzUIUG6hM_ABO1YfkkYKSkbm7fuUGF4oRKnvG6EYWvmMbhqiTiD55kY2yXayiChq4WrgDwmjm5Spjjyp7rmZLovQpS7zZwZai_JXLwPTxuDzw6whAcj9X8K8XPbI5R_HEE0qWydUrSj99mcoSylryCxYV3QYzH0xevfvwk8dBQiQA%3D%3D)
---
| From the Desk of Dr. Ben Carson: Dear Fellow Patriot,

We are witnessing a brutal, unceasing, and deadly assault currently being waged against American families--especially the traditional nuclear family. I'm sure you've felt it.

That's why I launched the American Cornerstone Institute--what I call a "think tank / do tank" -- in order to continue this perilous fight to protect, shore up, and support American families. [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=04e308b77974475685d1c534ee1e4562&_e=Aq8WOZknIdUYUGU5CZCnbKOBZvb-Kr_G-MtWEYMgSuURP6Gnc0l4wBFsTOygDBbOXS9SvcLUpsONvUWr51tX_B_ITIXY0Shx7y5JgNLEia4zEotsFb1mnGZ4vvBF6P5jErTRgtCOvVj54V62S8GWYCqqfDrI9wsFgKscMT-forn-7YHFKMMKILhsbnc31nLSEciSV9tAs6Vafk5i47HC4Ec_Cl2eq53ADMmqw8MnzAzUIUG6hM_ABO1YfkkYKSkbbZ7VkYQMPc6qoDOqM2hEyTazDHOVkOBiIzoHp8QhjboDiTnwrT5cSDFtlnljufZw2zCmiViA3_LFCb_v3X7Xrf0SYQv_YkEewCH_o98uDrO31NYeWmAQJe-iKN7AiVen0g5ZaC2A8-euZPmcokeLzw%3D%3D) Your gift of $100 or more to ACI today will help strengthen the bonds of our communities by lifting up the virtues of faith, liberty, community, and life.

Will you give today to support these cornerstone principles? They are essential to the success of our nation--principles that can be bolstered immeasurably and immediately by strengthening our families. To show my appreciation for your gift of $100 or more, you will receive an advanced signed copy of my new book "The Perilous Fight: Overcoming Our Culture's War on the American Family".

And to help pass down these important pillars to the next generation, I'lll also send you a free copy of my children's book "Why America Matters" that celebrates our great country and reminds us what a blessing it is to be an American.

You can make your secure gift here: [https://secure.americancornerstone.org/the-perilous-fight](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=04e308b77974475685d1c534ee1e4562&_e=Aq8WOZknIdUYUGU5CZCnbKOBZvb-Kr_G-MtWEYMgSuURP6Gnc0l4wBFsTOygDBbOXS9SvcLUpsONvUWr51tX_B_ITIXY0Shx7y5JgNLEia4zEotsFb1mnGZ4vvBF6P5jErTRgtCOvVj54V62S8GWYCqqfDrI9wsFgKscMT-forn-7YHFKMMKILhsbnc31nLSEciSV9tAs6Vafk5i47HC4Ec_Cl2eq53ADMmqw8MnzAzUIUG6hM_ABO1YfkkYKSkbzS6K0cpgRw9baNuQdO3OG5t9s6qYPPTamtZMmtW0lq9nyzQmzRejIE3yEfryQpcPkUAbyA2IW4Nz4ajENhFTaymrrQLcF3kgae288zW0AVnNFVuBHFhCNuAv_5qwQDd_Hsss3tJyMOPe_HgqJ-GStw%3D%3D)

Thank you for your interest in preserving and strengthening America's families!

Sincerely,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder and Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country's most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government's role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation's citizens.
---

name: Steve Garvey #6
subject: Be careful what you wish for Mr. Schiff
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEVE GARVEY FOR U
body:
I can’t help but think how Adam Schiff and his team of high-priced DC consultants thought they were being savvy in trying to make sure I became their opponent in General Election. Reports are they even spent money running ads promoting me. | | | [](http://links.rightwaypress.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=f000342a88ce4be29e33be8da83cf701&_e=7zUEwxQpp6kSpsssFv-pK_l1yNDg0f9TDEUsNbv6g0EsGO4zMoI4L9AKtPHovuIcilFYdk0qEBn1DERRL_pJlqf9b8EbckYFEoPOVpW0fr4cfB9_AsWUEvMa-yIALGG2hfKVBYUx0pwaksqBtE5wGrQjRiWQ3RXWna3mYOq1WhhIh6DL1fSd37F2kYw4Da4fjDpnKaMiMHRJ1LR-n5_hQ3Zse5-cLQFeV9Xx0zYXiOnNC8xGgkaDUlykrlWfLTuHTPROesgbEiWXagmC5qQRJF5eA4mZRGlHGy7Ztfdmx59fl5jiFEcfKlGVZtA_f74y3CY3s_3o41KXxBe9keIkq0QmEqQiD_bq4Mz-hc77XlSGUy5EB7ZQvAlVCsvW9c0rAI8qV4zewq4RDl6LtFEKeg%3D%3D)

| | Fellow American, I've played in lots of double-headers. And that's exactly what you and I have on our hands here. A one-on-one matchup with Adam Schiff on November 5th. **[**Can I count on your contribution of $6 to help defeat Adam Schiff today?**](http://links.rightwaypress.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=f000342a88ce4be29e33be8da83cf701&_e=7zUEwxQpp6kSpsssFv-pK_l1yNDg0f9TDEUsNbv6g0EsGO4zMoI4L9AKtPHovuIcilFYdk0qEBn1DERRL_pJlqf9b8EbckYFEoPOVpW0fr4cfB9_AsWUEvMa-yIALGG2hfKVBYUx0pwaksqBtE5wGrQjRiWQ3RXWna3mYOq1WhhIh6DL1fSd37F2kYw4Da4fjDpnKaMiMHRJ1LR-n5_hQ3Zse5-cLQFeV9Xx0zYXiOl3MJZSCdr36kZN9vHmFgAr9oQkGLwngd1_TR9BdjXiWlzpJYbICx5FlELW5zst75eiGW2Zm7ja0AQs6J_lrXIVn6akio8XnmwwFdspT3zPgkuy1e3OT1RUrWdbjmSC7VwciKmCS3vfyBGBwh74-ZsbTHYHsPF_ZC_5B6hjBFAgtA%3D%3D)** You see, Adam Schiff's enablers in the corporate media are already spreading the lie that this race is over. They're saying you and I don't have a chance (just like they did when I entered the race back in October). They're saying that Adam Schiff notched a double victory by advancing to the General Election and drawing me as his opponent. In other words, they're ready, willing and able to cut California voters entirely out of the picture again. My response to Schiff's allies saying they'd rather face me: **_Be careful what you wish for._** I'd liken this to my playing days when a cocky opposing pitcher throws a 94mph fastball right over the plate. I'll tell you, the ball would look as big as a grapefruit before I'd smash it over the fence and touch all the bases on the way home. And look how far we've already made it. I'm in first place in the primary and gaining momentum headed towards the November election. Look, I'm not saying this will be easy. Quite the opposite. It's going to be a nonstop, 58-county fight between now and November 5th. **[That said, I must ask: will you rush a contribution to my senate campaign today?](http://links.rightwaypress.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=f000342a88ce4be29e33be8da83cf701&_e=7zUEwxQpp6kSpsssFv-pK_l1yNDg0f9TDEUsNbv6g0EsGO4zMoI4L9AKtPHovuIcilFYdk0qEBn1DERRL_pJlqf9b8EbckYFEoPOVpW0fr4cfB9_AsWUEvMa-yIALGG2hfKVBYUx0pwaksqBtE5wGrQjRiWQ3RXWna3mYOq1WhhIh6DL1fSd37F2kYw4Da4fjDpnKaMiMHRJ1LR-n5_hQ3Zse5-cLQFeV9Xx0zYXiOnwAAGDPqjwkWIxmxU18tr0NQw1zlrZrUVXHcTUxHNsfkB1-Ww22V2iekwsFI0sg7V2u83B_nkC66mZqIMN0DpU_UgKKSV2kgz5NpkvoxwYs6Yi5k8vAR-KETMLRq8Ak7OpWouV-1iRB_V2Dlhr2TM20v8tbAef5DykfPTtstfmcQ%3D%3D) ** This is going to be an expensive fight. Hiring staff, recruiting and training volunteers, equipping them with the very best technology to identify our voter and secure their vote by November 5th. There's no time to lose. In closing, I can't help but think how Adam Schiff and his team of high-priced DC consultants thought they were being savvy in trying to make sure I became their opponent in General Election. Reports are they even spent money running ads promoting me. But what they've really done is awaken a sleeping giant here. Remember, before it became a wasteland of crime, homelessness, and sky-high taxes, California was a land of dreamers, a land of opportunity. It was a place where a scrawny little kid could start as a bat boy for his heroes, work hard, win a World Series, and land on a Topps baseball card. California can be that place again. America can be that place again. And it starts with throwing out political liars and connivers like Adam Schiff and reclaiming our freedom roots. Time is the most important factor. Thank you!
---
| |
---

| | [**Donate**](http://links.rightwaypress.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=f000342a88ce4be29e33be8da83cf701&_e=7zUEwxQpp6kSpsssFv-pK_l1yNDg0f9TDEUsNbv6g0EsGO4zMoI4L9AKtPHovuIcilFYdk0qEBn1DERRL_pJlqf9b8EbckYFEoPOVpW0fr4cfB9_AsWUEvMa-yIALGG2hfKVBYUx0pwaksqBtE5wGrQjRiWQ3RXWna3mYOq1WhhIh6DL1fSd37F2kYw4Da4fjDpnKaMiMHRJ1LR-n5_hQ3Zse5-cLQFeV9Xx0zYXiOnIA0KPBrYCEYaOBOHxs3SMIM_GqF-A0moutxcaxwDTJLh-LrSB786AFRsq-cJ3FFtUgXOfQNr5gbA-uVc9CW2rEJY1DmyxadFF-5HWFRj2rtR-sRpJXPoCPimF0MPLM4b-w2AfwA4rPgZCFsH58n8xieKaRBXsSd9FHv3JIGpOPw%3D%3D)
---
P.S. Adam Schiff had $35 million in the bank. Well, reports are now coming out that he spent upwards of _**$25 million**_ in the primary and is down to $10 million in the bank. Make no mistake, while his cash advantage is greatly diminished, as I write these words, Adam Schiff, Nancy Pelosi, and Chuck Schumer are quickly reloading. The ActBlue political machine has the capacity to pump millions into his race in the blink of an eye. You and I cannot give them any daylight. **[**Your prompt support is critical.**](http://links.rightwaypress.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=f000342a88ce4be29e33be8da83cf701&_e=7zUEwxQpp6kSpsssFv-pK_l1yNDg0f9TDEUsNbv6g0EsGO4zMoI4L9AKtPHovuIcilFYdk0qEBn1DERRL_pJlqf9b8EbckYFEoPOVpW0fr4cfB9_AsWUEvMa-yIALGG2hfKVBYUx0pwaksqBtE5wGrQjRiWQ3RXWna3mYOq1WhhIh6DL1fSd37F2kYw4Da4fjDpnKaMiMHRJ1LR-n5_hQ3Zse5-cLQFeV9Xx0zYXiOlhOYSy23zydd9w2UfSLNaa1i6N22AbCO_K7K0r8J89bVCzqNVlgwFjGfLSXOziZZMOl-H8w3aGepJqZo9LorjiKRiiin3VOk9kMZZh9YCQEqAt7mmslUr6k03R7lXBqWn6rcmeBtihIu-6krfSzkJCfcwf1SJDTpk9p9VOwAjqDQ%3D%3D)** Please don't delay.
---
| | PAID FOR BY STEVE GARVEY FOR U.S. SENATE
---
PO Box 532389 Los Angeles, CA 90053-2389

name: Bob Casey
subject: This is who I'm fighting for
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lisa Blunt Rochester for Senate
body:
I started a career in public service that has always been about fighting for Pennsylvania families.

You received this message from Lisa Blunt Rochester because you've previously taken action and supported Democrats like Lisa. Pennsylvania is my home, and it always will be.
It's where I was born, where I grew up, and where Terese and I raised our family.
It's also where I started a career in public service that has always been about fighting for Pennsylvania families.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85641922/475403177/-898443453?source=LOC_EM_FR_2024.05.25_B2_Casey-Split_30op&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZjU3YjU0Yi1lMzFhLWVmMTEtODZkMC02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9sq3nFVA48Hh7q4A9eOC-Edi-SUqqb9zsYqGfJaGetU=)
I chose to make Scranton my home because of the people. I enjoy that in Scranton, saying "hello" or "how's it going?" in the grocery store checkout line always leads to an engaging conversation. Neighbors don't just say "hello" back and go on with their day. They're going to tell you about what they're buying and about their family — and they'll ask you about what you're buying and about your family, too.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85641923/475403178/-898443453?source=LOC_EM_FR_2024.05.25_B2_Casey-Split_30op&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZjU3YjU0Yi1lMzFhLWVmMTEtODZkMC02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9sq3nFVA48Hh7q4A9eOC-Edi-SUqqb9zsYqGfJaGetU=)
Serving the people of our Commonwealth has been my great honor, and I'm proud of the fights we've won together.
I'm running for re-election because there are fights we still must win together – like the fight for voting rights, women's rights, and workers' rights; the fight to lower costs for working families; and the fight for our children, seniors, veterans, and people with disabilities.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85641924/475403179/-898443453?source=LOC_EM_FR_2024.05.25_B2_Casey-Split_30op&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZjU3YjU0Yi1lMzFhLWVmMTEtODZkMC02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9sq3nFVA48Hh7q4A9eOC-Edi-SUqqb9zsYqGfJaGetU=)
The reality is, this is going to be my toughest race yet. My opponent is worth hundreds of millions of dollars and will be another "yes" vote for big corporations and the ultra-wealthy like him in the Senate. **That's why Wall Street billionaires are trying so hard to defeat me and flip this seat.**
This is going to be one of the most expensive Senate races in the Nation, and we have to be ready to fight back against millions upon millions in outside spending if we're going to win.
[**With the Senate majority hinging on this seat, your support is more important than ever. So what do you say? **BUT REPUBLICANS:** They won’t give up the Electoral College without a fight – _they know it’s their key to the presidency!_

**SO WE’RE TELLING YOU:** This is our best chance to do away with this undemocratic relic – we need every single Democrat to speak up – _NOW!_

**[_10,000 SIGNATURES NEEDED: Add your name to demand an end to the Electoral College and help save our democracy »_](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/abolish_ec?source=FFR_20240525_EMPET_E4_T0_AC_RS&t=7&akid=21453%2E4449941%2E1ruslN)** | [I WANT TO ADD MY NAME: I DEMAND THAT THE ELECTORAL COLLEGE IS ABOLISHED »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/abolish_ec?source=FFR_20240525_EMPET_E4_T0_AC_RS&t=8&akid=21453%2E4449941%2E1ruslN)

body:
Now we have to finish what was started 4 years ago.

| | | [ ](https://www.jillstein2024.com/?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=george_floyd&n=1)
---
Peter – Four years ago today, George Floyd’s life was brutally snuffed out by a white Minneapolis police officer with a long, documented record of excessive force and misconduct.

Three other cops on the scene stood by casually watching and keeping the gathering crowd at bay while Derek Chauvin kneeled on Floyd’s neck for 9 minutes and 29 seconds.

Floyd repeatedly cried out “I can’t breathe” until his last breath. A teenage bystander recorded it for all the world to see.

It was a moment that shocked our nation’s conscience. In the midst of an ongoing pandemic, when life already felt so fragile, the brutality of white supremacy and American policing shattered what little sense of safety we had left.

In the days that followed, Americans rose up by the millions. We took to the streets in solidarity with the Floyd family – demanding serious, concrete, and irrevocable reforms to our criminal IN-justice system.

There was a moment, just over a week after losing her father in this brutal, public, racist assault, Floyd’s six year old daughter Gianna looked over the crowds gathered and declared: _“Daddy changed the world!”_

---
[ ](https://www.jillstein2024.com/r?u=cFbFwOg5y6zdGBHcYnKzMn9SegxbOStxTyIYF456B1mAA5ehhcNfpscOHM_EQL3p&e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=george_floyd&n=2)
---
Gianna’s declaration of love moved us all. But as a mother and an activist, those words were also a knife through my heart.

Today, Gianna is 10 years old and producing a documentary about her father’s life. Floyd’s entire family has stepped into the role of activists, pushing against the system to fight for those reforms we all demanded four years ago – striving to make Gianna’s words come true.

**But the Floyd family deserved a long life with their son, their brother, their father, George. They did not ask to become activists, and they should not carry the burden alone.

****It’s up to ALL of us to see that George Floyd’s meaningless murder is given purpose so that other lives can be saved, and justice be done.

** Today I ask that you join me in making a contribution to the Floyd Family Center for Social Equity to support their continued advocacy.
---
| [](https://www.jillstein2024.com/r?u=cFbFwOg5y6zdGBHcYnKzMn9SegxbOStxTyIYF456B1mAA5ehhcNfpscOHM_EQL3p&e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=george_floyd&n=3 "Donate to Floyd Family Center") [Donate to Floyd Family Center](https://www.jillstein2024.com/r?u=cFbFwOg5y6zdGBHcYnKzMn9SegxbOStxTyIYF456B1mAA5ehhcNfpscOHM_EQL3p&e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=george_floyd&n=3)
---
For the last four years, our politicians have used the Floyd family for photo ops and talking points. They have repeatedly stalled, watered down, and reversed the police reforms we demanded.

That ends when I become president. When elected, I will push Congress to pass the _George Floyd Justice in Policing Act_. But that is just the beginning.

I will end qualified immunity – a practice first established to protect members of the KKK — that currently acts as a shield for police brutality and prosecutorial misconduct.

I will bring ALL police misconduct allegations under federal authority so cops with repeated allegations of abuse and violence can’t shop for a new city to brutalize when they’ve worn out their welcome in another.

**We will do all of this and more, and we WILL have justice for George Floyd.

** You can read more about my plans to transform prisons and policing in America on my platform [**here**](https://www.jillstein2024.com/platform?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=george_floyd&n=4).

After four years, it’s time we live up to Gianna’s words and change the world. Thank you for being in this fight with me.

In solidarity and gratitude,

Jill
---
| [](https://www.jillstein2024.com/donate?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=george_floyd&n=5 "Support Jill Today!") [Support Jill Today!](https://www.jillstein2024.com/donate?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=george_floyd&n=5)
---

name: Alsobrooks HQ
subject: It's Your Weekly Team Alsobrooks Newsletter!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alsobrooks for Senate
body:
|
---
[ ](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/2092?t=1&akid=1729%2E52803%2ExFSMMD)

| | Greetings #TeamAlsobrooks, Another great week on the campaign trail! In case you missed it, here’s what’s been happening for the past week on the campaign trail and beyond: Maryland Democrats are united in one common goal: defeating Larry Hogan and ensuring that Democrats maintain the majority in the Senate. On November 5th, we will get it done. [](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/25941?t=24&amount=25&akid=1729%2E52803%2ExFSMMD) Proud to join Comptroller Brooke Lierman, State Senator Shelly Hettleman, Delegate Stephanie Smith, Councilwoman McCray, and Wendy Frosh to call out Larry Hogan’s hypocrisy on choice. We’re committed to building a state where women have the freedom and privacy to make their own decisions. We will protect abortion rights and keep Maryland blue! [](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/25941?t=25&amount=25&akid=1729%2E52803%2ExFSMMD) [](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/25941?t=26&amount=25&akid=1729%2E52803%2ExFSMMD) Team Alsobrooks is fired up just one week after our huge primary victory! We had dozens of volunteers at our campaign headquarters organizing the storage room and stuffing envelopes! We are going to win this in November! How does he think she'll do against Hogan?](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/25937?t=8&akid=1729%2E52803%2ExFSMMD)**
_“Prince George's County Executive Angela Alsobrooks faced a lot of hurdles in her race against Rep. David Trone for the Democratic nomination for U.S. Senate in Maryland.”_ Capital Gazette: **[Angela Alsobrooks warns against trusting Larry Hogan on abortion](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/25938?t=9&akid=1729%2E52803%2ExFSMMD)**
_“At a news conference held outside of Baltimore's American Visionary Art Museum, Democratic U.S. Senate nominee Angela Alsobrooks, Comptroller Brooke Lierman and members of the General Assembly attacked the former governor's record on abortion, alleging that the Republican Party sees his election as the pathway to a federal ban.”_ WBFF: **[Alsobrooks and Hogan spar over abortion rights in Maryland Senate race](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/25939?t=10&akid=1729%2E52803%2ExFSMMD)**
_“Angela Alsobrooks and Larry Hogan both touched on the issue Wednesday. Hogan, during an interview on the radio in Baltimore City, and Alsobrooks, during an event specifically called to push back on Hogan's latest claims.”_ Daily Kos: **[Republican Larry Hogan's new vow to support codifying Roe is laughable](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/25940?t=11&akid=1729%2E52803%2ExFSMMD)**
_“The truth is, a Hogan victory in Maryland would all but ensure a Republican takeover of the upper chamber—a death knell for codifying federal abortion protections.”_ **GET INVOLVED** I know what you’re thinking... 🤔
Where did #TeamAlsobrooks get those cool shirts and how can I get one??? Download the app to get started at **[angelaalsobrooks.com/app](http://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/12441?t=15&akid=1729%2E52803%2ExFSMMD)**. **We will also be launching our Alsobrooks Summer Fellowship in June!** Are you a high school or college student looking to learn about campaigns? Do you know some young people looking to get involved with the campaign? Then have them join our fellowship program! Fellows are volunteers who commit 5 to 10 hours per week to talk to voters, help at events, and contribute to special projects. Apply at **[angelaalsobrooks.com/fellowship](http://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/9723?t=16&akid=1729%2E52803%2ExFSMMD)**. Here on Team Alsobrooks, we’re proud to be a campaign powered by grassroots donors. We believe in Angela's ability to go further and do better for our communities, and we know you do too! name: Bob Casey
subject: A wall of corporate money
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
I need your help to fight back.
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=3076%2E552475%2ExwzUgT)
Peter, as you read this, Wall Street billionaires are pummeling Pennsylvania with ads to prop up my opponent, flip this seat red, and take back the Senate majority.
**[Donate ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240525-3?refcode=em20240525-3&refcode2=3076_552475_xwzUgT&akid=3076%2E552475%2ExwzUgT)**
A billionaire-backed super PAC supporting my opponent recently launched a $4 million TV ad buy to blanket Pennsylvania’s airwaves for the next four weeks. **That’s $1 million a week.**
We’re in an uphill battle against my opponent and his billionaire backers who are working overtime to buy Pennsylvania’s Senate seat.
**[That’s why I need to ask: Can I count on you to chip in $5 or $10 today? Your support today is crucial to helping us win in November.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240525-3?refcode=em20240525-3&refcode2=3076_552475_xwzUgT&akid=3076%2E552475%2ExwzUgT)**

Bob Casey

| | **🚨****[NEWSMAX](https://billeigel.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=00ef1c295ae4331d7c1e52945&id=0763dc98ab&e=c00a6982d2): EIGEL SURGING IN POLLS****🚨**
* * *
Patriots,

Great news - [we just received our highest poll yet](https://billeigel.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=00ef1c295ae4331d7c1e52945&id=e30185ea59&e=c00a6982d2). New polling out this week shows that the Missouri governor's race is anybody's game.

Jay Ashcroft 22%
Mike Kehoe 20%
Bill Eigel 14%
**Undecided 42%**

For months, we've been saying that **Bush era, establishment politician Jay Ashcroft**'s name ID lead is weak and his polling will tank as the race heats up. This is proving to be true. Ashcroft's lead has gone down this year by 23%.

We have also said that Lt. Gov Mike Kehoe is a liberal who the voters will find unconvincing no matter how much money he spends. This is also proving to be true.

Ashcroft is polling at half of what he was last year, and Kehoe has little to show for the over $5 million they've already spent.

**With Ashcroft squandering his name ID and Kehoe squandering millions in campaign cash, we are well positioned heading into the summer. **

With 42% of likely GOP primary voters undecided,**this race is wide open. **

The message is plain and simple: if we have the resources, we will win this race. We are nearing the end of the month, every dollar counts in this crucial moment. _**Will you consider chipping in?**_
